name: Connor Boyack
subject: Liberals are attacking American history education
body:
A new book is solving the problem
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9op066l022cpoli0dap8g8glofeoev16l27onp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmmhhjcc35mkq7adjim4o71cplemqn2cr0sqpr9cbm6cp69p71clij3dpn69rb1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmmqj0shmcoq65cr3cuobapbi4no)
| | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3hgiuse2uprvuuliola4h9v1ht6jk3rorbkol1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3a3rm18gbjtv0ccmt00dfbnta6sqpnmum2aq508_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs)
---
|
---
| | | I'd like to award you a ⭐️ gold star sticker if you can finish this sentence: "Those who don’t learn from the past are _________" Did you get it? I’ll reveal the answer in just a minute. But here’s the problem. Today our country is full of socialists and supporters of big government who are repeating the mistakes of the past because they never learned them. **The way we teach kids American history is totally upside down,** which is why I am ecstatic to share a new resource that every freedom-loving family needs to get to their kids to help them learn the amazing ideas from American history. So did you get the gold star? Here’s the full sentence: _Those who don't learn from the past are doomed to repeat it_. The problem is that young people are not are not taught to learn **_from_** the past. They are simply taught **_about_** the past. That's the message I share in this video, where I reveal our solution — a new children's book that teaches American history the right way. (Scroll down to see a sample.)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za6t865mg73j9813e17njpd3h64tvapse2ud7020_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs)
---
| _Click the image to watch the video._ We've created a [240-page, fully illustrated storybook](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt187jdkdqnt7bfqh6irklgss7i8hdl8c93opaq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs) for kids age 7-13 that teaches the inspiring stories of our country's founding. This powerful book solves a **critical problem that other history books for kids all have**. Other books... **❌** Focus on superficial facts, such as dates and names of places and battles **❌** Gloss over the Founding Fathers' ideas that revolutionized America and the world

**❌** Don't help young readers understand why what happened 250 years ago is relevant to our world today

In stark contrast to these boring history books, our A _merica's History_ stories...

✅ Help young readers understand history more deeply by immersing them in the stories around the events

✅ Teach the inspiring ideas of America's founding and how those ideas are relevant to their lives today

✅ Challenge your children to learn from the past and apply those ideas to our world

✅ Are filled with examples about how the lessons of history are relevant to us today

✅ Are enjoyable to read as a family and turn history into an engaging story for kids of all ages
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmo6jdejm0hdb90u1ervkupohf75f9rophh7edg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs)
---
| [You can get the launch sale here](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6end6o18vtrpk45aimobvi6a2k0vquh2cpgku20_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs). In addition to the storybook, the launch sale also includes: The bundle includes: 1\. Our 240-page, hardcover, beautifully illustrated history book — unlike any other book out there! 2\. Over 200 pages of companion curriculum filled with projects and activities to increase your child's understanding of and love for American history 3\. Over 6 hours of MP3 audiobooks to listen to 4\. Over 4 hours of extra video stories of history These items will be sold separately after launch. If you pre-order, you get everything — which will be $216 when sold separately — for just $74.99.
---
| [Order the American History bundle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4irrhotfar7sc6o8jkljk4o71nkcibhgqcm83ug_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim6o36cdh2bs)
---
| You've no doubt heard about the Tuttle Twins before. We've sold over 4 million books! Glenn Beck promotes our books on his show every day, and we're often featured in media across the country because our books teach the ideas that America was built upon. Schools no longer teach these ideas. (Even worse, many attack them.) That's why it's up to parents and grandparents to do it. But you're not alone — our team has books, curriculum, and more to help support the young ones in your life and make sure they learn how the world really works. Like me, you don't want your children to repeat the mistakes of the past. You want them to help save our country and make the future brighter. That means they need to learn from the past. And that's what our new 240-page book help them do. Here are some sample pages. (Click the button above to download a full chapter FREE to see more for yourself!)
---
|
---
| Take advantage of the launch bundle now to get over $200 in content for just $75! This expires soon so we wanted to let you know ASAP so you can reserve your family copy. Also, with the supply chain problems, we weren't able to print as many as we would like, so if you'd like to get a book for your family please order soon. This is how we save our country — by teaching our children the inspiring stories of our past. Textbooks and teachers aren't doing it well. We need to take the matter into our own hands. And the new Tuttle Twins book is just the resource you need!

The way we teach kids American history is totally upside down, which is why I am ecstatic to share a new resource that every freedom-loving family needs to get to their kids to help them learn the amazing ideas from American history. So did you get the gold star? Here’s the full sentence: Those who don't learn from the past are doomed to repeat it. The problem is that young people are not are not taught to learn from the past. They are simply taught about the past. That's the message I share in this video, where I reveal our solution — a new children's book that teaches American history the right way. (Scroll down to see a sample.) | | Click the image to watch the video. We've created a for kids age 7-13 that teaches the inspiring stories of our country's founding. This powerful book solves a critical problem that other history books for kids all have. Other books... ❌ Focus on superficial facts, such as dates and names of places and battles ❌ Gloss over the Founding Fathers' ideas that revolutionized America and the world ❌ Don't help young readers understand why what happened 250 years ago is relevant to our world today In stark contrast to these boring history books, our A merica's History stories... ✅ Help young readers understand history more deeply by immersing them in the stories around the events ✅ Teach the inspiring ideas of America's founding and how those ideas are relevant to their lives today ✅ Challenge your children to learn from the past and apply those ideas to our world ✅ Are filled with examples about how the lessons of history are relevant to us today ✅ Are enjoyable to read as a family and turn history into an engaging story for kids of all ages | | . In addition to the storybook, the launch sale also includes: The bundle includes: 1\. Our 240-page, hardcover, beautifully illustrated history book — unlike any other book out there! 2\. Over 200 pages of companion curriculum filled with projects and activities to increase your child's understanding of and love for American history 3\. Over 6 hours of MP3 audiobooks to listen to 4\. Over 4 hours of extra video stories of history These items will be sold separately after launch. If you pre-order, you get everything — which will be $216 when sold separately — for just $74.99. | | You've no doubt heard about the Tuttle Twins before. We've sold over 4 million books! Glenn Beck promotes our books on his show every day, and we're often featured in media across the country because our books teach the ideas that America was built upon. Schools no longer teach these ideas. (Even worse, many attack them.) That's why it's up to parents and grandparents to do it. But you're not alone — our team has books, curriculum, and more to help support the young ones in your life and make sure they learn how the world really works. Like me, you don't want your children to repeat the mistakes of the past. You want them to help save our country and make the future brighter. That means they need to learn from the past. And that's what our new 240-page book help them do. Here are some sample pages. (Click the button above to download a full chapter FREE to see more for yourself!) | | Take advantage of the launch bundle now to get over $200 in content for just $75! This expires soon so we wanted to let you know ASAP so you can reserve your family copy. Also, with the supply chain problems, we weren't able to print as many as we would like, so if you'd like to get a book for your family please order soon. This is how we save our country — by teaching our children the inspiring stories of our past. Textbooks and teachers aren't doing it well. We need to take the matter into our own hands. And the new Tuttle Twins book is just the resource you need! | | ---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | I hope your family enjoys! We've been hard at work to make this beautiful book and solve the problems that other textbooks are creating. You won't be disappointed. Click the button above to see a full chapter for yourself! Connor Boyack Author, The Tuttle Twins | | | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6115%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KivBvm4GB7lAKSQgk1Tf8g&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63265%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YeQlmmzskytrRxwnKDmrlQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63266%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wHFGckamOtBjuWD96mp6Sg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63266%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wHFGckamOtBjuWD96mp6Sg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6115%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KivBvm4GB7lAKSQgk1Tf8g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6115%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KivBvm4GB7lAKSQgk1Tf8g&sysid=1)

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Passing along this URGENT request from young conservatives
body:
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdjdr008l1jamt70dmpigcor3d7sue4aks8hvqao_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkedqmfcphmlq66sr4mph66tj0c6oecd74cqq6csrh61i68c3j69j60pjkelgreduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmmqj0shhcpojeddgcuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb3ctim9or1c1h2bs)
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztnsdul0efcmt5u8i16qjfmocq6q46lts66guoe0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim9or1c1h2bs) Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know **the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk5ej48ljmqng5krcks0701cqspd1k5lli40cm48_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim9or1c1h2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv7m20vra66o24ke719mouoev9aejv65qdhhqn7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctim9or1c1h2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
* * *
**From:** Bryan Bernys
**To:** Morton Blackwell
**Subject:** URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have **50 more applications** to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \--
**Bryan Bernys**
Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program
Leadership Institute

name: American Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9374%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=b9AqRNCjK0ffT6JGWjQBDg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36341%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KcodPZ239QpH8EH5x5omkg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36342%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YpXbVDg0bI39UgyvOYwdZw&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36343%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PRfE43RX%2frLb0OWkwSGrjQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9374%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=b9AqRNCjK0ffT6JGWjQBDg&sysid=1)

Bergman's Congressional office, and it's at a frequency they've never seen before my campaign. Their thoughts: Bergman is advertising with Federal funds. At first I thought it couldn't be true. I thought it must be illegal. So, [we investigated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47302748/353790468/-2136257650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWI5NGFjYy1mN2Y5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1LH2Pmb-KzO76tnSp329dCIydBUnkcudzE6xWhpXj_c=&emci=934853fd-d7f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=59b94acc-f7f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427)

According to the [Statement of Disbursements of the House](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47302750/353790470/1880116687?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWI5NGFjYy1mN2Y5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1LH2Pmb-KzO76tnSp329dCIydBUnkcudzE6xWhpXj_c=&emci=934853fd-d7f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=59b94acc-f7f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427), before Jack Bergman faced me in the Congressional race, the Representative's office spending and printing expenses were on par with the rest of the Congressional delegation from Michigan, Democrat and Republican. Then, in the 1st quarter of 2022, Bergman's printing cost rose **1250%** , and his office expenses increased **50%** compared to 2021. All other Michigan Representatives' total office expenses decreased by 3%, and printing increased by 28%. This is an unprecedented expenditure. Nearly $122,000 in three months? Why? If informing the constituency by mailing is critical in this rural district, quarterly spending should be consistent, whether in an election year or not. It shouldn't even matter what quarter it is. If Jack Bergman isn't campaigning against me with federal funds, taxpayers are owed an explanation. Without explanation, this is completely unethical and just plain wrong. This is appears to be taxpayer-funded self promotion at a level we very rarely see in Congress. Jack Bergman's campaign should advertise with donor funds _only_. [Send me to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47302751/353790471/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWI5NGFjYy1mN2Y5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1LH2Pmb-KzO76tnSp329dCIydBUnkcudzE6xWhpXj_c=) I will be honored to replace him in November because citizens in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve a Representative they can trust, someone with principles of honesty and integrity, and someone who spends federal tax dollars wisely. This election cycle, Bergman is abusing his privilege. \- Dr. Bob

clean_body: I have received many complaints from constituents — Republicans, Independents, and Democrats — stating they're receiving multiple self-promoting mailings from Rep. Bergman's Congressional office, and it's at a frequency they've never seen before my campaign. Their thoughts: Bergman is advertising with Federal funds. At first I thought this couldn't be true. I thought it must be illegal. | | | After discovering Rep. Jack Bergman was misusing taxpayer dollars to fund self-promoting, we also investigated the incumbent’s print/mailer expenses. The numbers are shocking. Rep. Jack Bergman accused of campaigning against Dr. Bob Lorinser with federal funds = Bergman mailers are costing taxpayers big money Rep. Jack Bergman increased his print and mailing by 1,250%, spending nearly $122,000 from January through March 2022. This is compelling evidence that Rep. Jack Bergman may be campaigning with federal funds. A= will help me compete with this unethical windfall. = | | = | = | | I have received many complaints from constituents — Republicans, Independents, and Democrats — stating they're receiving multiple self-promoting mailings from Rep. Bergman's Congressional office, and it's at a frequency they've never seen before my campaign. Their thoughts: Bergman is advertising with Federal funds. At first I thought it couldn't be true. I thought it must be illegal. So, = | According to the , before Jack Bergman faced me in the Congressional race, the Representative's office spending and printing expenses were on par with the rest of the Congressional delegation from Michigan, Democrat and Republican. Then, in the 1st quarter of 2022, Bergman's printing cost rose 1250% , and his office expenses increased 50% compared to 2021. All other Michigan Representatives' total office expenses decreased by 3%, and printing increased by 28%. This is an unprecedented expenditure. Nearly $122,000 in three months? Why? If informing the constituency by mailing is critical in this rural district, quarterly spending should be consistent, whether in an election year or not. It shouldn't even matter what quarter it is. If Jack Bergman isn't campaigning against me with federal funds, taxpayers are owed an explanation. Without explanation, this is completely unethical and just plain wrong. This is appears to be taxpayer-funded self promotion at a level we very rarely see in Congress. Jack Bergman's campaign should advertise with donor funds only. = I will be honored to replace him in November because citizens in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve a Representative they can trust, someone with principles of honesty and integrity, and someone who spends federal tax dollars wisely. This election cycle, Bergman is abusing his privilege. \- Dr. Bob = = | | = | = | | The Friends of Dr. Bob campaign is committed to meaningful content, and we genuinely hope recipients enjoy the quality of stories we share. But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message. Please do not hesitate to if you feel you've received our e-mails in error. We completely understand, and hopefully we'll connect in a format you find more welcoming. FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States | | PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. body:
We’re in the final stretch, Peter, and none of us want to wake up on July 20 wishing we had done more.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47303166/353792125/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220702&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=35&refcode2=73654182-fef9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY1NDE4Mi1mZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2fTW-6EqpVN1a6fLzxEySDtMD-tdfpQk3-4XQCOkb0=)

| Peter, I’m emailing you today because **tomorrow at midnight is our last public fundraising deadline before Primary Election Day. ** **Right now over a third of Marylanders are still undecided voters,** and polling has shown that when voters on the fence hear about my story and vision for a brighter, more prosperous Maryland, they are very likely to be swayed to support our campaign. That means we can’t slow down for a single second. We’ve got to ramp up our campaigning and expand our TV ads, boost our social media presence, and fully mobilize our coalition of volunteers to connect with as many undecided voters as possible across the state. _**[If you have a moment, I am humbly asking you to help us continue this work with a donation of $50, $35, or even $5 today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47303167/353792126/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220702&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=35&refcode2=73654182-fef9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY1NDE4Mi1mZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2fTW-6EqpVN1a6fLzxEySDtMD-tdfpQk3-4XQCOkb0=)**_ I’ll be honest: campaigning in every corner of the state is expensive. We’re proud to be grassroots funded and that our average online donation is $38, but that means we need every single one of our supporters to dig deep, step up, and pitch in what they can _**right now**_ to put us in the best possible position ahead of Primary Election Day. We’re all here for the same reasons: to ensure every public school provides a world-class education, invest in public transit and build a thriving green economy to reach net-zero emissions by 2035, and ensure that Maryland becomes a national safe haven for anyone seeking abortion access or reproductive care. But with the Supreme Court stripping millions of their basic rights, our GOP opponents touting regressive policies, and families struggling to make ends meet across our state, the stakes couldn’t be higher. [_**So please, can you match our average online donation of $38 or pitch in what you can today to help our movement meet this critical moment?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47303168/353792127/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220702&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=38&refcode2=73654182-fef9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY1NDE4Mi1mZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2fTW-6EqpVN1a6fLzxEySDtMD-tdfpQk3-4XQCOkb0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | [$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47303169/353792128/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220702-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220702&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode2=73654182-fef9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY1NDE4Mi1mZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2fTW-6EqpVN1a6fLzxEySDtMD-tdfpQk3-4XQCOkb0=)

clean_body: We’re in the final stretch, Peter, and none of us want to wake up on July 20 wishing we had done more. | = | Peter, I’m emailing you today because tomorrow at midnight is our last public fundraising deadline before Primary Election Day. Right now over a third of Marylanders are still undecided voters, and polling has shown that when voters on the fence hear about my story and vision for a brighter, more prosperous Maryland, they are very likely to be swayed to support our campaign. That means we can’t slow down for a single second. We’ve got to ramp up our campaigning and expand our TV ads, boost our social media presence, and fully mobilize our coalition of volunteers to connect with as many undecided voters as possible across the state. = I’ll be honest: campaigning in every corner of the state is expensive. We’re proud to be grassroots funded and that our average online donation is $38, but that means we need every single one of our supporters to dig deep, step up, and pitch in what they can right now to put us in the best possible position ahead of Primary Election Day. We’re all here for the same reasons: to ensure every public school provides a world-class education, invest in public transit and build a thriving green economy to reach net-zero emissions by 2035, and ensure that Maryland becomes a national safe haven for anyone seeking abortion access or reproductive care. But with the Supreme Court stripping millions of their basic rights, our GOP opponents touting regressive policies, and families struggling to make ends meet across our state, the stakes couldn’t be higher. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = We’re in the final stretch, Peter, and none of us want to wake up the day after the election wishing we had done more. And in a race this close, every dollar counts. On behalf of all of us at Team King-Siri, I am beyond grateful for your continued support. Let’s win this together! With immense gratitude, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Ted Corcoran [AOTL]
subject: I’m reflecting on where we stand as a nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend --

This weekend, I’m reflecting on where we stand as a nation. On the one hand, we are going into the 2022 elections with fairest maps in a generation. I want to thank you for the work you’ve done to make that possible.

But this week, like so many of you, I was reminded that all the progress we have made is fragile. Like our democracy, fair elections are continuously under siege by a political party that is comfortable bending -- or even breaking -- the structures of our democracy to maintain power.

That’s why it is so important that we continue the work that has gotten us this far.

[**I’m asking you to contribute $15, $50, or whatever amount makes sense for you, so we can continue the work of advocacy, litigation, and organizing for one of our fundamental rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47303185/353792146/-657318582?refcode=20220701_AOTL_F_mm1redux_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNjU0MTgyLWZlZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DfZdrjo6zZvux4HHfc3QTiHQyZKXPEIXhzUN2PSsajE=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The gains made by All On The Line and our volunteers are real, and they will have a real effect in November as voters across the country go to the polls. Without a doubt, this is something to celebrate and be proud of.

But those hard-earned gains are also fragile, and they must be protected. We’ve been able to count on folks like you to fight for what’s right, and right now, I’m asking you to step up and show your support.

[**Make a contribution and help us protect and strengthen our fragile democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47303192/353792153/-657318582?refcode=20220701_AOTL_F_mm1redux_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNjU0MTgyLWZlZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DfZdrjo6zZvux4HHfc3QTiHQyZKXPEIXhzUN2PSsajE=)

The work you’re doing as part of All On The Line will continue to shape our nation for the better.

Thank you,

Ted Corcoran,
Organizing Director

name: Letitia James Election Update
subject: The final push
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, we have exciting news: The general election officially starts now, Letitia James is officially the Democratic nominee for attorney general of New York.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47305159/353799397/265476937?code=jtk553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdkYWU5My0wN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3j7sqVcqj9E7r2_umNmdUkHDJq9mhkT7Hlr4JX-u6g=)
---
Peter, we have exciting news: **The general election officially starts now, and Letitia James is officially the Democratic nominee for attorney general of New York.**

This means that we’re now in the _final_ _push_ for the general election. We need to ensure that this campaign has the support it needs to launch into this last stretch, so we set a goal of receiving 10,000 endorsements for Letitia’s campaign by midnight.

**[Will you officially endorse Letitia’s re-election campaign for attorney general of New York as we head into the next phase of the election year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47305160/353799399/-2071309?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdkYWU5My0wN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3j7sqVcqj9E7r2_umNmdUkHDJq9mhkT7Hlr4JX-u6g=&emci=cdd66c51-eef7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=047dae93-07fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

In just three and a half years, Attorney General James has made huge progress in her work to defend the voiceless and the vulnerable. She has gone up against some of the most powerful, influential, and wealthy forces in the country in order to protect New Yorkers – **_and through it all, she’s refused to bow, break, or be bullied._**

More than that, she has been able to secure real wins for New Yorkers, including those who have been hit hard by the opioid epidemic, harmed by predatory landlords, and endangered by the gun violence epidemic.

We’re proud to call Letitia James our attorney general – and excited to name her as our pick for 2022. We hope you’ll join us in celebrating her accomplishments and officially endorse her run for re-election, Peter. **We’ve already built a powerful campaign with the help of people like you, but as both Letitia and her Republican opponent gear up for the final election-year push, we need to make sure we have your support during this most important stretch of the race.**

**[So please, will you officially endorse Letitia James’ run for re-election and join this powerful grassroots team? We’re relying on 10,000 fearless fighters to step up before midnight, but we’re still missing YOUR endorsement. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47305162/353799401/-2071309?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdkYWU5My0wN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3j7sqVcqj9E7r2_umNmdUkHDJq9mhkT7Hlr4JX-u6g=&emci=cdd66c51-eef7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=047dae93-07fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

Friend – time is running out, and it's critical we raise our voices ASAP.
The Supreme Court's decision to strike down _Roe v. Wade_ blatantly disregards nearly 50 years of legal precedent – not to mention the health and rights of millions of people.
With the majority of the country in support of reproductive rights, it's clearer than ever that the Supreme Court is completely out of step with the American people. We know why: **After Donald Trump rammed through his handpicked, right-wing justices, he created the most conservative court in _decades._**

body:
Medical schools have been overthrown by radical left-wing activists forcing a woke agenda down the throats of every medical stud
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze5vpoun669rtnmdsrh0p1kt4pv1k3ti3fg39368_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugqr8p5nmjhncsb4csp3athhcsoj9chjelh3fd71c5om2t3gmhrrdcb4sar64ptnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcoon1ddjc1rm8phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdjm6or4s5j649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zug15fblbbidjfm2r5urie0tkd1aoapk9ovb74jg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

Friend,

Medical schools have been overthrown by radical left-wing activists forcing a woke agenda down the throats of every medical student.

And the lessons they are teaching in the classroom are not only disturbing but have nothing to do with medicine!

Before I tell you the six most twisted things medical students are "learning" from medical schools, allow me to introduce myself.

_My name is Richard Walker, Executive Director of Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI)_. The Benjamin Rush Institute is a nonpartisan, pro-free enterprise, nonprofit organization dedicated to educating medical students about positive, proven healthcare policies that preserve and protect the fundamental doctor-patient medical relationship.

[_**You can help the Benjamin Rush Institute FIGHT BACK against the Woke activists in our healthcare industry by donating $10, $50, $100, $500 or any amount here >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvoq8goia1h05dgtjbkg4n9q6g3sbqbr1tdj8sd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

**Here are the top six most disturbing lessons being taught to medical students by radical left-wing medical schools: **

1. **Obesity is no longer a medical condition:** Obesity is now an 'acceptable lifestyle choice' and even considered beautiful. This is WRONG! [_**Please help the BRI fight this nonsense by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49k7ap214h9r02nu6dferhl5v5nt68c9a8e9q4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

2. **Sex and gender are now fluid:** Students are learning that hormone treatments should be given to everyone without any questions. This is WRONG! [_**Please help the BRI fight this nonsense by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6sn7uoiualkeqnpjf85spk2teev79eeebdbrilg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

3. **Dr. Fauci is right about everything:** Medical schools are instructing their students not to question anything he says about Covid19, mask mandates, or vaccine mandates. This is WRONG! [_**Please help the BRI fight this nonsense by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3e7h135cn3pptfmop0q03v7j49r8u3mblv527g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

4. **The answer is to always prescribe a pill:** Every doctor knows oftentimes a patient simply needs more exercise, better sleep, or to visit a therapist... But medical schools are now teaching students to prescribe a pill for any little problem these days. This is WRONG! [_**Please help the BRI fight this nonsense by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5iecvila6pnoajmd9lmveo6v8u19rtq7a1obg80_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

5. **Exercise "Triggers" patients and should not be recommended: **Future doctors and nurses are being advised against recommending exercise because it could "trigger" patients and offend people. This is WRONG! [_**Please help the BRI fight this nonsense by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd381sip424dt204sn6hnalpfd0dahdsmopqq1l8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

6. **Universal Healthcare or European socialized medicine is the best system:** Too many medical school faculty, insurance companies, and Big Pharma-the healthcare establishment-are brainwashing medical students to believe socialized medicine is the answer to all our problems! This is WRONG! [_**Please help the BRI fight this nonsense by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziov2b0bj0u385isn0r7hcmks1d0dlp1o818b210_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

As you can see - Medical schools too often try to transform medical students into becoming social justice warriors, not medical scientists. If we let this happen, medical schools will become nothing more than political indoctrination centers. When that happens, medical students will learn to become political activists NOT healthcare professionals!

The Benjamin Rush Institute believes that the best way to deliver quality, affordable medical care is through a free enterprise, limited government system.

**Friend, the Benjamin Rush Institute is the ONLY pro-free enterprise group fighting back against this nonsense on medical school campuses, and we need your help! **

[_**I am calling on your help to fight back against radical activism in medical schools. Can you chip in $5, $10, $35, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hbsqervkp2vfracr1epcdk6qqr9ib2a1ps5m7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

[_**Send $10 >> **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs21l403m4qtafolug0a6cd283hd719gl70ha2t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Send $25 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvts4s3ja9gf4olt6a9jnev5r1iqbh6hc5j0o1i0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Send $50 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9kkjjg8rh3rhlq77jlbdacmp8i0jfhgjemp3ah8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Send $100 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4882ni4rf0l217h67n9p09057511b7q2jkcqglo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a student $250 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zberhf5bttrgb71t1gid8p3dc6uvigrsnc51oqg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a speaker for $500 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu1m1dsgp0eh47cqqmdularf0m2f53skv2nmrqug_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a chapter for $1,000 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ct7hp8a9u7s0hri6c3lf3cpo7nocovi7obeal0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Send Any Amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ba7ae0n9hl9946m56nhu4t2qm9pi9aedt129ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

I suspect you love the United States and our Constitution as much as I do.

You are probably concerned about the direction of our country.

You probably don't agree with ANY of the lessons being taught in medical schools I mentioned above.

And I suspect you DO NOT want people like Anthony Fauci or radical left-wing activists to be in charge of our healthcare system.

Neither do I.

But this is the future we are facing unless we act, fight back, and defeat it.

Healthcare makes up 20% of the United States economy... Surrendering on this issue means giving up on our country.

You and I can't afford to allow our medical students be brainwashed and forget how free enterprise medicine created the greatest healthcare breakthroughs in the 20th and 21st centuries and how America leads the world in quality of care and innovation.

Please consider joining the Benjamin Rush Institute, supporting our mission, changing the lives of our students, and fight for America's future by making a donation below.

[_**Send $10 to BRI >> **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdq8de4alfo92u9b5mkq953or9cois40dj3ii9n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

[_**Send $50 to BRI >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt44nlhcl466sjag7lj7mh2j2mc8bfldm190k13o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Send $100 to BRI >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt9bnq36h4i5s38vmunqul6hm974ovj89qj4i5to_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a student $250 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z128msa8tjbabcoe9kefmkmjdv68sklp8alabaj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a speaker for $500 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrtoo9vd562l3spj7fbrv6ufh517en5sj0mhg1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a chapter for $1,000 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlea7lkvved1h49mria0goqsbvmtkhp0h5q5tgb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cthm6p71cph2bs)

Richard W. Walker

Good morning, Peter,
I'd like to take a moment and recognize two incredible Long Islanders who recently received the Presidential Medal of Freedom, our nations highest civilian honor.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YMihvuD0nb7HMehpqsmkJ0EtunoCoI8BRXlRqQXpjY4=/AnzkIb0qeOP-iqWmORjVl4hU-JuR3DH1hC1d7xjAvWU=)
Sandra Lindsay, a critical-care nurse from Port Washington, and Father Alexander Karloutsos, who serves as pastor of the Dormition of the Virgin Mary Greek Orthodox Church of the Hamptons in Southampton.
Thank you both for your service to Long Island and for being an example to all of us.
\- Jon Kaiman

| | Friend,

I know it's a holiday weekend so I'll just take a second, but I need your help to start July strong. We have an ambitious goal for this month, and we need to meet it to fund our summer campaign strategy.

To make that happen, it's important that we don't lose our momentum this weekend – I know I can count on you to keep us on track. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47311183/353824023/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220702_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZhNDJmOS0wZmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xvrWR3CnaxFGAZRcDmiP_4nHsvqcQuTx91ppWKGrauc=)

There's plenty of good news going into the holiday. The latest polls show that voters across Florida are joining our movement. Folks are tired of the divisiveness and want a return to decency and honesty. Those values are the cornerstone of my campaign and are the focus of our messaging.

But we need to ensure we have enough funds to continue pushing out our messaging to voters. If we fall behind on our fundraising, we could lose our narrow lead.

So before you enjoy the fireworks and some much needed rest this weekend, **[I hope you'll consider chipping in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford so we can start June off right](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47311191/353824052/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220702_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZhNDJmOS0wZmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xvrWR3CnaxFGAZRcDmiP_4nHsvqcQuTx91ppWKGrauc=)**.

Charlie

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Passing along this URGENT request from young conservatives
body:
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh20mgmja6ue406bai6gq9e09elqjfrg6rje7cj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm0ob0sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlcji3eo9hethbechj6ljraob0c4r7dcj7mhor1c5hckq37cr1cmrj2pjie5qmfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74dj665pbbc37m8o6cslgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdggkbjm38gmgqnga0vqipert5vtfiifrs94tu8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm0ob0sjh2bs) Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know **the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh19q0s36eisp9d2f0m2nfo28gl8iemt31659hoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm0ob0sjh2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd2rr5av4gvicqquq5kirllq80pjdhpariltni70_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm0ob0sjh2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
* * *
**From:** Bryan Bernys
**To:** Morton Blackwell
**Subject:** URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have **50 more applications** to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \--
**Bryan Bernys**
Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program
Leadership Institute

My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the Leadership Institute. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations. More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds. The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that. The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training? Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. Peter Willis, I’m not gonna lie, June was a rocky month filled with joy, deep reflection, sorrow, and anger. But through it all, you’ve stood with me, and for that I am deeply thankful. Now more than ever, it is clear we need new leadership in Washington with the courage to stand up for our rights — as women, as LGBTQ+ folks, as the working class that is the backbone of this country. There is **so much** on the line, and the same old talking points and pandering to conservative and moderate views just aren’t cutting it anymore. They never did. The only way forward is to elect leaders this November committed to making **real progressive change** :
* **End the filibuster._Codify Roe_. Repeal Hyde.**

* **Expand and unrig the Supreme Court to protect abortion, marriage equality, access to contraception, and so much more.**

* **Pass Medicare for All, the morally and fiscally responsible solution to our country’s healthcare crisis.**

* **Pass comprehensive anti-corruption legislation to stop dark money from buying our institutions EVER again.**

If you haven’t done this yet, [**please sign our petition with five demands to restore our reproductive rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47312868/353829096/-763783553?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220702thankyou_m_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFhMzU3NC0xMWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F6ddYt8xTqF9lFixMXxcu07eT8feKf5hxmgXvf4KtI=&emci=fd638c6d-11fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=521a3574-11fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9388410) Petition signatures will be personally delivered to President Biden, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi so they know **we will not settle** for half-measures or performative action. | [Sign the petition today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47312869/353829097/-763783553?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220702thankyou_m_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFhMzU3NC0xMWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F6ddYt8xTqF9lFixMXxcu07eT8feKf5hxmgXvf4KtI=&emci=fd638c6d-11fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=521a3574-11fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9388410)

We need Democrats who'll fight back, not just go along to get along. I am unafraid and unapologetic, and I am digging in for the long fight ahead of us.
In solidarity and gratitude,
Melanie

body:
Our campaign truly would not be here without the support and generosity of people like you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47313820/353832381/985656306?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.02_b1_es_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjY0M2JkOS0xMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9Xwr-GaHWoz59UMcbl_jRPU1L9UENXnNdoD-TyLSx0=) Peter, **I can’t thank you enough. ** I am humbled and thrilled to share that we have _exceeded_ our end-of-quarter fundraising goals! Our campaign truly would not be here without the support and generosity of people like you. I am endlessly grateful for all you have done – and all you will continue to do – for this grassroots campaign. If this quarterly fundraising deadline has shown me anything, it’s that this people-powered movement can accomplish anything we put our hearts and minds to – if we do it together. I have never been more confident in our ability to defeat Republican extremist Madison Gesiotto Gilbert and deliver real leadership for Northeast Ohio this November. Thank you again for all you do, Peter. I hope you have a joyful and safe Fourth of July holiday weekend! – _Emilia_
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

name: Josh Riley
subject: Thank you for everything, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
This email is brief, but it’s really important. I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done for our campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47313998/353833324/1712918886?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220702-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFjNzQ1NC0xM2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2WeSF4y2h8nGxX3ZOozZfWxl22ptpg741-2fORQzM=)
---
| Peter,

This email is brief, but it’s really important. **I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done for our campaign.**

Because of grassroots supporters like you, we not only met but actually surpassed our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!

This team has been through a lot in the past few months, especially with redistricting. But because of our resolve and commitment to a better Upstate New York, we’ve met these challenges.

Now it’s time for our next steps. We have a lot of work to do before Election Day, and we’re putting in the effort every day to build the broad coalition that will win this race.

Peter, with you on our team, I know that we will get the job done. We will put the voices of working families across Upstate New York front and center at the table in Congress.

So again, thank you for all that you do. I am excited for the road ahead, and I’m so thankful that you’re a part of it.

With gratitude & high hopes,

Josh Riley
---

name: Andy Beshear
subject: I want to simply say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter,

I'm reaching out today because I wanted to share my gratitude with all of you. Over the last few days, this grassroots team stepped up in a huge way as we worked to reach our June end-of-month fundraising goal.

Thanks to folks like Roger from Burlington, Jessica from Louisville, Marianna from Frankfort, and George from Owensboro chipping in whatever they could afford, I'm excited to share that we reached our fundraising goal.

Whether you've donated, talked to your friends or family about this re-election campaign, or opened emails like this – thank you. I'm honored to have your support as we work to build a Kentucky where all can live and thrive.

I know we still have a tough road ahead of us during this re-election campaign, but I'm confident that if we continue working together, we can protect the progress we're making for Kentuckians.

Thank you,

Andy

Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?

DONATE >>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q3-2022

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States

| Peter, We get it — lately our team has been sending you a lot of emails. And to be honest, since we’re approaching our **last public fundraising deadline for this campaign on July 3rd**... we’re going to be sending a lot more. That’s because this is the most important deadline we will face — the FINAL one before Primary Election Day. This filing report will go public in just a few days, and everyone will know exactly how much support we have ahead of the primary. **But here’s the thing — if you can pitch in any amount over $5 right now, we won’t send you another email until after the deadline passes.**

name: Val Demings
subject: my story of perseverance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This may be my toughest challenge yet
| | |
---
Friend: Each and every day it is not lost on me that I'm in what will undoubtedly be the most expensive 2022 race for the U.S. Senate – a race that can decide the Senate majority and will be anything but easy.
But I know a thing or two about persevering, and _winning_ , even if the odds are stacked against me.
I've overcome plenty of adversity in my life, friend. **There is nothing easy about growing up as a poor Black girl in the segregated South.** But my family's faith, and faith in opportunity, taught me perseverance. It was my family, particularly my mother's words of "never tire of doing good, Val," that pushed me to where I am.
I carry the spirit of her words with me even today – as I reflect about my career of service to Floridians and my path to being a candidate for U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47316232/353842734/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3672-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JjYzVhOC0xN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4M26Ox_N2Kpj1CLcIFgAFYAhkGR2qjmLdn14Kvu-RMU=)
**There was nothing easy about being a first-generation college graduate** – nor was it easy working my way up the ranks of the Orlando Police Department. For 27 years, I served when it wasn't exactly ordinary to see a woman on the force, let alone a Black woman. But I never tired, and eventually, I became the first woman to lead my department as chief of police.
And friend, I know firsthand there's nothing easy about winning elections in Florida. My first run for Congress was one of my toughest fights – but even in defeat I never tired, because I knew I could do good for my community. And it certainly wasn't easy to hold a lawless president – a habitual offender – to account. But I served as an impeachment manager, prosecuting Donald Trump in the Senate, because no one should be above the law.
My road to this moment was not easy. But I'm not sure that there’s anywhere except America where a little Black girl – the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the '60s South – could have a story so filled with opportunities like these. And I am determined to meet this moment, to win, to never tire of doing good, so that anyone can have a story of opportunity.
This may be my toughest challenge yet, which is why I'm urging you – every last person reading this email – to chip in whatever they can to ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida: [**Please, will you give $5 or more to help me flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar you give increases our ability to compete and win this tough battleground race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47316233/353842735/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3672-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JjYzVhOC0xN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4M26Ox_N2Kpj1CLcIFgAFYAhkGR2qjmLdn14Kvu-RMU=)
With so much gratitude for all you do,

–Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47316234/353842736/1417698435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JjYzVhOC0xN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4M26Ox_N2Kpj1CLcIFgAFYAhkGR2qjmLdn14Kvu-RMU=&emci=2c7cad90-f0f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=acbcc5a8-17fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider [making a donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47316239/353842741/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk3672-fr-nd&refcode=jtk3672-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JjYzVhOC0xN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4M26Ox_N2Kpj1CLcIFgAFYAhkGR2qjmLdn14Kvu-RMU=). You can also click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47316240/353842742/-144803992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JjYzVhOC0xN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4M26Ox_N2Kpj1CLcIFgAFYAhkGR2qjmLdn14Kvu-RMU=&emci=2c7cad90-f0f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=acbcc5a8-17fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hmC0qfqgmEqyHNrEYyYQgg2?unsubscribedata=l%2F99nW4WpEycs3MoVUuH9Gc%2F5ePrx06PDxtLiMZYGIDMf7nqtRBmSaP%2BrAuxH%2FIq30VHuH1skH0JGiI1Cbev14idPZmPTrZ35jIXCP%2FSOARPiu%2F7mUSG%2FKyTMtzMziGAgwWkPrWElzc8zUQNE9OBX%2BiXaUvnfk4kX4waNeBQHBsCNfaewGGJPOEoDJ1%2FKliuRdB6vd2jJKbSaxLZ%2B8qt1co3ezsNMSDg6dvygiBy7OYZnsF%2BIEeEFj7lH2JqTyGuZHWhNa8hpjEBqgcAm%2BX5%2FENX4pNy1LuTZDPENypfMPBKOnPYlfW0F%2FwSFYVHXTcQM0l5hKxl9dY6E75axIB6%2BN1Q2Q76m8mOxixO%2B8vTgZApgkp4gN1JK9Zt2KSJbq8991ttkKXXNavdPcp7MIl%2B8ZnwAETEly1NLfNZsS6fkfGTW5P5G2qaRUM2T84Jhm1j).
