name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors...
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os3ijq1hN_)
Dear Friend,
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.**
**And now, he 's been charged with nine bogus felonies.**
**[Which is why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418058:s3ijq1hN_:m:1:2532013465:EAEE09AEE180CD4ECEC89F7DFCF25295:r)**
You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...
_**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_
I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.
That's the bad news.
But here's the good news... David is fighting back.
In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits.
That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views.
Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood.
In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack.
The timing couldn't be more important.
This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities.
**[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418058:s3ijq1hN_:m:1:2532013465:EAEE09AEE180CD4ECEC89F7DFCF25295:r)**
The reality is. . .
You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."
You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit.
You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.
And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.
But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.
**[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418058:s3ijq1hN_:m:1:2532013465:EAEE09AEE180CD4ECEC89F7DFCF25295:r)**
My name is Tom Brejcha.
I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense.
The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more.
Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.**
I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.
But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage.
Now I'll get right down to it...
**We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.**
In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood's nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We're fighting back, but we'll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today.
**[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418058:s3ijq1hN_:m:1:2532013465:EAEE09AEE180CD4ECEC89F7DFCF25295:r)**
I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more...
... I will only say that time is of the essence.
So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.
**This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."**
It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished.
By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding.
It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.
They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen.
**[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418058:s3ijq1hN_:m:1:2532013465:EAEE09AEE180CD4ECEC89F7DFCF25295:r)**
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him.
I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden?
**[David is a pro-life hero. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors... Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts. And now, he 's been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood's nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We're fighting back, but we'll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze89iv0hbpdlkvlnauvtk0076k3uv0a7mej1bmbg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqbcdplm4rm2pr4etgeaob6c5hr5dlgcsrr7ctieiq7eolie6ob1d1kejgm6o3gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6pj32sllm9jr5cb661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clhmepr1c9i6coh5u)

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztmktil6jvma7us7kivkgeukld3kvn0hddjlbfc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2oj4cph2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm09qjkmfc1u4eik5v2j4f1adbll4uub7907u8k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2oj4cph2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

name: Dale Sutherland, Code 3
subject: Sign the Note of Support for our officers in need
body:
I don’t want to downplay anyone else’s job...but I’d argue law enforcement officers have one of the toughest jobs in Ameri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk0a77ut65h4pm47un0hvokp4fnpdbuupv8n33co_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr0t9iegr62or0marbed9ie4r79c35ecrbas5gcdrm3d766lqb6t1ic8p63d5gsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666obbd9ge9q6cc5n6mr3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clhmepr1chgmcoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zravfd0um7l965isvvjiobe27sfnbhchdsejaev0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
Friend I think you and I would agree on this... **It’s hard to be a cop these days. ** I don’t want to downplay anyone else’s job...but I’d argue law enforcement officers have one of the _toughest jobs in America_ right now. Whether it’s anti-cop activists, prosecutors or politicians...Hardened criminals who’ve been emboldened by anti-cop sentiment...or the small fraction of bad cops that give the vast majority of good cops a bad rap... It makes an already tough job even tougher... _And that_ ’ _s not to mention if you do your job honorably and are permanently injured – or worse – in the line of duty,**that you and your family may not even have the benefits to take care of your medical needs and basic essentials.**_ That’s why I’m writing you today... [**Because if you** ’**re someone who says they** “**Back the Blue” and believes it** ’**s more than just a slogan, I hope you** ’**ll sign a NOTE OF SUPPORT to thank the injured law enforcement officers my nonprofit organization – Code 3 – helps with life after service. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zemb1bb2mhjh4rbblhuel9n74k4oucc4fqm1db3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vd165thaecmto4sjgqvonn019593rqjnlgcq30_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
Allow me to introduce myself... My name is **Dale Sutherland**. For 28 years of my life, I proudly served as a police officer and detective in the Washington, D.C. area. I’ve been a uniform on patrol. I’ve been undercover. I’ve busted drug dealers and ruthless killers. So, I can tell you from experience unless someone’s walked a mile in a police officer’s shoes, they have no idea what it’s like... The split-second decisions that mean life or death...the impossible choices that will forever change people’s lives...the chance you may be punished for your actions – even if you did everything by the book... Only a special few will really know the **_burden of the job._** But I know the brave men and women who wear the badge do it anyways – because they were called to protect and serve... To help their communities, their neighbors and their families – and above all - to keep them safe. But while every officer prays they have a long, peaceful and uneventful career... **_It can all change in an instant - without warning._** It’s something I learned the hard way... In one instance, I was trying to bust a gang of homicidal drug dealers. Through an informant, I began undercover work to infiltrate this gang and build a case for arrests. One night, I was running late for an exchange. In my absence, the informant approached a car with the dealers inside, only to be shot and killed. As a man of faith, I spoke a lot about the Lord to this informant. I hope it was enough, because his loss still weighs on me to this day. The reality is it could have been me who was killed that day. I was lucky to finish my career as a law enforcement officer relatively unscathed when I retired. But not all officers are so lucky... Some tragically lose their lives in the line of duty. Many others are permanently injured from the wounds they receive. **Worse yet, many permanently injured officers suffer a brutal betrayal when the very system that promised to look after them refuses to cover their basic medical, quality-of-life and financial needs. ** _It’s a sad state of affairs when our country doesn’t do enough to help our injured or fallen heroes..._ But believe it or not, it happens. And while the system needs to change, I simply can’t wait around for it – because there are hundreds of injured law enforcement officers around the country who need our help today. That’s why I founded Code 3 and our Injured Officer Initiative - an effort to support permanently injured law enforcement officers with a higher standard of care... [**So if you can please take a few moments to write a brief NOTE OF SUPPORT to these brave heroes, I** ’**d greatly appreciate it. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z47hsg3cvc9ce3hcllbo60of1qrl6dfdj6hkcnko_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn5vof2s9b328patnv2mm8aaa8a7e4gejl1isp7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
With the support of good folks like you, we’ve been able to help several officers with the hardships they face after their service. Officers like former Detective Lani Pinkney, who served with the Washington D.C. Metropolitan Police... In 1995, Detective Pinkney was shot in the line of a duty, leaving her paralyzed for life. She was pregnant with her third child at the time, who miraculously survived. She was unable to return to work, and in the over 20 years that followed, it’s been a struggle for her to make ends meet, let alone have her medical needs taken care of. **_Once, a simple request to have a broken wheel on her wheelchair was denied – which eventually led to Lani falling out of the chair and shattering her femur. _** Another officer, Lt. Will Rogers – a sheriffs’ deputy in Berkeley County, South Carolina – had a similar story when he was ambushed in 2015. Lt. Rogers was shot multiple times in the arm and head, and then ran over by a car outside of a gas station while on duty. Following this incident, he was forced to retire. He undergoes physical therapy every day and suffers from seizures and migraines. _Yet, he received no help from his department. He lost all medical benefits. And he even had a Social Security Disability application denied!_ **Friend does this sound like the way our injured officers – _these heroes who put their lives on the lines to keep our communities safe_ – should have to live? ** I don’t think so. That’s why Code 3 stepped in to help both of these heroic officers when the system failed them... For Detective Pinkney, that meant a financial hardship grant to help her make ends meet... For Lt. Rogers, that meant helping cover the cost of in-home health care assistance... And there are many more just like them who desperately need help... **_But it_ ’ _s only possible with good people like you who_ ’ _ll step up to the plate for these heroes when our system won_ ’ _t._** However, I’m not asking you to make a gift right now. What I am asking for is for you to simply write a brief note to officers to let them know how grateful you are for their sacrifice in the line of duty... [**Will you please consider writing a brief NOTE OF SUPPORT to the permanently injured law enforcement officers Code 3 helps?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z56cm4c1f7sed37523nqqnbk092q37nlael4pgk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj50gu1e603f130qougu6mtd0c958fmmkldo7g0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)
---
If you feel compelled to support Code 3 in our mission to help these officers, I left a link at the bottom where you can make a tax-deductible gift. And if you do so, I want you to know that you’ll be making a huge difference in easing the pain and stress that these officers have faced every day since their injuries... What’s more, you’ll be giving their families some much-needed peace of mind... But at the very least, if you believe we should “Back the Blue,” then I hope you’ll sign your note today to let these brave heroes know you have their backs. I know they’ll appreciate hearing from good folks like you. **God Bless, **
---
**Dale Sutherland** **President & Founder** **Code 3**
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zegcr109rt66l14v1e45hc6a5n2or9uua5dk00po_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjm2p31cph2bs)

It’s hard to be a cop these days. I don’t want to downplay anyone else’s job...but I’d argue law enforcement officers have one of the toughest jobs in America right now. Whether it’s anti-cop activists, prosecutors or politicians...Hardened criminals who’ve been emboldened by anti-cop sentiment...or the small fraction of bad cops that give the vast majority of good cops a bad rap... It makes an already tough job even tougher... And that ’ s not to mention if you do your job honorably and are permanently injured – or worse – in the line of duty,that you and your family may not even have the benefits to take care of your medical needs and basic essentials. That’s why I’m writing you today... Allow me to introduce myself... My name is Dale Sutherland. For 28 years of my life, I proudly served as a police officer and detective in the Washington, D.C. area. I’ve been a uniform on patrol. I’ve been undercover. I’ve busted drug dealers and ruthless killers. So, I can tell you from experience unless someone’s walked a mile in a police officer’s shoes, they have no idea what it’s like... The split-second decisions that mean life or death...the impossible choices that will forever change people’s lives...the chance you may be punished for your actions – even if you did everything by the book... Only a special few will really know the burden of the job. But I know the brave men and women who wear the badge do it anyways – because they were called to protect and serve... To help their communities, their neighbors and their families – and above all - to keep them safe. But while every officer prays they have a long, peaceful and uneventful career... name: Vedat Gashi
subject: WEEKLY Campaign Update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gashi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends & Supporters:

Our weekly email was delayed this week as we sent a bevy of emails towards our FEC fundraising deadlines. Thank you all for sticking with me through all those emails and for never letting me down. Again, we surpassed our fundraising goals. I'm humbled by the tremendous grassroots support that we have received - without it our historic campaign would not possible; with that support we cannot be beat. Thank you again, sincerely.

Last week was a difficult one for our nation. The Supreme Court rulings limited a state's ability to regulate gun safety, but expanded a state's ability to regulate a persons' access to safe and legal abortion. I addressed numerous protests, including those in White Plains & Hastings-on-Hudson;

but we also met the moment by passing a clinic access bill at the County Legislature that affirmed and protected access to abortion clinics free from harassment or intimidation.

As difficult as the week was, it reminded me why I am running for Congress. **W****e cannot take our rights for granted, we must fight back and I 'm here to do it. **

We also enjoyed participating in the African American Heritage Festival and Dobbs Ferry's Pride Festival.

We've also continued campaigning as hard as ever - sending mail, beginning digital advertising, knocking on doors, phone calls and text messages and also hosting meet & greets throughout the district.

Oh yeah, and we voted! Congratulations to **Governor Kathy Hochul** , **Lieutenant Governor Antonio Delgado** and my friend **Legislator** **MaryJane Shimsky** on their hard fought victories.

**I wish you all a happy, healthy and safe Independence Day!** Rest up and celebrate responsibly so that you'll all be ready to continue spreading our vision to voters.

Sincerely,

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cIQbfZcwA4_e-M23oaERKUbz9RtResk5O6JnxW_j57o=/o6Visoq6FG1uA2Ou5wZUAmShXjlHKqlXpJ0Fq0JYfuM=)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cIQbfZcwA4_e-M23oaERKUbz9RtResk5O6JnxW_j57o=/5xzYm_Lv8gUIkY4tO_VDV10AatVq6skUMOQB_C-Diy8=)

Paid for by Gashi for Congress

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Thank you, team

body:

Team, I needed to reach out personally to say thank you. With your support, we reached our end-of-quarter goal before our FEC deadline on Thursday night! In a race as competitive and important as this one, _every dollar counts._ I’m constantly humbled by the outpouring of grassroots support from people like you, and I believe with my whole heart that through this people-powered movement, we will unseat extremist Yvette Herrell and give NM-02 a true representative in Congress this November. But it’s going to be an uphill battle. Herrell is an incumbent with a war chest, conservative Super PACs, and Donald Trump at her disposal. The attacks against us have already started. Over these next four months, we’re going to have to give it everything we’ve got to reach voters across this district and build an even bigger coalition of support. If we’re going to defend the House majority and our basic human rights, we absolutely need to flip this toss-up seat from red to blue. It’s a lot of work, but with you by my side, I know we will prevail. Si se puede, and thanks again for helping us close last quarter on a strong note! — Gabe **PS: Want to help sustain this campaign over the next four months to Election Day?[Sign up to become a monthly donor today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47317706/353848167/-1370483914?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220702thankyou_gv_od30_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjMzMDNiNy0xYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfP8_HSjj27-L_Q6JzPmRrALv2V0S_SFgmedVLfVmXU=)** | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47317872/353848429/-203487409?refcode=em_msg_2022.07.02_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2ZhZmYyMi0xYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfVIl0hrzSEWj9mO1LeWSSWFhl3siBrS252scA7HBNE=) Hi Peter, I hope you’re enjoying the holiday weekend, but I couldn’t wait to reach out and share the news: **Thanks to the generosity of grassroots supporters like you, we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! ** Now that the general election is underway – and our opponent has been endorsed by Donald Trump himself – it is more important than ever that we meet our goals and send strong campaign finance reports to the FEC. I’m so proud of this people-powered team for showing everyone, including the dark money-backed MAGA Republicans who are trying to buy this seat, that our team is ready for the challenges that lie ahead. I hope you and your loved ones enjoy the 4th of July festivities. I’ll be busy serving pancakes at the firefighter pancake breakfast in Ely, celebrating with local community members at Independence Day parades, and spending time with my family. Thanks again and Happy Fourth of July! Liz

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: These photos mean so much to Maggie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
As a child, her father would ask Maggie and her siblings, "What are you doing for freedom today?"
| | |
---
Team, Maggie wanted to share some photos with you that mean a lot to her.
When Maggie was a child, her father would ask her and her siblings, "What are you doing for freedom today?" As the daughter of a World War II veteran and a pro-choice activist, Maggie's parents really instilled in her the need to fight for what is right.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47318511/353850447/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1213-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmE3MzU4Yi0xY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXXGG4T4wdD_dQg1gZGh292_03BRF2qtcxzZHxKFDwE=)
In college, Maggie thought she'd follow in the footsteps of her grandfather and pursue medicine. But over the course of her college career, between playing rugby, rowing crew, and meeting the love of her life, Tom, she found herself pulled in another direction – toward public service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47318512/353850448/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1213-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmE3MzU4Yi0xY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXXGG4T4wdD_dQg1gZGh292_03BRF2qtcxzZHxKFDwE=)
Maggie is fortunate enough to have two beautiful children of her own, Ben and Meg. And as she watched her community fully embrace her son Ben, who was born with serious disabilities, she became an advocate for families like hers – to ensure that every child is given the opportunity to succeed.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47318513/353850449/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1213-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmE3MzU4Yi0xY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXXGG4T4wdD_dQg1gZGh292_03BRF2qtcxzZHxKFDwE=)
Ever since Maggie was a child, she's committed her life to making a difference. From fighting to lower prescription drug costs to casting the vote to save the Affordable Care Act, Maggie's proudly represented the people of New Hampshire.

And the good news? She's ready to keep this fight going, but she needs your help.

**As one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection, we're asking you urgently:[_Will you rush a gift of $3 to reelect Senator Hassan?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47318514/353850450/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1213-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmE3MzU4Yi0xY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXXGG4T4wdD_dQg1gZGh292_03BRF2qtcxzZHxKFDwE=)**

clean_body: As a child, her father would ask Maggie and her siblings, "What are you doing for freedom today?" | | | Team, Maggie wanted to share some photos with you that mean a lot to her. When Maggie was a child, her father would ask her and her siblings, "What are you doing for freedom today?" As the daughter of a World War II veteran and a pro-choice activist, Maggie's parents really instilled in her the need to fight for what is right. = In college, Maggie thought she'd follow in the footsteps of her grandfather and pursue medicine. But over the course of her college career, between playing rugby, rowing crew, and meeting the love of her life, Tom, she found herself pulled in another direction – toward public service. = Maggie is fortunate enough to have two beautiful children of her own, Ben and Meg. And as she watched her community fully embrace her son Ben, who was born with serious disabilities, she became an advocate for families like hers – to ensure that every child is given the opportunity to succeed. = Ever since Maggie was a child, she's committed her life to making a difference. From fighting to lower prescription drug costs to casting the vote to save the Affordable Care Act, Maggie's proudly represented the people of New Hampshire. And the good news? She's ready to keep this fight going, but she needs your help. body:

Thank you to everyone for your generous financial support during our end-of-quarter fundraising blitz!

Right now, we're using these financial resources to blanket Southwest Washington with TV, radio and social media ads.

There are 30 days until election day ...

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47320337/353853057/-672595502?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzhjMzEwOC0yMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u8YvkjW4Yvac-kE-9WwOh54RRSCtY-AdYuIiEB3Hwu8=)

Team, I’m simply amazed.

Thanks to so many concerned voters stepping up, **we blew past our $10,000 grassroots fundraising goal for June!**

That’s the power of grassroots movements that I so adamantly believe in, and I truly can’t thank you all enough for the parts you’ve played thus far in our efforts to deliver strong leadership to our upstate New York community. [**(If you didn’t have the chance to give, or you’d like to kickstart our momentum for the first month of this new quarter, click here!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47320338/353853058/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MCFC_20220702_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzhjMzEwOC0yMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u8YvkjW4Yvac-kE-9WwOh54RRSCtY-AdYuIiEB3Hwu8=) | [CHIP IN $3 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47320339/353853059/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MCFC_20220702_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzhjMzEwOC0yMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u8YvkjW4Yvac-kE-9WwOh54RRSCtY-AdYuIiEB3Hwu8=)

I’m incredibly honored by your immense generosity, and I could talk nonstop about how important it is. But for the sake of time, I wanted to give a few more short thank yous:
_To Robert from Riva, MD:**THANK YOU for your $50 contribution.**_
_To Tandy from Nashville, TN:**THANK YOU for your $25 contribution.**_
_To Louis from Kansas City, MO:**THANK YOU for your $25 contribution.**_
Our movement is people-powered, and we truly couldn’t do this without gracious grassroots Democrats like you who consistently step up.

So to Robert, Tandy, Louis, and the hundreds of amazing members of this team: **THANK YOU!**

Together, through grassroots strength, we’re going to overcome Stefanik’s ultra-MAGA blood money and finally retire this traitorous MAGA Republican.
[**We must start July off strong. | | Hi there! As you might imagine, the last few weeks have been a whirlwind for our family — especially for Patty. **That’s why I’m excited that Patty and I get to start this month off with a special celebration: Our 40th wedding anniversary! ❤️** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47320454/353853414/652872050?refcode=em_220702_fromloel&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220702_fromloel&refcode2=d18c3108-20fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMThjMzEwOC0yMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcDqwTHeBmBwRgh_J0b0RkknQurP2X6tNdYXA0luc80=&emci=f7c3b141-4bf9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=d18c3108-20fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)** Patty is the love of my life, an amazing mother to our children, and the strongest woman I know. Tomorrow, I want to make sure she’s surrounded with love, light, and warm wishes from her favorite people — **which is why I need your help.** Patty loves this team so much, and it would make her day if you signed this surprise card to help us celebrate our 40th anniversary! **[Will you add your name to our card before tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47320455/353853417/652872050?refcode=em_220702_fromloel&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220702_fromloel&refcode2=d18c3108-20fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMThjMzEwOC0yMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcDqwTHeBmBwRgh_J0b0RkknQurP2X6tNdYXA0luc80=&emci=f7c3b141-4bf9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=d18c3108-20fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47320456/353853418/652872050?refcode=em_220702_fromloel&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220702_fromloel&refcode2=d18c3108-20fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMThjMzEwOC0yMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcDqwTHeBmBwRgh_J0b0RkknQurP2X6tNdYXA0luc80=&emci=f7c3b141-4bf9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=d18c3108-20fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091) After all the hard work Patty has put into her campaign over the last few months, I’m excited we’ll have a family day to celebrate. **[Patty and I are going to do our best to stay offline, but I know clean_body: It would make Patty’s day if you signed this surprise card to help us celebrate our 40th anniversary! | = | | Hi there! As you might imagine, the last few weeks have been a whirlwind for our family — especially for Patty. That’s why I’m excited that Patty and I get to start this month off with a special celebration: Our 40th wedding anniversary! ❤️ Patty is the love of my life, an amazing mother to our children, and the strongest woman I know. Tomorrow, I want to make sure she’s surrounded with love, light, and warm wishes from her favorite people — which is why I need your help. Patty loves this team so much, and it would make her day if you signed this surprise card to help us celebrate our 40th anniversary! After all the hard work Patty has put into her campaign over the last few months, I’m excited we’ll have a family day to celebrate. = | = = Thank you for helping us celebrate, friend! And thank you for loving Patty (almost!) as fiercely as I do. All my best, Loel | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. name: Tom Pyle, AEA
subject: Sign this petition to end Biden’s war on oil
body:
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63269%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3PZ4aopmE5l90sxNE2pRpw&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
Within his first week in office, President Biden signed an executive order temporarily suspending new oil and gas leases on federal lands -- _Now they’ve taken anti-oil to the next level._
Biden’s Interior Department just **_canceled_** a ONE MILLION ACRE OIL LEASE SALE**** in Alaska, along with TWO MORE OIL LEASE SALES in the Gulf of Mexico as Americans face painfully high prices at the pump.
**America is experiencing the highest gas prices ever in history. Gas prices have soared by 50% nationwide over the past year. The American Energy Alliance (AEA) has drafted a petition in response to this attack on American energy prices.**
[**Please Sign our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition:**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63260%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SnIXApecZDZeM9o5pN8uwg&sysid=1)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63261%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NwTjxtZ%2bH9vvF%2benE%2b%2f99Q&sysid=1)
---
Average gas prices in the U.S. have reached new record-highs thanks to policies enacted by the Biden administration. The national average price of regular gasoline hit a new record of $4.60 on Thursday.
Former Trump EPA advisor Steve Milloy said: _"I blame Biden for all lack of production ...**They will find any excuse to not drill**.”_
**The price you are paying at the pump is a direct result of restrictions placed on energy producers. Not allowing them to produce enough energy needed to keep our economy moving has resulted in this skyrocketing of prices for all consumers.**
Together, we must send an urgent message to the Biden administration, letting them know we will not stand for this any longer. That is why AEA has drafted this petition to end the gas price crisis.
**_AEA is on the frontlines fighting everyday for an abundant, reliable and affordable energy future._**_We are asking for your support now to help bring gas prices down_** _ -- Please sign the UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY petition today._**
[**Tell****Joe Biden how we, the American people, feel about his administration’s direct assault on energy prices by signing our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63262%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YWsyACZJ%2feHMjJ%2b1GV04jA&sysid=1)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63261%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NwTjxtZ%2bH9vvF%2benE%2b%2f99Q&sysid=1)
---
With your support, we will keep fighting against the politicians and special interests intent on implementing a never-ending list of federal fees, taxes, and barriers to entry that will lead to further continuation of record-high fuel prices.
**[Please sign the petition now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63263%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xtCAfZOq2MK76aqONGT3hA&sysid=1)**
Thank You,
Tom Pyle
President American Energy Alliance
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63261%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NwTjxtZ%2bH9vvF%2benE%2b%2f99Q&sysid=1)

name: American Action News
subject: Their rise and fall
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zecq0j8qv1dugdkv98mq4c97f71httrbdode12eo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjmeor4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3dlicqqb9ojmmhij9oj3mdr6ct3j6mqb2obh6op6asrn69r30t34maqbcdb363jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1ddl61p7ephh6ipm8dtgmlin49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcb8tbk7c8tmg23qf171qjhakj2c10ukletp1ho_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjmeor4clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcce7bt2r4fuipelqhg69p2c5u4m6efbmp5ardo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjmeor4clh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdbtqi1daik0f3shm8i5vqm0jopm14q50t7vnei8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjmeor4clh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2l391s2i9ajgmnu0b2p7a0lrcqvscgsp5d6e0vo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctjmeor4clh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. clean_body: We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. | | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.” when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. | | | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,” along with the companion map today: Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! That brings us to today. Not only are Republicans such as Governor Ron DeSantis clinging to their rigged maps, but they are continuing to spread Trump's Big Lie, suppressing the vote, and even waging attacks on election officials and processes!

So our strategy is shifting in response. To quote President Obama, **“The fight for fair maps is part of the fight to protect our democracy.”** That's why we're now fighting both the threat of Republican gerrymandering and the anti-democracy forces trying to take hold in the states. _And when we say this election could be our last chance to win,**we're not exaggerating**._

We need you with us. If you're able, **will you rush a donation today to support our democracy-saving work?**

body:
There is a lot to be worried about right now

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47322093/353856741/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzU2ODAyOS0yMWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kojX12SLgrRjZKFuTLZFGC8jqPbM_jB6ubYEFd7Ss10=)

Peter — Thank you!!

I'll be honest, we came up a little short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. But even though we missed our goal, I’m still so grateful for all your support -- whether you donated, signed petitions, read my emails or have supported me in any other way -- I truly appreciate it.

Although there is a lot to be worried about right now -- MAGA challengers, losing our House majority, the future of _Roe v. Wade_ , and more -- **I am optimistic that with you on my side, we will persevere and continue to build a stronger, more equitable California and nation.**

But Peter, we have a lot of work to do and July will be a very busy month.

If we want to take on Trump and the rest of the MAGA party, we need to hit our fundraising goals. And because we missed last quarter’s goal, we have our work cut out for us.

[**So Peter, if you’re able and you haven’t already -- or want to chip in again -- can I count on you to chip in $3 to jump into July with a running start? clean_body: There is a lot to be worried about right now | = Peter — Thank you!! I'll be honest, we came up a little short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. But even though we missed our goal, I’m still so grateful for all your support -- whether you donated, signed petitions, read my emails or have supported me in any other way -- I truly appreciate it. Although there is a lot to be worried about right now -- MAGA challengers, losing our House majority, the future of Roe v. Wade , and more -- I am optimistic that with you on my side, we will persevere and continue to build a stronger, more equitable California and nation. But Peter, we have a lot of work to do and July will be a very busy month. If we want to take on Trump and the rest of the MAGA party, we need to hit our fundraising goals. And because we missed last quarter’s goal, we have our work cut out for us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Again, thank you so much for everything you do. Mark Takano Congressman, CA-41 | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. subject: We’re not giving up. We’re not going back.

I need you right now.
| Friend, If you’re like me, you’re angry. You’re heartbroken. **And you’re FED UP.** I’m DONE with right-wing extremist men telling me what decisions I can make about my body. What decisions my DAUGHTER can make about hers. I’m DONE with politicians who care more about staying on the NRA’s good side than about the lives of everyday Texans in grocery stores, in churches, or in schools. I’m DONE with one justice system for the rich and powerful and another for everyone else. I’m DONE with business as usual in Texas — and I’m ready to fight for change. Friend, I’m glad to have you on my team and I’m grateful for your support so far. But if you know that **we’re in the fight of our lives RIGHT NOW** , I need you to commit to a recurring donation to see me through this competitive general election and DEFEAT Ken Paxton in November. **_[Click here to donate $10 a month through November’s election, or choose another amount that’s right for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47325361/353859917/1484719371?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.32dc663b-24fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.32dc663b-24fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRjNjYzYi0yNGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3p0K8OVx0w3cRH7p3qSVCMXZ-lehnTF67PqolbMgUM=)_** ****[Donate $10 Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47325363/353859918/1484719371?amount=10&recurring=true&refcode=ea.32dc663b-24fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.32dc663b-24fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRjNjYzYi0yNGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3p0K8OVx0w3cRH7p3qSVCMXZ-lehnTF67PqolbMgUM=)**** ****[Pledge Another Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47325364/353859919/1484719371?recurring=true&refcode=ea.32dc663b-24fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.32dc663b-24fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRjNjYzYi0yNGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3p0K8OVx0w3cRH7p3qSVCMXZ-lehnTF67PqolbMgUM=)**** She se puede! name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Pelosi is pulling out all the stops to ensure I lose 😠
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
Doesn't it?

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60711686:6YbTSOorN:m:1:3299561967:33505A8C0E432F2E87DE8D1BA6BD19C6:r)

This is Navy SEAL Morgan Luttrell and I'm in the race for Congress in TX-08.

Truly, I'm not much different than you.

I'm a Pro-Trump, Conservative small business owner from rural Texas.

I get asked a lot: why would you ever want to run for Congress? Why would you put yourself through that?

My answer will always be because TX-08 is my home. I'm a 5th-generation Texan and I have family in _**every county**_ in the district.

I've been at this for a few months and I won't lie to you - **the race has been tough.**

Pelosi wants nothing more than to defeat me and my fellow SEALs. She knows that once we're in Congress, she's done.

Pelosi is pulling out all the stops and throwing everything she's got at my race to **ensure I lose.**

[**So, I 'm humbly asking for your support to help me in this fight for the privilege of serving my home and Freedom-loving patriots.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60711686:6YbTSOorN:m:1:3299561967:33505A8C0E432F2E87DE8D1BA6BD19C6:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60711686:6YbTSOorN:m:1:3299561967:33505A8C0E432F2E87DE8D1BA6BD19C6:r)[**SEND A SEAL TO CONGRESS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60711686:6YbTSOorN:m:1:3299561967:33505A8C0E432F2E87DE8D1BA6BD19C6:r) **
Thank you,**
Morgan | Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell

clean_body: Doesn't it? This is Navy SEAL Morgan Luttrell and I'm in the race for Congress in TX-08. Truly, I'm not much different than you. I'm a Pro-Trump, Conservative small business owner from rural Texas. I get asked a lot: why would you ever want to run for Congress? Why would you put yourself through that? My answer will always be because TX-08 is my home. I'm a 5th-generation Texan and I have family in every county in the district. I've been at this for a few months and I won't lie to you - the race has been tough. Pelosi wants nothing more than to defeat me and my fellow SEALs. She knows that once we're in Congress, she's done. Pelosi is pulling out all the stops and throwing everything she's got at my race to ensure I lose. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Deep State Vs Democracy – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/deepstatedemocracy?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The Deep State. The administrative state. The federal ****bureaucracy:** Call it what you will, there is no denying that America today has a sprawling system of government that was never envisaged by the Founders.

Nowhere in the Constitution does is say that there should be an Environmental Protection Agency, nor a Department of Education, nor an FAA, ATF, HUD, NRC – nor any of the rest of that alphabet soup of bureaucracy.

**The great news is that on Thursday, the Supreme Court finally did something about it. **Ruling in _West Virginia Vs the Environmental Protection Agency_ , the Court decided that the EPA simply did not have a mandate in law to be imposing policy decisions regarding energy production on states.
---
|
---
Should Clarence Thomas be added to Mount Rushmore?
| **For decades, sloppy Congress has passed poorly drafted legislation granting vague powers to federal agencies.** These agencies have then issued streams of regulation, which courts have interpreted as having the force of law.

But how do you vote out the OSHA or the FDA? Or all the other unaccountable acronyms drowning out American democracy?

**The growth of federal agencies, and their ability to determine public policy with little reference to the public, has left America at the mercy of activist bureaucrats. **

Thursday’s ruling call a halt to this. The Supreme Court may have even established a precedent to reverse the expansive bureaucracy that has grown up since the New Deal.

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=75cf654719&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| “But what about the climate!” some will say. “Following this ruling, how will we be able to impose climate reduction targets on every American state?”

It’s true that following Thursday’s ruling, activist bureaucrats in DC will no longer be able to impose on conservative states the energy policy stupidity that progressive states enjoy.

**If anyone really believes that we should emulate Europe or California and attempt to defy the laws of physics by generating all of our energy needs from non-nuclear renewables, they are free to run for office on that agenda. **Best of luck.

Perhaps the net zero lobby deep down realizes that their case is not quite so strong after all?

---
| |
---
Following this ruling, do have a wonderful weekend!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| |
---
| | _ _

As I'm sure you know, June's FEC fundraising deadline marked one of the most consequential moments our campaign has faced to date in the election year.

_**I 'm proud and grateful to report we did just that.**_

Because of committed supporters like you, we reached our fundraising goal and sent a resounding message to our extreme Republican opponent that we are putting in the work to win.

I hope you're as energized by the momentum we're building as I am.

With appreciation,
Abigail Spanberger

name: Max Steiner
subject: Dollars for Democracy
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326153/353861326/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=)
Friend,

We just finished fundraising for Quarter Two. I know I've been blasting your email boxes with asks - sorry. However, I was shocked to learn that the national Democratic Party is **[backing far-right](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326154/353861327/-1422922843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=&emci=64ceb734-95f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0bf51a21-28fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11663292)** , **[anti-democracy candidates](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326155/353861328/-1048696898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=&emci=64ceb734-95f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0bf51a21-28fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11663292)** in Republican primaries.

I am furious that the Democratic Party continues to operate in this "politics as usual" model as our democracy teeters on the edge.

I understand the intent: to tilt the playing field so that Democratic candidates have a "beatable" opponent in November. But the actual outcome is that more radical-right candidates make it onto the ballot and, statistically, more of these radical-right candidates will go to Washington. In 2016, the Democratic Party funneled money to Donald Trump in order to weaken Jeb Bush and Marco Rubio. What happened? Trump won, we faced a Constitutional crisis when he lost his bid for re-election in 2020, and Trump's Supreme Court just threw out women's rights to reproductive privacy.

**The Trump wing of the GOP poses an existential threat to our democracy. That is why I am running against an election denier. It is why I go to event after event and talk to people who have been taught to despise Democrats.**

A Democratic Party that would rather fund an insurrectionist than lose to a patriotic Republican is as morally corrupt as a Republican Party that would rather steal an election than admit defeat. GOP politicians like Liz Cheney, with whom I disagree on almost every issue, are not a threat to the survival of our democracy. And yet, the Democratic Party is doing its best to ensure that these pro-democracy Republicans are not on the ballot in November.

Spending donor money -- $42 million so far by the national Party -- in support of anti-democracy extremists is "playing with fire." It is also an insult to many of those donors, who trusted the Democratic Party to stand up for democracy. This money should be spent on issues and candidates that Democrats believe in. At the very least, it could be spent on outreach to rural, conservative voters in areas like CA-1.

I spend a lot of time fundraising so that I can reach these voters. It is exhausting and miserable. I have not received a dime from the national Democratic Party or any of the Pelosi-backed PACs that are funding these anti-democracy Republicans..

To everyone who has donated, or come to an event, or tried to convince a Republican-leaning friend to support me -- thank you.

To those of you who disagree with me on certain issues, and do not want to donate to my campaign. I understand. But please find a Democratic candidate you like better and donate directly to his/her campaign. Please do NOT donate to any fund controlled by the National Democratic Party until they disavow their support for anti-democratic GOP candidates. If you already have a recurring donation set for the National Party, please terminate it - and tell them why.

Donors should support democracy and not the national Democratic Party,

**[Here is a link to my campaign if you want to donate again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326156/353861329/-1683214623?refcode=em-7.1.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=)**

**[Here is a link to Kermit Jones' campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326157/353861330/-1116320513?refcode=steinerhelpsout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=)** Kermit is a military veteran who is more liberal and less gun-friendly than I am. He is running against Kevin Kiley in the I-80/Tahoe district to our southeast.

**[Here is a link to every Democratic Congressional candidate in California.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326158/353861331/1987434450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=)** Thanks, Max Steiner
Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326159/353861332/-1683214623?refcode=em-7.1.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY1MWEyMS0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwnKTPfPQXi164311MxJBrDR5eHrZ7XSAhDDHm_A_hI=)**
---

body:
I can see that you've chosen hope and action over despair -- and for that I am so grateful. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326347/353862393/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA3MzY2Yi0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhRlsNTup_FV64mCzLuA4ChWuIgy2yYo-klDlIzBEp0=&emci=af3d98b3-8af9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e907366b-28fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

You were fired up to make change in 2020, and you did it. You marched, you gave, and you voted, and I'll always be thankful for that.

It's more important than ever that we keep going.

Our razor-thin majority hasn't been enough to overcome Republican obstruction and the filibuster on some of the biggest issues facing us today. We need at least two extra votes in the Senate to do that.

As I look at the numbers from the last quarter, I can see that you've chosen hope and action over despair -- and for that I am so grateful.

You are building a sustainable source of support that will help win critical Democratic seats, expand our majority, and overcome Republican obstruction to defend your rights.

I'm confident that with your continued support and your willingness to take action at the ballot box and in the streets, we will win.

Thank you for being a part of our team,

Bob | [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47326348/353862394/-2022397799?refcode=em22_220702_eoqthx_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220702_eoqthx_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA3MzY2Yi0yOGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhRlsNTup_FV64mCzLuA4ChWuIgy2yYo-klDlIzBEp0=)

clean_body: I can see that you've chosen hope and action over despair -- and for that I am so grateful. Peter, You were fired up to make change in 2020, and you did it. You marched, you gave, and you voted, and I'll always be thankful for that. It's more important than ever that we keep going. Our razor-thin majority hasn't been enough to overcome Republican obstruction and the filibuster on some of the biggest issues facing us today. We need at least two extra votes in the Senate to do that. As I look at the numbers from the last quarter, I can see that you've chosen hope and action over despair -- and for that I am so grateful. You are building a sustainable source of support that will help win critical Democratic seats, expand our majority, and overcome Republican obstruction to defend your rights. I'm confident that with your continued support and your willingness to take action at the ballot box and in the streets, we will win. Thank you for being a part of our team, Bob | = P.S. In the months to come, we know that Republicans will spend record sums of money to take our nation backward. We need to be ready. = to keep building our Senate majority and fight for working families. PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Liz Walters
subject: We couldn’t do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Hey team,

I just want to take a moment to say – thank you.

This team has been pushing hard for the past week to meet our fundraising goals. We’ve asked a lot, but you really came through for us this month. Because of your generosity, we were able to reach our end-of-quarter goal.

Meeting every goal we set is crucial to Ohio Democrats’ success for the rest of the year. **But team, the fight is still not over.** Ohio Republicans are still pumping millions into their campaigns. Our team counts on your grassroots support to help elect leaders who will invest in the well-being of hardworking Ohioans.

When we flip Ohio blue in November – take back the governor’s office, flip Ohio’s Senate seat, and elect Dems up and down the ballot, it will be because of supporters like you.

Thank you again.

Liz Walters
Chair
Ohio Democratic Party

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open U.S. Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? | | Team, we did it! Thanks to so many of you who chipped in, our campaign was able to reach its end-of-quarter goal ahead of the deadline. Time and time again, we’ve seen pundits and forecasters underestimate the ability of our campaign to fundraise and organize across this district. I can’t overstate just how proud I am to have you by my side in this fight. And listen, if this grassroots team had the power to reach our biggest goal yet in just a few days – **I know we have what it takes to win this election.** The writing is on the wall for April Becker and her GOP special interests: this district isn’t interested in the far-right extremist policies she’s trying to sell. We have the power to keep this momentum through these next few months as we gear up for November. It won’t be easy but, when it’s down to keeping control of the House and fighting for what’s right, it sure as hell is worth it. _[**If you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in to our campaign so we’re able to keep the wind at our backs in the months ahead? clean_body: | = | | Team, we did it! Thanks to so many of you who chipped in, our campaign was able to reach its end-of-quarter goal ahead of the deadline. Time and time again, we’ve seen pundits and forecasters underestimate the ability of our campaign to fundraise and organize across this district. I can’t overstate just how proud I am to have you by my side in this fight. And listen, if this grassroots team had the power to reach our biggest goal yet in just a few days – I know we have what it takes to win this election. The writing is on the wall for April Becker and her GOP special interests: this district isn’t interested in the far-right extremist policies she’s trying to sell. We have the power to keep this momentum through these next few months as we gear up for November. It won’t be easy but, when it’s down to keeping control of the House and fighting for what’s right, it sure as hell is worth it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = From the bottom of my heart – thank you. Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . | | = Democrat Susie Lee is running for re-election in Nevada’s Third District, which Wall Street Journal has deemed our country’s most competitive House seat. While in Congress, she has led the charge to protect equal rights, fight for workers, and combat climate change. Now, Republicans have lined up four far-right candidates to run against Susie who have spent millions in this competitive race to unseat her. The GOP sees winning Susie’s district as key to re-taking control of the House. name: Marisa Wood
subject: Thank you, friend
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47327232/353866331/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZThiMDgzMy0yYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KiHhIjuIyld_zbFdVJJIRG4o8RsUqw_PWg3kvZXlPQ=)
Friend,

I want to take a moment and THANK YOU for your support ahead of this past Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. This fundraising deadline was a huge challenge for us, but I'm pleased to share that we met our goal -- and that’s credit to you.

The stakes have never been higher in our campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy. We're doing our part to hold him accountable, and I'm so humbled that thousands of grassroots donors in California and across the country have joined in.

**Your support is important for any campaign, but especially ours. Every moment Kevin McCarthy spends defending himself here in the Central Valley is time he's unable to spend taking back the House to enact his cruel agenda.**

I'm running for Congress because there are important issues we need to deliver on for this community -- expanding the child tax credit permanently, making healthcare more accessible and affordable, and solving our climate crisis. But in order to plan our next steps, I want your thoughts:

**[I want to get your take on what issues matter to you and how we could better connect with voters. What do you think we should focus on? Please take my one-minute survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47327233/353866332/1246292705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZThiMDgzMy0yYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KiHhIjuIyld_zbFdVJJIRG4o8RsUqw_PWg3kvZXlPQ=&emci=fefbeb30-99f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3e8b0833-2bfa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**
