---

As a teacher, I'm used to giving and receiving feedback. It's how I elevate the lives of the students I teach, and it's how I plan to serve this community if elected.

**[I'd love to get your honest feedback in this one-minute survey>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47327235/353866334/1246292705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZThiMDgzMy0yYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KiHhIjuIyld_zbFdVJJIRG4o8RsUqw_PWg3kvZXlPQ=&emci=fefbeb30-99f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3e8b0833-2bfa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**

Thank you, and I hope you enjoy the holiday weekend.

Marisa Wood
Teacher for Congress

clean_body: | = Friend, I want to take a moment and THANK YOU for your support ahead of this past Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. This fundraising deadline was a huge challenge for us, but I'm pleased to share that we met our goal -- and that’s credit to you. The stakes have never been higher in our campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy. We're doing our part to hold him accountable, and I'm so humbled that thousands of grassroots donors in California and across the country have joined in. Your support is important for any campaign, but especially ours. Every moment Kevin McCarthy spends defending himself here in the Central Valley is time he's unable to spend taking back the House to enact his cruel agenda. I'm running for Congress because there are important issues we need to deliver on for this community -- expanding the child tax credit permanently, making healthcare more accessible and affordable, and solving our climate crisis. But in order to plan our next steps, I want your thoughts: | As a teacher, I'm used to giving and receiving feedback. It's how I elevate the lives of the students I teach, and it's how I plan to serve this community if elected. Thank you, and I hope you enjoy the holiday weekend. body:
The best immediate action we can take is supporting abortion care organizations on the ground. |

The radical Supreme Court majority’s overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ has already triggered abortion bans in 13 states, folks. As Senator, I’m fighting to protect the right to choose at the federal level, because I believe the decision whether or not to have an abortion is between a patient and their doctor and shouldn’t depend on where you live. But as radical right-wing legislatures continue to pass dangerous abortion bans in states across the country, the best immediate action we can take is supporting reproductive rights organizations on the ground. Organizations like Colorado’s Cobalt Abortion Fund and Planned Parenthood of the Rocky Mountains are on the frontlines, helping patients who come to Colorado for a safe haven and reproductive freedom. **If you can, join me in supporting their work and make a donation to Colorado’s Cobalt Abortion Fund and Planned Parenthood of the Rocky Mountains today. ** | | **[DONATE TO COBALT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47327275/353866571/579328911?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzViNjllYS0yYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=klPCxcr1eYtFCZD9TuaHxjJxU1rPXqwJoB2rHYZFgZM=)**

clean_body: The best immediate action we can take is supporting abortion care organizations on the ground. | = The radical Supreme Court majority’s overturning of Roe v. Wade has already triggered abortion bans in 13 states, folks. As Senator, I’m fighting to protect the right to choose at the federal level, because I believe the decision whether or not to have an abortion is between a patient and their doctor and shouldn’t depend on where you live. But as radical right-wing legislatures continue to pass dangerous abortion bans in states across the country, the best immediate action we can take is supporting reproductive rights organizations on the ground. Organizations like Colorado’s Cobalt Abortion Fund and Planned Parenthood of the Rocky Mountains are on the frontlines, helping patients who come to Colorado for a safe haven and reproductive freedom. If you can, join me in supporting their work and make a donation to Colorado’s Cobalt Abortion Fund and Planned Parenthood of the Rocky Mountains today. | | = | Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4438%2E3611125%2EEtIaCv ][IMG]

We’ve had a lot of great news recently—some polls have us up by a point or
even leading by two, while others say we’re down two, or in a statistical
tie.

All that’s to say this race is literally as close as can be.

That gives our campaign an advantage, folks—because in a race
this close, every little thing could tilt the balance and bring us one
step closer to expanding our Democratic Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16023?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4438%2E3611125%2EEtIaCv ]This race is a dead heat—can you chip in $25 ASAP to swing the race in
Tim’s favor and flip Ohio blue?

Another few dollars means we can knock on a few more doors, or make a few

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47327339/353866917/683353327?refcode=20220702_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzViNjllYS0yYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HSpEq6deEVcWdC0FuPldokqm6-G5M5VtzppJIP6hqzw=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate. 2\. Republicans have made me their top target for this year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now: ** [**Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before 11:59 p.m. tonight to hit our goal, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47327340/353866918/683353327?refcode=20220702_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzViNjllYS0yYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HSpEq6deEVcWdC0FuPldokqm6-G5M5VtzppJIP6hqzw=) We're so close, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Thank you from the bottom of my heart
body:
Derek,
I wanted to take a moment and say thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you’ve done to support CommonGood and ensure Democrats win up and down the ticket in the upcoming midterm elections.
Together, our grassroots team has raised an astonishing $2 million in support of 2022 Democrats. That includes nearly $700k for critically important U.S. Senate races across the country.
And with the Supreme Court's latest assault on reproductive freedom, there is more at stake in the upcoming midterms than in any I can remember.
I will never stop fighting for Democrats, our shared values, and our future. I’m proud to know you will continue to fight by my side.
In gratitude,
Terry

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

clean_body: Derek, I wanted to take a moment and say thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you’ve done to support CommonGood and ensure Democrats win up and down the ticket in the upcoming midterm elections. Together, our grassroots team has raised an astonishing $2 million in support of 2022 Democrats. That includes nearly $700k for critically important U.S. Senate races across the country. And with the Supreme Court's latest assault on reproductive freedom, there is more at stake in the upcoming midterms than in any I can remember. I will never stop fighting for Democrats, our shared values, and our future. I’m proud to know you will continue to fight by my side. In gratitude, Terry Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: .

name: John Fetterman
subject: What I know for sure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m counting on yinz.
#
Derek,
Now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe,_ winning PA in November has a whole new meaning.
Here’s what I know to be True:
We must expand our Senate majority.
We must end the filibuster + codify abortion rights into law.
We must defeat Dr. Oz, who would support an extreme national abortion ban (and doesn’t even live in PA, btw).
**It all comes down to flipping this seat in November.**
[**_I’m asking for your help to power this campaign. It would mean the world to me if you chipped in your very first $5 today._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220702-1?refcode=em20220702-6385&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6385_434096_rFvZOT&akid=6385%2E434096%2ErFvZOT)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220702-1?refcode=em20220702-6385&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6385_434096_rFvZOT&akid=6385%2E434096%2ErFvZOT)**
Look, this is about having the resources to beat an anti-choice extremist in one of the country’s most competitive Senate races, where our Democratic majority is on the line.
If that sounds kinda dramatic...that’s because it is! The stakes couldn’t be higher + our opponent’s got virtually unlimited money to spend.
At the same time, I know that our grassroots team is one of the strongest, like, ever. So I really think we can do anything when we work together. 💪
Right now, we need to show Dr. Oz + the GOP that we’re going to fight with everything we have, and we won’t stop until reproductive freedom is protected by law, in PA + across the nation.
[**_I hope you’ll make your first $5 donation to our campaign today. No amount is too small to make a difference._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220702-1?refcode=em20220702-6385&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6385_434096_rFvZOT&akid=6385%2E434096%2ErFvZOT)
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220702-6385-footer&t=1&refcode2=6385_434096_rFvZOT&akid=6385%2E434096%2ErFvZOT)**

subject: Let’s do this together
body:
I’m sure you’ll agree that today America finds itself at a crossroads. Soaring inflation ... rampant crime ... an impending national disaster along...

---
Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ll agree that today America finds itself at a crossroads. Soaring inflation ... rampant crime ... an impending national disaster along our Southern border. Not to mention a historic and deliberate attempt to subvert our children, break apart the family unit and destroy any semblance of polite civil discourse. And so I probably don’t need to tell you that change is sorely overdue. The problem? With things the way they are today, it’s tough for well-informed citizens like you—who want to help restore America’s greatness—to know where to begin. My name is Kevin D. Roberts, President of The Heritage Foundation. And I’m writing today because I would like to help. If you believe that the principles of individual freedom, limited government, and free enterprise are our best hope to restore America’s strength and prosperity ... And if you’d like to join over 500,000 other conservatives in fighting for lasting reform ...
---
| | **Then I want to personally invite you to become a member of The Heritage Foundation: America’s most influential conservative think tank, consistently rated #1 in the world for “Significant Impact on Public Policy.”**
---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=7f4266ff17f54696b4785cadc85d34ad&_e=Xo09BZ0iN-wtNaHPMdmkWDyAMx7OcXWtH9CEiUM7X7WOyAGpLGFH-OCDufNKe5X8lLlJi5gIrz4oh46maklrOEmjb5Xs8GOITTzNDPOKU79AxhHcg7R-Glw4KO8z6TX_Q1JvioY1ewbZF3ZMTpRGjfHKCFj19Hr0UKshepk9rJGXTHPFqYBPAwbohK4F1zWxLUWbtMnQZbtcGpdKtoG6FIfHRQuuCY0sUYteyIOwN_a8_2p2BsSG04dftPnGjCSW7yWuNuiaGHAdSU2PRsKYnEDpEMm4N4trs4zStOcsxhZIFKp_Lo5nbj3mTtCkepjL4JSoUlzEheRpHsZc5K1Lu7pISGNFWML24dfCx1OY9Ii77cRyOzdqwSDF56HaEPWL49BSW7n8_ybCcDIntmvLfdmOTVU42GKU5tMfcxHjKdSpzZxG3y51aDYTj4P_HfWT)
---
| | Right now, the Radical Left thinks they’ve won. But we refuse to allow the tone deaf lawmakers in Washington to ignore the reform that you (and millions like you) want to see. We are determined to fight (and win) on your behalf. For almost 50 years the Heritage Foundation and our renowned team of more than 100 policy experts have been on the front lines fighting for your conservative principles. Can I count on you to join us? **Please click or tap this secure link to accept your invitation today: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate-your-membership/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=7f4266ff17f54696b4785cadc85d34ad&_e=Xo09BZ0iN-wtNaHPMdmkWDyAMx7OcXWtH9CEiUM7X7WOyAGpLGFH-OCDufNKe5X8lLlJi5gIrz4oh46maklrOEmjb5Xs8GOITTzNDPOKU79AxhHcg7R-Glw4KO8z6TX_Q1JvioY1ewbZF3ZMTpRGjfHKCFj19Hr0UKshepk9rJGXTHPFqYBPAwbohK4F1zWxLUWbtMnQZbtcGpdKtoG6FEEfbK6Vp7paDjWxK7xB3BAtHR0REKNxbFDTQNjXP2cwVk9G_wChfO5wacfLOSg55OqGqZRGF4x0uWhW8gYnpOEHMYcXI4yRkjZFhESu7SgB5jIFaEtViD4sWI6frZoO1zDjs9jjaR36s1RXwcq6vdOiQlYwGujhAVSFH6d0fga7sJ9Qud7AwAhtXvjQx4ZZkMvunZKI7g_Ulfq-kJQrpW4sPOMb6yQHHN6GGDb-0g8k)** Once you join, we'll send your Heritage Foundation membership card to you right away. Thank you for supporting conservative principles. All the best, Kevin D. Roberts President The Heritage Foundation **P.S. The Radical Left is counting on you to sit this fight out. But let’s remind them what happens when the silent majority closes ranks and pushes back. Don’t miss this opportunity to be an active participant in returning our founding principles to Washington and making America a nation we can be proud of again. [https://secured.heritage.org/activate-your-membership/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=7f4266ff17f54696b4785cadc85d34ad&_e=Xo09BZ0iN-wtNaHPMdmkWDyAMx7OcXWtH9CEiUM7X7WOyAGpLGFH-OCDufNKe5X8lLlJi5gIrz4oh46maklrOEmjb5Xs8GOITTzNDPOKU79AxhHcg7R-Glw4KO8z6TX_Q1JvioY1ewbZF3ZMTpRGjfHKCFj19Hr0UKshepk9rJGXTHPFqYBPAwbohK4F1zWxLUWbtMnQZbtcGpdKtoG6FFjs5fD0BEERxLSWiL8sVa2zWNcGjWC6kYX5sMtug7gm7JsMHx2rRBGE7ZHSb3KzPvLNuH-imEKyaWGG7Dd003D2Z7zHrJ24PsShR9TK1s-7B-DlPm1PWymA-1eqn713J9L1aX6N8tMMGieN7gB1iFw6Mf75ZWwewpG7CuE9JlOnEyzUgtVVKMPZRYYVTq7kdY8aCTyT0y8aenrTsqsKptyxib82mlKhp_JxB9_HmBeu)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: The good, the bad, and the horrifying
disclaimer_text: paid for by $820K from AIPAC and their far-right funders
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Radical Supreme Court | ILLINOIS WINS! Delia Ramirez - Jonathan
Jackson - Alexi Giannoulias | Building Worker Power w/Ro Khanna | Fast
Food + Federal Worker Justice | Action for Abortion Rights! | Bernie
Endorses Andy Levin (MI-11) | NYS Party Win! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1011&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Become a sustaining member right now to help fight back against far
authoritarians and the corporate Dems enabling them - our movement is
growing and we will not be ignored.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1012&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

This Fourth of July, we are in a battle for Independence from Tyranny. Our
radical Supreme Court has gone rogue, tearing down our human rights in
rapid succession: abortion rights, privacy, clean air, and more — all in a
time of rising authoritarianism and corporate domination.

Things appear bleak, but this darkness is galvanizing our movement to
fight with greater solidarity and tenacity. It’s not an exaggeration to
say we are in the fight for our lives, and nothing less than freedom,
democracy, and justice are on the line.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1013&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Enjoy your holiday with loved ones, and please chip in if you can to
help mount a powerful opposition to tyranny in all its forms this
Independence Day.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1014&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Mark your calendars for our next LIVE Organize to Win Call, Monday, July
11th, at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT, when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Pramila
Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1015&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1016&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

BUILDING WORKER POWER

Our Revolution teamed up with SEIU, CWA, Fight for $15 and a Union, and US
Rep. Ro Khanna on Monday for a powerful [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6053?v=TxFXeL9h4Rs%3Fsource%3DOR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1017&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]LIVE organizing call to BUILD
WORKER POWER — one of the most powerful tools of democracy.

Corporate Dems are blocking federal action like the PRO Act, with
state-level action we can win innovative, game-changing legislation to
give workers a real seat at the table — starting in California.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1018&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

RO KHANNA GOES TO WORK FOR LABOR

Ro listened to worker activists and labor leaders on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1019&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Monday call
and joined them in demanding the California State Senate pass AB-257 - The
FAST Recovery Act.

The bill would give fast-food workers a say in setting health, safety, and
employment standards while holding major food chains accountable.

“This is something where a mobilized effort can win within a couple of
weeks, and then we can take it across the country and for workers in
different sectors,” Ro said. “These folks have very little say in their
workplaces — they’ve risked it all to step out on picket lines for worker
justice, and we must stand with them.”

Ro will also hold a rally and roundtable on July 8 with fast-food workers
in his state. “There is no reason for the delay,” he said, “especially now
as prices are going up and wages aren’t.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act/?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1020&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Ro Khanna and the worker activists on our call are urging immediate
collective action and for folks in California to sign our petition that
goes straight to CA State Senators.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act/?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1021&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Ro said unequivocally that your activism on this issue can tip the
balance — Add your voice now in solidarity with CA workers calling for AB
257 and demand more democracy in the workplace.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1022&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Moriah Foster, a young Burger King worker in Sacramento, told us on
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1023&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]the call that she learned she could stand up for herself and her
co-workers and began striking for $15 and a Union.

California was the first state to win $15 - six years ago - but now, she
said, they’re pressing forward for more and for unions.

Moriah told us some workers are afraid to stand up because of the
retaliation happening. “That’s why AB 257 is so important — it levels the
playing field and gives employees a say in the rules that affect us the
most.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act/?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1024&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]“Pushing for this bill is something everyone can contribute to with
their voices and their votes,” Moriah said. Sign now if you live in
California!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act/?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&amount=10&t=1025&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Ingrid Vilorio, a worker at Jack-in-the-Box in Castro Valley, CA, spoke on
the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1026&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]organizing call about the deplorable conditions fast-food workers
experience.

In her 10 years in the industry, Ingrid has seen wage theft, stolen time,
harassment, discrimination, grueling hours, etc. Workers lack health
insurance and have multiple jobs to supplement the low wages, she said.

“With AB 257, we’ll be able to speak directly with these corporations,
which are aware of all these problems but do nothing to solve them,”
Ingrid said. “On the contrary, they’re taking advantage of all the
employees every single day.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act/?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1027&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Californians: Sign now to stand with Ingrid and Moriah as they fight
for dignity and fairness.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1028&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

SEIU Local 1021 President Joseph Bryant, who was newly-elected Executive
VP of SEIU International was moved by Moriah and Ingrid’s stories.

“These workers have been in this fight so long, shown so much fortitude
and courage — they’re why we’re here with a chance to pass legislation to
give half a million workers in CA a voice,” he said.

“If we don’t do anything, nothing is going to change,” Joseph told
thousands gathered on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?t=1029&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]our call. “We’re demanding the state legislature
recognize the sacrifice made by folks in this industry who were touted as
heroes - and they absolutely are, they risked their lives every day to
provide food.”

Joseph said 80% are workers of color and two-thirds are women. A recent
[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6025?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1030&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]SEIU survey found that 85% of fast-food workers in California were
victims of wage theft from employers denying paid breaks and withholding
overtime pay.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act/?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1031&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]TAKE ACTION IN CALIFORNIA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/phonesdownfistsup/?t=1032&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Thanks to the filibuster, Congress has stalled the PRO Act to protect and
empower workers at the federal level, but the Biden Administration has the
power to make sure companies who do business with the U.S. Government
treat their workers with respect.

Our Revolution stands with workers at Maximus — a multi-billion dollar
company with some of the largest federal contracts to run public services.
They’re fighting to unionize with CWA and recently went on strike at the
company’s largest call centers in Louisiana and Mississippi — demanding
healthcare and an end to poverty wages.

On the second day of the strike, they were joined at a town hall by Sen.
Bernie Sanders, US Rep. Andy Levin, Rev. William Barber, and other allies
in this fight to build worker power.

SOLIDARITY.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1033&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Tonya Jackson of the Maximus Worker Organizing Committee also joined our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1034&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]National Call to Build Worker Power on Monday, breaking down federal
contract workers’ fight for justice and a union with CWA.

Tonya works at a call center, helping people navigate our healthcare
system every day, yet she and her coworkers can’t afford to access
healthcare for themselves.

“Every single day is a struggle for us on the front lines,” Tonya said.
“Maximus gets diversity awards for hiring us, but that doesn’t protect us
when they’re trying to prevent us from organizing for better wages and
healthcare.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1035&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Corporate greed is at the root of the war against workers from
inflation to low wages, offshoring jobs to high gas prices — you name it.
That’s why we’re fighting like hell to build worker power. Join us!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1036&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

BIG WINS IN ILLINOIS!

Our Revolution members and activists worked hard for our Illinois
candidates, and it paid off with major statewide and congressional
victories on Tuesday.

All told, our volunteers made 369,000 voter contacts through phone calls,
texts, and emails. This is how we’re clinching wins against all the big
money spent targeting progressive candidates. Power to the people!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1037&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Congratulations to Alexi Giannoulias for winning the Illinois Sec. of
State primary race!

Alexi is a staunch defender of democracy who vows to put people first and
stand up to powerful interests.

In a time when our democracy itself is under threat, it’s crucial to have
someone with integrity and progressive ideals like him at the helm. Taking
power in statewide races like this is key to combating the far right.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1038&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

With our movement and Bernie behind her, Delia Ramirez defeated Chicago
Alderman Gilbert Villegas by a 2-1 vote in Illinois’ 3rd District!

Delia is a founder of Our Illinois Revolution, has been a progressive
fighter in the State House, and we can send her to Congress in November!

As a State Rep, Delia created a housing committee, expanded housing and
Medicaid coverage, co-sponsored the IL Clean Energy and Jobs Act, and
created an elected school board in Chicago.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1039&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Bernie also joined us in endorsing Jonathan Jackson, who beat out 16 other
Democrats to clinch the nomination and become the next likely congressman
to represent this safe blue district in IL-1.

The son of Rev. Jesse Jackson, Jonathan ran on our popular progressive
issues to fill the seat held 30 years by former Black Panther Bobby Rush.

“The issues Our Revolution Illinois espouses - workers’ rights, clean
energy, criminal justice, to name a few, align with the types of policies
I believe will deliver the best long-term benefits to my district.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1040&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]When we organize, we win! Rush a donation now to fund our work to
elect more progressive allies up and down the ballot in these important
primary races.

★ ★ ★

BERNIE ENDORSES ANDY LEVIN

Bernie Sanders joins Our Revolution in endorsing Congressman Andy Levin
for re-election in Michigan’s new 11th District.

“Andy Levin is a strong pro-labor voice in Congress and the only Democrat
in the race who understands that we have to be a party of the working
class,” Bernie said. “He’s not afraid to take on powerful special
interests, and I am proud to stand with him.”

Andy said the endorsement is a major development for his people-powered,
grassroots campaign. “Bernie defied the polls and shocked the political
class when he pulled off a major victory here in Michigan in 2016 because
Bernie and his team know how to organize,” Andy said.

Meanwhile, Andy’s opponent Haley Stevens just canceled their joint
appearance to speak directly to voters opting for an onslaught of ads
instead, paid for by $820K from AIPAC and their far-right funders.

“The right-wing-funded SuperPac has found its newest progressive target in
Andy,” Bernie wrote. “Once again, these extremists are pouring in millions
into a congressional race to try to ensure the Democratic Party advances
the agenda of powerful corporations and the billionaire class.”

Andy remains confident that “with Bernie and our movement, we will send a
strong message that Republican billionaires cannot buy a Democratic
primary, especially not here in Oakland County.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1041&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Our Revolution is backing Del. Sheila Ruth for re-election to the Maryland
State House, District 44B!

In office, Sheila has led the charge in the state for climate action,
universal healthcare, juvenile justice, disability, reproductive rights,
and much more.

She works hard on the important Environment and Transit Committee to
ensure all Marylanders see the environmental, health, and economic
benefits of a well-planned transportation system.

Mail-in ballots are out, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6036?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1042&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]early voting runs July 7 to 14, and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3207?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1043&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Election Day is July 19th.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6037?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1044&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Sign up to volunteer with our Phonebank Force to elect progressives
like Sheila at every level of government.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1045&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Already in 2022, we’ve clinched important progressive wins for Congress
with Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30),
Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea Salinas (OR-6), and others — and now
we can add Delia Ramirez (IL-3) and Jonathan Jackson (IL-1) to that
growing list of allies!

Even as corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms,
we’re growing our power at every level of government. Let’s build on this
momentum and change the composition of power in Washington.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5949?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1046&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]Pitch in here to help us take down the worst corporate puppets before
they forfeit what’s left of our democracy to the far right in November!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1047&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more
than 500,000 phone calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as
many folks as possible to help us hit that one-million mark and beyond!

Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like
Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2),
Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others!

“Our crew is there to help every step of the way, and it’s amazing to see
our collective impact on these races,” said lead caller Amanda Walker.
“This is how we turn the tide against big money – and it’s fun!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1048&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1049&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1050&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

TAKING ACTION FOR ABORTION RIGHTS

Our Revolution and our allies on the frontlines are ramping up pressure on
Democrats to ACT and it’s working. On Thursday, President Biden announced
his support to change the filibuster to codify abortion rights!

Our endorsed candidate for US Congress in NY-3, Melanie D’Arrigo, was
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6045?t=yPghcJylxk5tGHhIS8pNYA%2F%3Fsource%3DOR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1051&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]arrested at an action Thursday for civil disobedience in front of the
Supreme Court, protesting its radical ruling overturning Roe v. Wade.

Our Revolution has been in rapid response, holding actions to call for
political leaders to defend abortion rights ever since the Court leaked
their intent — and we’re not stopping.

This weekend, Our Revolution hosted two more events - this time in Red
Bank and Hillsborough, NJ - and our members joined many more
demonstrations across the country.

“It felt great to see many people of all different walks of life come out
and express their views to help us support a human’s right to choose,” Our
Revolution Hillsborough President Didier Jimenez told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6046?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1052&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]CentralJersey.com.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6038?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1053&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ][IMG]

Andrea spoke at a press conference Wednesday organized by Planned
Parenthood Action NJ on the horrifying ramifications of the Court’s
decision on the rights to contraception, gay marriage, bi-racial
relationships, and others.

“We can’t regress and lose all the rights that women, minorities, and
immigrants have worked so hard to earn over the decades,” Andrea said. She
was joined by NJ Assemblymembers Sadaf Jaffer and Raj Mukherji, cosponsors
of a bill to expand abortion rights in the state.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?source=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220702_1_1&t=1054&akid=3113%2E5885482%2ENL2We6 ]We refuse to just watch in horror as women’s healthcare, human rights,
and basic autonomy are decimated. Join our fight right now to help our
movement stem the tide of fascism.

★ ★ ★

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Radical Supreme Court | ILLINOIS WINS! Delia Ramirez - Jonathan Jackson - Alexi Giannoulias | Building Worker Power w/Ro Khanna | Fast Food + Federal Worker Justice | Action for Abortion Rights! | Bernie Endorses Andy Levin (MI-11) | NYS Party Win! | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Become a sustaining member right now to help fight back against far authoritarians and the corporate Dems enabling them - our movement is growing and we will not be ignored. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This Fourth of July, we are in a battle for Independence from Tyranny. Our radical Supreme Court has gone rogue, tearing down our human rights in rapid succession: abortion rights, privacy, clean air, and more — all in a time of rising authoritarianism and corporate domination. Things appear bleak, but this darkness is galvanizing our movement to fight with greater solidarity and tenacity. It’s not an exaggeration to say we are in the fight for our lives, and nothing less than freedom, democracy, and justice are on the line. [ ]Enjoy your holiday with loved ones, and please chip in if you can to help mount a powerful opposition to tyranny in all its forms this Independence Day. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Mark your calendars for our next LIVE Organize to Win Call, Monday, July 11th, at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT, when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Pramila Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BUILDING WORKER POWER Our Revolution teamed up with SEIU, CWA, Fight for $15 and a Union, and US Rep. Ro Khanna on Monday for a powerful [ ]LIVE organizing call to BUILD WORKER POWER — one of the most powerful tools of democracy. Corporate Dems are blocking federal action like the PRO Act, with state-level action we can win innovative, game-changing legislation to give workers a real seat at the table — starting in California. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] RO KHANNA GOES TO WORK FOR LABOR Ro listened to worker activists and labor leaders on our [ ]Monday call and joined them in demanding the California State Senate pass AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. The bill would give fast-food workers a say in setting health, safety, and employment standards while holding major food chains accountable. “This is something where a mobilized effort can win within a couple of weeks, and then we can take it across the country and for workers in different sectors,” Ro said. “These folks have very little say in their workplaces — they’ve risked it all to step out on picket lines for worker justice, and we must stand with them.” Ro will also hold a rally and roundtable on July 8 with fast-food workers in his state. “There is no reason for the delay,” he said, “especially now as prices are going up and wages aren’t.” [ ][IMG] Ro Khanna and the worker activists on our call are urging immediate collective action and for folks in California to sign our petition that goes straight to CA State Senators. [ ]Ro said unequivocally that your activism on this issue can tip the balance — Add your voice now in solidarity with CA workers calling for AB 257 and demand more democracy in the workplace. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Moriah Foster, a young Burger King worker in Sacramento, told us on [ ]the call that she learned she could stand up for herself and her co-workers and began striking for $15 and a Union. California was the first state to win $15 - six years ago - but now, she said, they’re pressing forward for more and for unions. Moriah told us some workers are afraid to stand up because of the retaliation happening. “That’s why AB 257 is so important — it levels the playing field and gives employees a say in the rules that affect us the most.” [ ]“Pushing for this bill is something everyone can contribute to with their voices and their votes,” Moriah said. Sign now if you live in California! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Ingrid Vilorio, a worker at Jack-in-the-Box in Castro Valley, CA, spoke on the [ ]organizing call about the deplorable conditions fast-food workers experience. In her 10 years in the industry, Ingrid has seen wage theft, stolen time, harassment, discrimination, grueling hours, etc. Workers lack health insurance and have multiple jobs to supplement the low wages, she said. “With AB 257, we’ll be able to speak directly with these corporations, which are aware of all these problems but do nothing to solve them,” Ingrid said. “On the contrary, they’re taking advantage of all the employees every single day.” [ ]Californians: Sign now to stand with Ingrid and Moriah as they fight for dignity and fairness. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] SEIU Local 1021 President Joseph Bryant, who was newly-elected Executive VP of SEIU International was moved by Moriah and Ingrid’s stories. “These workers have been in this fight so long, shown so much fortitude and courage — they’re why we’re here with a chance to pass legislation to give half a million workers in CA a voice,” he said. “If we don’t do anything, nothing is going to change,” Joseph told thousands gathered on [ ]our call. “We’re demanding the state legislature recognize the sacrifice made by folks in this industry who were touted as heroes - and they absolutely are, they risked their lives every day to provide food.” Joseph said 80% are workers of color and two-thirds are women. A recent [ ]SEIU survey found that 85% of fast-food workers in California were victims of wage theft from employers denying paid breaks and withholding overtime pay. [ ]TAKE ACTION IN CALIFORNIA ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Thanks to the filibuster, Congress has stalled the PRO Act to protect and empower workers at the federal level, but the Biden Administration has the power to make sure companies who do business with the U.S. Government treat their workers with respect. Our Revolution stands with workers at Maximus — a multi-billion dollar company with some of the largest federal contracts to run public services. They’re fighting to unionize with CWA and recently went on strike at the company’s largest call centers in Louisiana and Mississippi — demanding healthcare and an end to poverty wages. On the second day of the strike, they were joined at a town hall by Sen. Bernie Sanders, US Rep. Andy Levin, Rev. William Barber, and other allies in this fight to build worker power. SOLIDARITY. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tonya Jackson of the Maximus Worker Organizing Committee also joined our [ ]National Call to Build Worker Power on Monday, breaking down federal contract workers’ fight for justice and a union with CWA. Tonya works at a call center, helping people navigate our healthcare system every day, yet she and her coworkers can’t afford to access healthcare for themselves. “Every single day is a struggle for us on the front lines,” Tonya said. “Maximus gets diversity awards for hiring us, but that doesn’t protect us when they’re trying to prevent us from organizing for better wages and healthcare.” [ ]Corporate greed is at the root of the war against workers from inflation to low wages, offshoring jobs to high gas prices — you name it. That’s why we’re fighting like hell to build worker power. Join us! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ BIG WINS IN ILLINOIS! Our Revolution members and activists worked hard for our Illinois candidates, and it paid off with major statewide and congressional victories on Tuesday. All told, our volunteers made 369,000 voter contacts through phone calls, texts, and emails. This is how we’re clinching wins against all the big money spent targeting progressive candidates. Power to the people! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Congratulations to Alexi Giannoulias for winning the Illinois Sec. of State primary race! Alexi is a staunch defender of democracy who vows to put people first and stand up to powerful interests. In a time when our democracy itself is under threat, it’s crucial to have someone with integrity and progressive ideals like him at the helm. Taking power in statewide races like this is key to combating the far right. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ With our movement and Bernie behind her, Delia Ramirez defeated Chicago Alderman Gilbert Villegas by a 2-1 vote in Illinois’ 3rd District! Delia is a founder of Our Illinois Revolution, has been a progressive fighter in the State House, and we can send her to Congress in November! As a State Rep, Delia created a housing committee, expanded housing and Medicaid coverage, co-sponsored the IL Clean Energy and Jobs Act, and created an elected school board in Chicago. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Bernie also joined us in endorsing Jonathan Jackson, who beat out 16 other Democrats to clinch the nomination and become the next likely congressman to represent this safe blue district in IL-1. The son of Rev. Jesse Jackson, Jonathan ran on our popular progressive issues to fill the seat held 30 years by former Black Panther Bobby Rush. “The issues Our Revolution Illinois espouses - workers’ rights, clean energy, criminal justice, to name a few, align with the types of policies I believe will deliver the best long-term benefits to my district.” [ ]When we organize, we win! Rush a donation now to fund our work to elect more progressive allies up and down the ballot in these important primary races. ★ ★ ★ BERNIE ENDORSES ANDY LEVIN Bernie Sanders joins Our Revolution in endorsing Congressman Andy Levin for re-election in Michigan’s new 11th District. “Andy Levin is a strong pro-labor voice in Congress and the only Democrat in the race who understands that we have to be a party of the working class,” Bernie said. “He’s not afraid to take on powerful special interests, and I am proud to stand with him.” Andy said the endorsement is a major development for his people-powered, grassroots campaign. “Bernie defied the polls and shocked the political class when he pulled off a major victory here in Michigan in 2016 because Bernie and his team know how to organize,” Andy said. Meanwhile, Andy’s opponent Haley Stevens just canceled their joint appearance to speak directly to voters opting for an onslaught of ads instead, paid for by $820K from AIPAC and their far-right funders. “The right-wing-funded SuperPac has found its newest progressive target in Andy,” Bernie wrote. “Once again, these extremists are pouring in millions into a congressional race to try to ensure the Democratic Party advances the agenda of powerful corporations and the billionaire class.” Andy remains confident that “with Bernie and our movement, we will send a strong message that Republican billionaires cannot buy a Democratic primary, especially not here in Oakland County.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is backing Del. Sheila Ruth for re-election to the Maryland State House, District 44B! In office, Sheila has led the charge in the state for climate action, universal healthcare, juvenile justice, disability, reproductive rights, and much more. She works hard on the important Environment and Transit Committee to ensure all Marylanders see the environmental, health, and economic benefits of a well-planned transportation system. Mail-in ballots are out, [ ]early voting runs July 7 to 14, and [ ]Election Day is July 19th. [ ]Sign up to volunteer with our Phonebank Force to elect progressives like Sheila at every level of government. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Already in 2022, we’ve clinched important progressive wins for Congress with Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea Salinas (OR-6), and others — and now we can add Delia Ramirez (IL-3) and Jonathan Jackson (IL-1) to that growing list of allies! Even as corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms, we’re growing our power at every level of government. Let’s build on this momentum and change the composition of power in Washington. [ ]Pitch in here to help us take down the worst corporate puppets before they forfeit what’s left of our democracy to the far right in November! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more than 500,000 phone calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as many folks as possible to help us hit that one-million mark and beyond! Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2), Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others! “Our crew is there to help every step of the way, and it’s amazing to see our collective impact on these races,” said lead caller Amanda Walker. “This is how we turn the tide against big money – and it’s fun!” [ ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] TAKING ACTION FOR ABORTION RIGHTS Our Revolution and our allies on the frontlines are ramping up pressure on Democrats to ACT and it’s working. On Thursday, President Biden announced his support to change the filibuster to codify abortion rights! Our endorsed candidate for US Congress in NY-3, Melanie D’Arrigo, was [ ]arrested at an action Thursday for civil disobedience in front of the Supreme Court, protesting its radical ruling overturning Roe v. Wade. Our Revolution has been in rapid response, holding actions to call for political leaders to defend abortion rights ever since the Court leaked their intent — and we’re not stopping. This weekend, Our Revolution hosted two more events - this time in Red Bank and Hillsborough, NJ - and our members joined many more demonstrations across the country. “It felt great to see many people of all different walks of life come out and express their views to help us support a human’s right to choose,” Our Revolution Hillsborough President Didier Jimenez told [ ]CentralJersey.com. [ ][IMG] Andrea spoke at a press conference Wednesday organized by Planned Parenthood Action NJ on the horrifying ramifications of the Court’s decision on the rights to contraception, gay marriage, bi-racial relationships, and others. “We can’t regress and lose all the rights that women, minorities, and immigrants have worked so hard to earn over the decades,” Andrea said. She was joined by NJ Assemblymembers Sadaf Jaffer and Raj Mukherji, cosponsors of a bill to expand abortion rights in the state. [ ]We refuse to just watch in horror as women’s healthcare, human rights, and basic autonomy are decimated. Join our fight right now to help our movement stem the tide of fascism. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CALLING OUT SENATOR SCHUMER BRING ANTITRUST BILLS TO A VOTE! [ ]The Washington Post reported on our actions with Fight for Our Future demanding Senate Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) bring our antitrust bills for a vote ASAP. “Amazingly these bills have support in the Senate, we just need Democratic leaders to ACT,” Our Revolution Long Island organizer Joe Sackman spoke at the demonstration. “Big Tech companies are monopolizing digital markets and the online economy — we’ve got to open the gates.” Protestors chanted: “Hey Chuck: Lead, or Get Out of the Way!” The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act would enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and ban self-dealing. This is a start to taking back democratic control from these behemoths. [ ]You can take a quick and simple action to kick off this fight! CALL YOUR SENATORS NOW and tell them you want these two important bills passed! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] VICTORY! Our Revolution-NYPAN leader Maria Ordoñez won a competitive race to fill a seat on the NY State Democratic Committee on Tuesday! Through direct voter outreach, our movement powered Maria to victory, and she isn’t the only one! Our Revolution-NYPAN candidates won 6 of 7 races for the state committee — and got Sarana Purcell over the finish line for District Leader in AD43. A second NY Primary will be held on Aug. 23rd for U.S. Senate candidates and U.S. House candidates like Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3) and Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11). Stay tuned for our next voter guide! [ ]Sign up to join the Our Revolution family and keep growing our impact within the Party and at every level of government! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Mark your calendars for our next LIVE Organize to Win Call, Monday, July 11th, at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT, when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Pramila Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] DEFEND DEMOCRACY PETITION The January 6th hearings are ongoing, but Congress only has the power to investigate - not prosecute. That’s why Our Revolution is calling on secretaries of state to do their job, enforce the Constitution, and bar insurrectionists from the ballot! The American people cannot stomach any more political theater. Let’s put the findings from the hearings into action and make sure Trump and his minions are disqualified from seeking re-election! [ ]SIGN OUR PETITION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BIG TECH: CALL SENATORS Two bills to bust up Big Tech monopoly power are heading to the Senate - and our voices can tip the scales to get them passed. And, we need YOU to make a quick call to your Senators and join our call team reaching out to others to do the same! Our Revolution phone banker Amanda Walker is from Washington State, home to Big Tech giants like Microsoft and Amazon, and she is living the effects of concentrated corporate power and wealth. “The rent is soaring, and it’s getting harder to live here,” Amanda said. “So I called my senators, and now I’m making calls to other people asking them to do the same.” [ ]CALL YOUR SENATORS NOW! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As our movement is showing with primary victories, we can overcome the force of big money with our direct voter outreach. We have a shot to elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems in these pivotal elections — IF we do the work! It feels great to change a voter’s mind in real-time and know that you helped get a fantastic candidate into power. Help us make calls for Our Revolution candidates on the ballot SOON like Andy Levin (MI-11), Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), and Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3). [ ]SIGN UP TO MAKE CALLS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to re-elect one of our best allies - US Rep. Andy Levin to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Michigan’s 11th congressional district, which includes Detroit area communities such as Bloomfield and Pontiac. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is also hosting a Volunteer Kick-Off to help send people’s champ David Segal to Congress (RI-2). Join the virtual event to get involved and make an impact on one of the most critical primaries of 2022. [ ]SIGN UP HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is taking our 14.3 Campaign to the next level to Defend Democracy. From live rallies to bird-dogging election officials to letters and editorials, we're leaving no tool in the kit as we fight to preserve our Democracy. Join us Wednesday evening, July 6th, to organize state by state to block insurrectionists from the ballot. [ ]SIGN UP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution South Carolina's Education Forum is next Saturday, July 9th, when we’ll discuss solutions for Palmetto State public schools. Two Democrats running for the South Carolina House of Representatives will be with us: Katie Crosby, a former teacher, and Dr. Ernest Mackins, assistant principal at Honea Path High School. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month, you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. At higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, get a sticker 6-pack, and at $15, get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Major Endorsement From Baltimore County!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Major endorsement alert – I’m excited to have received the endorsement of my friend, Former State Senator Jim Brochin! As a Senate Chair of the Baltimore County Delegation, Jim distinguished himself as one of the leading champions for Maryland’s working families in the State House. He’s a consummate public servant and independent thinker, and I am honored to have received his endorsement.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=20.22]
Jim, thank you for your trust and your friendship. I can’t wait to partner with you to secure a stronger future for Maryland’s communities in the many years to come. From making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to combating the student debt crisis, to creating 100,000 new jobs, we have an exciting opportunity to change the way that government does business.
With the primary election just a few short weeks away, our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. Will you help us pull ahead even further in this competitive race by chipping in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to raise an additional $2,125 that will help us print more field literature and yard signs, run more ads, and ultimately secure the votes we need to win this competitive race.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement]
Anything you can spare is greatly appreciated. It’s absolutely imperative that we continue to meet our grassroots fundraising goals, so that we have the resources to fire on all cylinders in these final, critical weeks before election day.
I’m proud that the overwhelming majority of our grassroots donations come from supporters right here within Maryland. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re leading in endorsements, we’re leading in the polls, and we’re leading in the battle of ideas.
With your help, we’re going to build a people-centered administration that every day will be focused on providing responsive, respectful, and results-oriented service to Marylanders.
Enough talk – let’s get it done! Click here to help us meet our fundraising goal and power our movement to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jimbrochinendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Z0Lo20pRx0OQ6QeYLZWLCw2?unsubscribedata=1syLqPVULBRFNDqbut3uRYIK0IpRDtmIkttNZXa%2FIpNga3i5uZ32vFzILUyamQ4%2FeuC5q%2BtmKR7v2YkKmMOUQBPWvXnWjyKbJKHl3y25cmkcOJHHroAVbvoPm0xuOx%2BKA8m%2FW7mVTxmDwQHxs4LqlBojkJAiSk5K8yTXZrqbTeucPnYU8qswPVkOZouniRumVBdENKG3hASBydq9qDAcK%2BQjMDD8yiiYAvCroabSJWu3GNo6dkDW9zoeDFmfJXx4ItghiMbhz9JzlX9kJU%2FSLsSyoPeO3Joswu%2BpQuf2zNrlWKgRpRIEbxe5LJTFzeyKDj5XK51CO77Udq0V6sn%2Bncbn5sHqO41YSAVAhL6g47LHZqmwK1QuN2V0%2FwRTeJc%2BNQ6TGETsGa2kIXdC5PUCzDOyrCG%2BancFx8IBmma0TPLd%2Frk8LHl5aLlRrdv97KG%2F .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

body:
|
---
What a monumental week - a week that we will all remember years to come. That’s right, JD’s baby daughter had [**her first meal**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4hYSM_viTMdk_YI-fD2DcBUBKhwpZnTStT05rlI0GN39UgPoI8fdelltysguKOwdBwMoiy3D3IQUYDZB9JmYLK8HY7aqimKV9QYqgnn7tmwuCVSta7oeXgCvAQyIcukmDWbKaxjoYvmrMdEHloKa0S1x9iK9R-j8sRrgo-abHP-AsrpfL1AygwmazPx5P1KDojRF0uQtOe8M0gm81b99h7jr2tCk3GNa-syzViOD8noRmujjoxv0f0Hskqng8pRGBagnK6AmGD4xT5G3ZpFZI0i1vjQtv72SzNFwuQK-XpmXQ%3D%3D) at **Skyline!**

**JD** has been busy traveling the state and gearing up for November. Check out this week’s **JD’s Top Hits** for the latest!

Thanks always for your support!

**JD JOINED LAURA INGRAHM** to [**discuss**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4gPFJP7h2PmEHe1zjY6-mqwPxkxPe6eFkjG9pjHR_cSdpRVpZGxylZ-KHV1ULwI84VIo2iSjd5Em57w3C75kuBPk3MxGCMfqHbq2b4SWZRztPU2VDBrwTc00sGsPwGHy1Pt1mOUm3hWWWwJhevnbYMfeSuDowVoxMNE7DV25OaylMTwBJpnbLUt6bc0Yb4brfo4KM775c5UMdvaTj-b7NHzaCt7ps3hj62uRE64A1_h8yo057lYpt73DHuYEEIETOH4Gqc7BhMuGcib9yqLk54IK2Mv4Pq_7wtfsby8kHmLNEWlTCMG_jRrqV1VpwPDou8%3D) Tim Ryan’s disastrous record on the economy, energy, and law enforcement. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4gPFJP7h2PmEHe1zjY6-mqwPxkxPe6eFkjG9pjHR_cSdpRVpZGxylZ-KHV1ULwI84VIo2iSjd5Em57w3C75kuBP4T86rZ_gwQOX8CuJb7_2VtEGgqQIHwIi7PyhCyXMWF1YpRW4jow3rI7LgO3pqqvpEO7EjUruH01hFE39A3vrSJ8U9Dx3soccWrdcINMZg2drsIq_iiS69chk5xXDEq6B9J_qjNjZq5EVCO4fL3sH2uOvmLjQmtnIq3JYoKYGcZ0ynQfOpgO3jGqusOMlcBlwmfxYng_MKpfNKDeieCehATUo46Xe9R5rkh-15ANwkCk%3D)
_“[Tim Ryan] didn't support**Trump's trade deals** , he actively worked against Trump’s trade policies. He worked to **defund police** in the state of Ohio. He's worked every single time to expand the inflationary policies of the Biden administration ... Tim Ryan has been a disaster for **Ohio energy and American energy** , which is one of the reasons why we have such an inflation crisis in the first place. This guy is a **complete fraud** ... I don’t think Ohio voters are going to buy it - Were gonna be in good shape come November,” JD said._

**JD PENNED AN[OP-ED](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QUFYkyE74A1eDWCT1CObUZI_2-rI9EDLpffXSECYGIUYE-L13jVMduiEV6-8yBGTWcDM2AGqCYVhpcuXl6dnBr7X6H9zC0UbwgsC_K3O3vRFMJtGcH3MBHLqbzIWLA7kTlOB9KJm8et5KdyAnXXHXJUPZU_D-CJxTA7H_wmBkkc51vWb_VENdp85Z-8mcaMx-VyKQ1IUauDFEwmkhqGSvTF6dQaj3BEHpQNwCJ6-wBWSzquTtHNGPUX4JAUWNEYvFujFp5qcgDCdSrIyln414Gp3RixVj2I17y2mgpIo1PZ7IIPTs2-YONwaZ7K9011kMLiDUnXPs48ETKJAUlPQD7o%3D)** for the Cincinnati Enquirer exposing the disastrous economic policies of Joe Biden and Tim Ryan.

_“Mothers in Ohio are cutting back their milk purchases for their children because of soaring prices. Is this the kind of economy Ohioans should accept? Well, my opponent Tim Ryan has spent two decades in the Washington Swamp wholeheartedly supporting exactly the globalist, corporatist policies that bring America to this awful economic predicament ...**Ryan votes with Biden an astounding 100% of the time.** ”_

_“Ryan has worked his whole professional life on the public dole, first as a bureaucrat and then spent this century as a typical politician, speaking like a moderate and acting as a radical.**I present a whole new approach.** As an outsider and a businessman, I buck the establishment and bring to the race the experience of building businesses in the private sector, paying employees and creating success in Ohio.”_

_“I will demand that we onshore again, to**make things again in Ohio** , rather than relying on dicey supply lines from Asia. I will also insist that **the open borders madness of Biden and Ryan end** , in part to lift the wages of Ohioans who should never have to compete in the job market against unlawful and unjust competition from illegal migrants,” JD wrote._

**JD HIT BACK[against](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4hYSM_viTMdk_YI-fD2DcBUP5CJzh6bnagCiBqVSa_xBUeYCMUBTnRXrbe-fwdkzqCha4qJUJEtQWrs4UdiN0h2WKa9mXK4iByB7ICGJjrp3k5LGqKN-6RtRnsBNIoB_lZchjK5xQx0D1AyqQxd1I5xGxxaGpdUI_eK2TmQttYv-PwsK8wqrB_zUzOUf0hzK-fnQZUefPU2hqK1UXkOe99g_iAwfz_aiDCnEQFZbrGLie58tmekaradNxBq3BW7of4cuYlyeNZHcvvBW_2OUE2v2m7Y3uAPFl2nS5_lwlGnsg%3D%3D)** Hillary “Crooked” Clinton’s shameful attacks on Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas.
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4hYSM_viTMdk_YI-fD2DcBUP5CJzh6bnagCiBqVSa_xBUeYCMUBTnRXrbe-fwdkzqCha4qJUJEtQWrs4UdiN0h2y-Rk_NXsOTP48vVLD1sf3sf2dZ43074uOoKaXKg3jgem9Sln3hYvxvP8EC2oiCwEM-kB-tU6rf3loYD4myR4pnsZbHYj0_6kMxNWXU11K21YB7cMXdm93ZsRZwLxeV6RI_zJkS4fA0E6fCHDiEwwgw52uUtHm5zgr8-hXAGNUfUW1o2tgrDN6nBmVylv58fCs0F0N0pfHuJ_8DqVPtH2fA%3D%3D)
**JD[CALLED OUT](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4gPFJP7h2PmEHe1zjY6-mqwY_rG0rCZC_-Fb-zpTc_dQoYdK6-izilntQSJihIOdAkllwgpop66YaMVSH_-3ShQH4tDLW9ECJjW_j2AmQPRyxD20mkb0qlCtATf--4AZmhwndiRd90VP1x6OpcZhSb6robDmGWVo1UrOK82_qjXkbHUF0F1XRrIdUAbpHDDwtxKVR0-AFo1DJrnr_mvFcK4OvIHGzNFkF4W4Rg069A8--GCHiFHyLExhjivLK0nVJiGqVZ7gk8dRypqGgetnODWFsPtmLcmGl9vebpJBnltvij49-crtJYeLUSuT4dq6RU%3D) CORPORATE HYPOCRISY** on Fox Business, as many companies are beginning to provide employees with financial incentives to receive abortions, while not granting the same benefits to employees who decide to have children.
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4gPFJP7h2PmEHe1zjY6-mqwY_rG0rCZC_-Fb-zpTc_dQoYdK6-izilntQSJihIOdAkllwgpop66YaMVSH_-3ShQpGej0XgyChx6-tLyKGI88PQArjjS1FIWvn-So7Wq6N5KINy4UDk45DcQRoUQpEjx3kEtsNpruCQ4Uvxm5gDerYl6w6YiywvV4-o4xoncQuJnQNrxHxhP81a_KQHxLoMxOGVPXegTZnSLj80FS6x52kv_Wnqhp2KXpR5i370GBaaUa2eo6twcsqLGjNVR-4FqHxMp2ujph2lqqCr81sFEnIOKFvFnHvz1wwYplR5TAkE%3D)
_"You have a lot of big, multinational corporations saying they're going give $4,000 to people to cross state lines to get an abortion. Of course they wouldn't give $4,000 to somebody who wants to have a baby," JD said._

**THE WASHINGTON EXAMINER’S SELENA ZITO[profiled](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QdobzSpLX_fR-LwShtjFT7-USAcRtie7k2bPXlmZ_BPmxxvEyhMeFLH_pm3vRzqYzIAMlZpnVe_LpemLafKuH9IdiDD0D3B-vzXRoG-H7M3D5Tee4y2agLQUlDP0GqBorgKBUGR25EOZkPnCXE-YI2KDXHoi9Ybms4Zyk2Md7ekuEiUm5e9DREYSY3j2lsnv-qkVCNOVC9yBkCSyMPP3FC_7-H8DgJt-OaWYPXqKiTdU9NEMnlZOSi77yIzszVJtwa5TdRknrLRMkIlkdd25fFGoqtYIELZc68iuXNjyfWZa7m3ahbOsCeyv8aGDJsMwaNxSnEz_ePjI8WfVLsZNMaEMXqrMTtxIpyCpUisZjOT1kuJh_GS0NAkfGmgFpGZiDg%3D%3D)** the shrinking regional airport infrastructure in the American Midwest. **JD COMMENTED** on [**Twitter**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4hYSM_viTMdk_YI-fD2DcBUoxPAzvhRdX11-ugVXazqGmy9uIxMDiCltno7AvM_wz9WZweOdy4X82eB0UBr2TqrUx_R2X-ehqRUx8UOWGTeYi3XWHTazFlTT7KA6EjZQWwWvbqIVLnMW8BCh8iwrfdV4ZalgDqbLXCMxvswcfmoeX7ETYr1jHJuDhrdzT46HdmXualhi5zGvX8g2b1wv1Q2K59erguHMAE1pJOb91Xa_02D7Z5vz47aveBUFWNaGGbMO90QdlUsVsAZym_ZL6Q3Y1NIGW_jwGRwp_4_Wd5k2A%3D%3D): _“Rising fuel costs have made routes ‘in places like Toledo unprofitable.’ Tim Ryan and Joe Biden’s energy policies strike again.”_ From Zito’s piece:

_“In the same way that the railroad was a major factor in a region's economic viability, so are smaller cities' airports. This is a story that few in our elite class will care about because they cannot see how it affects them, just as they could not see how a factory closing down so many years ago would affect them. But it did, it does, and it will. The disdainful term "flyover country" implies a world of bitter Bible-and-gun clingers, deplorables, and ultra-MAGAs. It implies that the lives and industries of half the U.S. population are ignorable — that is, until the people, places, and problems they ignored begin to affect national politics. That is about the time the elites in New York and Washington start asking again what happened when another election result blows their closed minds.”_

**JD[DEFENDED](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9697508533304e31a90bfbc0a7866679&_e=3kn9jEk-GN9JcC0VWXZ9QYzXzWgRf8QpRjLG3wGaD4gPFJP7h2PmEHe1zjY6-mqwufwJkbarZyuiV84QJcMfuZAD4kvG849LCvwrN8KdZcsZT0bCM3TZ42g_ZAccTV-dd3kLcjpLLM3cpChRBInzow5MGeubZSg2E-cxm84TB2CjGVzzHMxTUiV1FO6fZD2ZAeCLDwNsz5ckRsSntiCOT7alRSxC74oHzsuOQhZ-ZS3KapG1WKbneA5tzurf0rrYf37SYDC6Frb9JwzG-5_E5vJ9R8O9VxDbNC_D6-pSNRSeapUlDniSNsuwVisRqpyyuAgiWYXA52scqS5wDW84EaKZGYgYeihLBhMD9A9u-sI%3D) PRESIDENT TRUMP’S TARIFFS**, a crucial plank of the America first policy agenda.

clean_body: | What a monumental week - a week that we will all remember years to come. That’s right, JD’s baby daughter had at Skyline! JD has been busy traveling the state and gearing up for November. Check out this week’s JD’s Top Hits for the latest! Thanks always for your support! JD JOINED LAURA INGRAHM to Tim Ryan’s disastrous record on the economy, energy, and law enforcement. “[Tim Ryan] didn't supportTrump's trade deals , he actively worked against Trump’s trade policies. He worked to defund police in the state of Ohio. He's worked every single time to expand the inflationary policies of the Biden administration ... Tim Ryan has been a disaster for Ohio energy and American energy , which is one of the reasons why we have such an inflation crisis in the first place. This guy is a complete fraud ... I don’t think Ohio voters are going to buy it - Were gonna be in good shape come November,” JD said. JD PENNED AN for the Cincinnati Enquirer exposing the disastrous economic policies of Joe Biden and Tim Ryan. “Mothers in Ohio are cutting back their milk purchases for their children because of soaring prices. Is this the kind of economy Ohioans should accept? Well, my opponent Tim Ryan has spent two decades in the Washington Swamp wholeheartedly supporting exactly the globalist, corporatist policies that bring America to this awful economic predicament ...Ryan votes with Biden an astounding 100% of the time. ” “Ryan has worked his whole professional life on the public dole, first as a bureaucrat and then spent this century as a typical politician, speaking like a moderate and acting as a radical.I present a whole new approach. As an outsider and a businessman, I buck the establishment and bring to the race the experience of building businesses in the private sector, paying employees and creating success in Ohio.” “I will demand that we onshore again, tomake things again in Ohio , rather than relying on dicey supply lines from Asia. I will also insist that the open borders madness of Biden and Ryan end , in part to lift the wages of Ohioans who should never have to compete in the job market against unlawful and unjust competition from illegal migrants,” JD wrote. JD HIT BACK Hillary “Crooked” Clinton’s shameful attacks on Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas. JD CORPORATE HYPOCRISY on Fox Business, as many companies are beginning to provide employees with financial incentives to receive abortions, while not granting the same benefits to employees who decide to have children. "You have a lot of big, multinational corporations saying they're going give $4,000 to people to cross state lines to get an abortion. Of course they wouldn't give $4,000 to somebody who wants to have a baby," JD said. THE WASHINGTON EXAMINER’S SELENA ZITO the shrinking regional airport infrastructure in the American Midwest. JD COMMENTED on : “Rising fuel costs have made routes ‘in places like Toledo unprofitable.’ Tim Ryan and Joe Biden’s energy policies strike again.” From Zito’s piece: “In the same way that the railroad was a major factor in a region's economic viability, so are smaller cities' airports. This is a story that few in our elite class will care about because they cannot see how it affects them, just as they could not see how a factory closing down so many years ago would affect them. But it did, it does, and it will. The disdainful term "flyover country" implies a world of bitter Bible-and-gun clingers, deplorables, and ultra-MAGAs. It implies that the lives and industries of half the U.S. population are ignorable — that is, until the people, places, and problems they ignored begin to affect national politics. That is about the time the elites in New York and Washington start asking again what happened when another election result blows their closed minds.” JD PRESIDENT TRUMP’S TARIFFS, a crucial plank of the America first policy agenda. "Tariffs encourage American manufacturers to stay close to home. Part of the reason why we have a terrible inflation crisis is we don’t make enough of our own stuff ... we've made the terrible mistake of relying on the Chinese to make the things that we need ... If we walk backwards on this stuff, we are going to pay a huge price economically." JD JOINED MARTHA MACCALLUM to Tim Ryan’s failed record on tax cuts. "I am pro middle class tax cuts ... [Tim Ryan] has opposed every single effort to cut the taxes of the middle class, so he’s running away from his record again ... we have to fix the fundamentals of this Joe Biden economy. That is where we really have to do the work. Not with gimmicks from a guy who's never supported a real tax cut in his life." THE SPECTATOR WORLD Tim Ryan’s radicalism on abortion: “Ohio Democratic Senate candidate Tim Ryan said there should be no abortion restrictions at all,establishing himself as radical even by pro-choice standards ... the United States is among only six nations that allow elective abortions at any time during pregnancy. The other five are Canada, South Korea, Vietnam, North Korea, and China ... Tim Ryan’s approach to abortion will only endear him to left-wing fanatics in places like New York and California, not voters in the Buckeye State. ” ON WBKN RADIO, JD on Joe Biden and Janet Yellen’s warnings of food shortages: "It makes me feel like we live in a third-world country ... Moms can't feed their children and the Secretary of the Treasury is saying prepare for even worse." BREITBART Tim Ryan’s opposition to term limits. Perhaps , Tim Ryan opposes term limits because he’s spent his whole life as a career politician. “Twenty-year career politician and Democrat Senate hopeful Rep.Tim Ryan (OH) said during a recent interview he does not support term limits and ‘there should be very few restrictions,’ despite polling showing a majority of voters say they want limits on members of Congress ... However, his Trump-backed Republican opponent, J.D. Vance , said he ‘definitely support[s] term limits’ and is ‘actually a signer of the term limits pledge.’ ‘I think that one thing that happens in government is people get in there, and it turns into a career instead of an act of public service,’” Vance added. JD about big tech’s censorship of Donald Trump Jr.’s Instagram account: “We won't save our country unless we rein in the technology oligarchs.You don't have a real country if the channels of communication are controlled in this way.” RADIO ROUNDABOUT: JD spoke with many of Ohio’s favorite radio hosts! With With SOCIAL: Remember to follow us on , , , and @JDVance1! Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Trump News HQ
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvspfc9vo1jai95sad187661u69jgqhjfo86mv8o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr7d9nc3ie2tr4egr3dclh6kr3edjncgq7dcthchjrfcpgssp6ct1gs1qm2ohnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666obbd9nmti6cdj4mdgefc5lclp238h1e8he4933clhmeo71c3i68oh5u)
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm31051ke7k6gpsndnc2velh54m6ukm0shps7l5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctge2o74chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z247t8vqa8a8vb8rgcov6feqbeejna41g63q8958_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctge2o74chh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9j0mu6ofpd25jmomvi5h593hjrkl5irrh628oj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctge2o74chh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc12qqdp01rdt0thto9mr1tpt7cnl1fslejji2eg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctge2o74chh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
