name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: we can't go back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
I believe with my whole heart that we should all be in charge of what happens to our bodies.
| | |
---
Peter, I believe with my whole heart that we should all be in charge of what happens to our bodies.
The Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade has taken away a right that we have counted on for nearly 50 years. Before Roe, folks were prosecuted or even jailed for seeking abortions. Others died from the often unsafe and dangerous procedures that were forced to happen behind closed doors. People would travel across city limits, state lines, and even national borders to receive the care they needed.
**With this new ruling, that's the world we're heading back to. **Partisan extremists will have the power to restrict reproductive freedoms. They could ban interstate travel to receive abortion care. They could incarcerate patients, their doctors, and their nurses. They could criminalize just the very act of seeking information about abortions. They could even ban abortion nationwide.
**But this isn't just about abortion. It is about protecting women’s autonomy, their power to make their own decisions, and their equality.**
The Court's ruling is devastating, it's ruthless, and it goes against our Constitution's tenants of liberty and equality for all. I refuse to accept that this is our future. We must give people the capacity to think for themselves, to choose their own futures, to control their own bodies.
As a nurse and a mom, I know that our country must provide compassionate and good care for everyone – that includes contraception and the right to an abortion. **As senator, you have my word that I will work night and day to pass legislation that codifies Roe v. Wade into law and restore the reproductive freedoms that we've counted on for generations.**
The majority of Americans are with us on this. But powerful forces are bankrolling a vocal, radical minority – and right now, they're winning. **We must unite together to make our voices heard today and at the polls in November.[So please, can I count on you to make a grassroots donation to support my campaign and stand for reproductive freedom? Every grassroots donation puts us one step closer to building the coalition we need to win on election day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47328349/353871353/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk101-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYyZjI4MC0zMWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oR0GEStRVKCuBFOYplQ222g8bKC_9cJI9J_inDBF8Ok=)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America was founded as a Christian nation
body:
Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWLF151hiN)
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418075:WLF151hiN:m:1:2532013465:28C3A2DA95D126CE956C634AE0D7B6CA:r)
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418075:WLF151hiN:m:1:2532013465:28C3A2DA95D126CE956C634AE0D7B6CA:r)
---
Hello,

Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government.

That simply isn't true, and I can prove it. In my brand-new coffee-table style book, _America Is a Christian Natio_ n, you can see how our country has moved from its reliance on God to its rejection of God. It's a short read, and we've paired the written content with some gorgeous patriotic photos that you're going to enjoy looking through.

---
| | [LEARN THE TRUTH](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418075:WLF151hiN:m:1:2532013465:28C3A2DA95D126CE956C634AE0D7B6CA:r)
---
I would love for you to read through _America Is a Christian Nation_ so that you can understand how our country has moved from its reliance on God to its rejection of God. It's a short read, and we've paired the written content with some gorgeous patriotic photos that you're going to enjoy looking through.
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418075:WLF151hiN:m:1:2532013465:28C3A2DA95D126CE956C634AE0D7B6CA:r)
---
In appreciation for any gift you are able to make to _Pathway to Victory_ today, we'd like to send you a copy of this book along with a DVD copy of my message, _America is a Christian Nation_. **And thanks to our $500,000 Gospel Advance matching challenge, any donation you make will be doubled** to help _Pathway to Victory_ reach twice as many listeners and viewers across the country. That means that twice as many people will hear one of the most controversial things I've ever said: that **America was founded as a Christian nation!**

You only have until midnight on July 4th to take advantage of this incredible matching gift opportunity, so make sure you visit this link today: **[https://ptv.org/donate/july-2022-america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418075:WLF151hiN:m:1:2532013465:28C3A2DA95D126CE956C634AE0D7B6CA:r)**
---
[DOUBLE MY IMPACT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418075:WLF151hiN:m:1:2532013465:28C3A2DA95D126CE956C634AE0D7B6CA:r)
---
You may already be convinced that America was founded as a Christian nation and that we have strayed far from that foundation. The question in that case is, how do we get back? You'll find the answer to that question as well at the end of _America Is a Christian Nation_.

As believers, we need to do all we can to both preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. I hope you'll stand with me in doing so, and make double the impact at the same time.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

name: Team Benson
subject: The August 2nd primary
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

We’re exactly one month away from the August Primary. Over the next month, Michigan voters will be mailing in their absentee ballots or making plans to head to the polls on Primary Day – August 2 – to cast their vote. Jocelyn will be presiding over it all, working with local clerks to ensure that our election process remains safe, secure, and transparent.

Just imagine if Kristina Karamo were in charge of our election process. The non-partisan job of administering an election would become a politicized disaster. She’d be working every angle to make it harder for people to vote. Worse yet, she might not even be paying attention to the hard work that elections require, but rather would be figuring out ways to chip away at other important rights Michiganders now enjoy. Either way, our elections would lose Jocelyn’s steady and clear-minded leadership.

Whether you’re a Democrat, Republican, or an independent, there is just one choice to make sure everyone has their vote counted to protect our democracy.

We’re one month away from our first major Primary since 2020. The smooth and non-partisan nature of these elections should be another reminder to us all that we need to re-elect Jocelyn to Secretary of State in November. Pitch in today, friend, and help us make that possible. >> [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=070222

-Team Benson

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Really need your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fam61xZKNDO1FhHnF2Bnzgnucw6%2Bh86l&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We are at a critical moment for the future of our country:
* The fundamental civil and human rights of women evaporated when the conservative U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade.
* Justice Clarence Thomas signaled that precedents protecting same-sex marriage and contraception should be next on the chopping block.
* Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are considering a nationwide ban on abortion if they take back the Senate.

It's clearer than ever: We _must_ protect and expand Democratic control of the Senate to stop the GOP's extremist agenda and protect our cherished rights. **That 's why my campaign is ramping up its efforts to protect this Democratic seat - and it's why I'm coming to you directly seeking feedback to help my strategy.**
**[Input from grassroots supporters like you is essential to creating the kind of country we want to live in, so I'm asking: Will you please take just a moment to let me know what issues matter most to you? We just opened this new survey and are counting on 85 more responses from our most engaged supporters before midnight. ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-2022-july-priorities?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1213-su-nd)**
What's happening on the Supreme Court isn't random, Friend. Restricting the rights of women, putting bodily autonomy into the hands of the government, and preventing government intervention to stop gun violence - it's all the result of decades of right-wing efforts to force a backward, dangerous agenda on the American people.
Their agenda is extreme and not representative of the majority of Americans' priorities. **But my willingness to stand up against the Republican Party has made me a target. I know that the only way I can ensure we keep this seat blue is with the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you.**
**[So please, will you share your feedback on our newest strategy? We have a number of campaign strategy meetings coming up this week, and I want to make sure that this grassroots team's thoughts are well reflected. ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-2022-july-priorities?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1213-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=c5JWLa1znFNofUlWM4tRJAnucw6%2Bh86l&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: Gas, Groceries, and Gangs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
‌ |
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/gas-groceries-and-gangs?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| Gas, Groceries, and Gangs.
Whenever I ask voters what’s most important to them those three things inevitably come up.

And I get it.

**You see, I am not a wealthy man. **

I’m the son of immigrants who fled to the U.S. to escape communism.

I went to public schools right here in Arizona...

And even though I’ve argued THREE cases in the United States Supreme Court...

I didn’t get my legal education at some fancy Ivy League.

**Nope!**

I pump my own gas...

And just like you, I flinch each time the price-per-gallon goes up another $0.20...$0.40...$0.55

I go to the supermarket and buy my own groceries...

And just like you, it hurts when the same basket of groceries cost $30 more than it did last week.

I get it, I really do...

**And don’t even get me started on gangs.**

If you haven’t seen how the Biden Administration’s horrific border policies are making the state of Arizona more dangerous...

Then your head must be buried in the sand.

**Arizonans DESERVE secure borders, period. **

And yet since Biden took office...

He’s gone to work defunding law enforcement while ignoring the federal laws that could help protect our borders.

No wonder cross-border human smuggling is up dramatically...

And dangerous drugs like fentanyl are flooding into our state and causing tens-of-thousands of tragic deaths.

**_I’m almost surprised nobody’s made a “Cartel Members for Biden” sticker yet..._**

Because these murderous thugs are now THRIVING...

And it’s all thanks to the disastrous policies of President Biden and Mark Kelly.

Yep, I went there.

**Mark Kelly. The guy who:**

_Flip-flopped on Title 42 after first voting against it on multiple occasions. _

_Voted with Biden and the Democrats to defund border security and wall construction. _

_Voted against the Migrant Protection Protocols policy..._

_Opposed prioritizing the arrest of illegal immigrants charged with violent crimes. _

_And voted to fund sanctuary cities. _

That’s Mark Kelly...

**And it’s why I’m running for his Senate Seat. **

Arizonians Arizonans deserve a real leader who has a REAL track record on border security.

As your Attorney General, I have that track record ([you can view it here](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=5d3e4c3852&e=6dcd2506d1))...

And as your Senator...

I’ll continue to make YOUR voice heard...

By standing up to Joe Biden and his out-of-touch lackies in Washington.

**\- Mark **

P.S. It’s kind of funny, but one of my primary opponents was all for open borders throughout his twenties. He says he’s not now, but it’s hard to say. Can you guess who I’m talking about?

P.P.S. Feel free to forward this email to any friends or family members who you think would agree with what I’m saying. And if they want, [**they** **can also sign up to get emails from me here.**](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=3f08f55a04&e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| | PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE.

---

Phoenix, AZ 85007

body:
This summer, join WFP staff and other campaign experts on Tuesday and Thursday evenings for free in-depth modules on how to turn movement energy into real electoral and legislative power. | | | Peter, this is not a moment to idly stand by and wait for our government to act on our behalf. As working-class communities continue to be crushed under the weight of stagnant wages, rising costs of living, mounting debt, environmental calamities, and the dismantlement of long-established rights and protections — this is a time to organize, mobilize, and empower each other to rise up in sustained mass resistance. **That’s why we’re really excited to announce our new program — WFP Campaign Camp — designed to provide grassroots organizers and activists with the tools they need to win elections and continue fighting for the poor, the working class, and the marginalized in moments like this.[This summer, join WFP staff and other campaign experts on Tuesday and Thursday evenings for free in-depth modules on how to turn movement energy into real electoral and legislative power.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2swAoyfZsL4N4PP7ODCECnb-L57w1QZevCbV76RmfYMd2uTXQ5Ei6H2FqJ34F9MIOMCbyZzPseznSPejfb3NQKlG21iCM7kc-PEEhRnbk2VYe-d9lHq7T-YfB74E6jB3vXjr4E4xAJjaspF-hTzu7l3AkhjxbVRf9GSB6EmV6Lzes-2lUoI2eD22e6_ioVkJUgkmoJxZ9MLG0nZrgu9hnHRdOtS1ht0aR82nI5A4iJnHw/3ne/v2q7uUzeQz6yzocLjmdCdw/h0/VVMM1ni3n9VaQgtyoCNs26F44-QGGWza64ThKjlzsJs)** The devastating ruling to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ was the culmination of a 50 year strategy by Christian white nationalists to maneuver themselves into a right-wing supermajority on the Supreme Court.
In order to fight back and turn popular demands like codifying abortion rights, abolishing the filibuster, and expanding the court into government policy — we need to build up our own organized mass movement. We need to invest in each other, and share the knowledge and expertise of what allows us to win, and keep building up the power of the multi-racial working-class party we are crafting together. **At WFP Campaign Camp we aim to offer a powerful set of training modules that build on your own skills, experience, and passion — and take it to the next level.[Whether you’re a candidate, thinking about running for office, or an activist looking to sharpen your political campaign skills, join us at one or all of our training modules held every Tuesday and Thursday evening from July 12th to August 4th, 2022!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2swAoyfZsL4N4PP7ODCECnb-L57w1QZevCbV76RmfYMd2uTXQ5Ei6H2FqJ34F9MIOOLJtW-YXOikpl1dyXMDf_w-WG9W4tiHBzpxUB27ZuveOeY_m7FplR9nF74iceU75nbf54oA6rR07bNty-DaAoMrOdYe7GFBoYIUS_BXCjqvMue3Iac7jtxjCINlDtXcq3JZn3lyq5-Z8w-hk1Fc711NzorsHRSGHvqhid0EgTwAQ/3ne/v2q7uUzeQz6yzocLjmdCdw/h3/0e0VYHuyZ7q-4zD9YnsT04wq8rSx0Sq-kc5kj85csSg)** **[Join us at Campaign Camp!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2swAoyfZsL4N4PP7ODCECnb-L57w1QZevCbV76RmfYMd2uTXQ5Ei6H2FqJ34F9MIOMX5HH804t6_fZES4OedwFxXd0fK8v4xlqt2Aqq7JlP6S7v1SK3qSd7m5WmSnJJ2etOudNdTs4hxkDH4aPxteGqzyLFBBi1FpFXdVRdAEkotm9Fe_l2y2_J0wzMWZM0jukzvo45TlH89dxQqEquI9oj1JhRtWE7EUzh6RGyGqIeqA/3ne/v2q7uUzeQz6yzocLjmdCdw/h4/NCejmTjySeaDBzDH57ER8orHm1kykbEYrkH2FvucqaM)** In solidarity,

clean_body: This summer, join WFP staff and other campaign experts on Tuesday and Thursday evenings for free in-depth modules on how to turn movement energy into real electoral and legislative power. | | | Peter, this is not a moment to idly stand by and wait for our government to act on our behalf. As working-class communities continue to be crushed under the weight of stagnant wages, rising costs of living, mounting debt, environmental calamities, and the dismantlement of long-established rights and protections — this is a time to organize, mobilize, and empower each other to rise up in sustained mass resistance. That’s why we’re really excited to announce our new program — WFP Campaign Camp — designed to provide grassroots organizers and activists with the tools they need to win elections and continue fighting for the poor, the working class, and the marginalized in moments like this. The devastating ruling to overturn Roe v. Wade was the culmination of a 50 year strategy by Christian white nationalists to maneuver themselves into a right-wing supermajority on the Supreme Court. In order to fight back and turn popular demands like codifying abortion rights, abolishing the filibuster, and expanding the court into government policy — we need to build up our own organized mass movement. We need to invest in each other, and share the knowledge and expertise of what allows us to win, and keep building up the power of the multi-racial working-class party we are crafting together. At WFP Campaign Camp we aim to offer a powerful set of training modules that build on your own skills, experience, and passion — and take it to the next level. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Please Read This: PA After Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It's been over a week since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade._
Friend, we are seeing state after state rip away the right to choose. For example, last night, the Texas Supreme Court allowed a 1925 law criminalizing abortion to go into effect.
Abortion doctors can now be jailed for up to 10 years—no exceptions for rape or incest.
In Pennsylvania, abortion access remains safe and legal — for now, but if we come up short in November, that will change. Josh Shapiro’s opponent for Governor said banning abortion is his #1 priority.
And make no mistake, if John Fetterman‘s opponent wins this race for the US Senate, he’ll be one more vote to help Republicans enact a federal abortion ban.
_If the PA Republican Party, which has controlled the state legislature for 30 years, is able to hang on to control in the PA House — they will pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion — and the Governor can not veto that attempt._

clean_body: It's been over a week since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Friend, we are seeing state after state rip away the right to choose. For example, last night, the Texas Supreme Court allowed a 1925 law criminalizing abortion to go into effect. Abortion doctors can now be jailed for up to 10 years—no exceptions for rape or incest. In Pennsylvania, abortion access remains safe and legal — for now, but if we come up short in November, that will change. Josh Shapiro’s opponent for Governor said banning abortion is his #1 priority. And make no mistake, if John Fetterman‘s opponent wins this race for the US Senate, he’ll be one more vote to help Republicans enact a federal abortion ban. If the PA Republican Party, which has controlled the state legislature for 30 years, is able to hang on to control in the PA House — they will pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion — and the Governor can not veto that attempt. = I refuse to give up fighting. Everything is on the line. Are you with me? = = = = -Malcolm = * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 3254 Philadelphia, PA 19107 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
I'm so proud of the campaign we're building together.
#

Team -
Our team is still crunching the numbers from this week, but I wanted to reach out as soon as I could and say **_THANK YOU._**
Because of our people-powered movement's incredible support, we already know that we reached our fundraising goals and are in a strong position for the homestretch of this primary. Thank you.
I know that my team and I sent a lot of emails and texts about Thursday night's FEC deadline, and I hope you take that as a sign of how important our movement's grassroots support is in this race.
That's because this is a campaign for ALL New Yorkers — not just the wealthy and well-connected.
A campaign bold enough to stand up to the corporate and political establishment and demand that our representatives in Washington enact real progressive change — not make empty promises year after year.
A campaign powered by YOU and thousands of working people across New York and the entire country — not Wall Street banks and corporate PACs.
So, when you see our ads on TV or as you're scrolling through social media, when you see our volunteers out knocking doors and talking to voters across the district, and yes — when you see us **win** on the night of August 23 — please know it's your support that made it all possible.
I'm so proud of the campaign we're building together. From the bottom of my heart, thank you again.
52 days until Election Day. Let's make each and every one of them count.
Onward,
Alessandra

* * *
**This is going to be a very quick campaign, and since we're funding this campaign the right way — _together_ — we can't afford to slow down, not even for a day.**
[**If you can, please make a $3 contribution to stand with Alessandra and help us start July strong. Every donation will go directly toward contacting as many voters as possible so we can win this primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?refcode=em220702-1-t2&refcode2=894_59515_DWTstg&akid=894%2E59515%2EDWTstg)

clean_body: I'm so proud of the campaign we're building together. Team - Our team is still crunching the numbers from this week, but I wanted to reach out as soon as I could and say THANK YOU. Because of our people-powered movement's incredible support, we already know that we reached our fundraising goals and are in a strong position for the homestretch of this primary. Thank you. I know that my team and I sent a lot of emails and texts about Thursday night's FEC deadline, and I hope you take that as a sign of how important our movement's grassroots support is in this race. That's because this is a campaign for ALL New Yorkers — not just the wealthy and well-connected. A campaign bold enough to stand up to the corporate and political establishment and demand that our representatives in Washington enact real progressive change — not make empty promises year after year. A campaign powered by YOU and thousands of working people across New York and the entire country — not Wall Street banks and corporate PACs. So, when you see our ads on TV or as you're scrolling through social media, when you see our volunteers out knocking doors and talking to voters across the district, and yes — when you see us win on the night of August 23 — please know it's your support that made it all possible. I'm so proud of the campaign we're building together. From the bottom of my heart, thank you again. 52 days until Election Day. Let's make each and every one of them count. Onward, Alessandra This is going to be a very quick campaign, and since we're funding this campaign the right way — together — we can't afford to slow down, not even for a day. | ** Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress

Because of grassroots supporters like you, we were able to meet our second end-of-quarter fundraising goal for this election year. As the summer heats up and the campaign season gets busier, we are on track to continue building our momentum and keep Delaware blue.

It's never been more important to spread our message, defend my record against false attacks, and push back against the forces threatening our democracy and our basic rights. These are difficult times that will test us — and the work we are doing to elect pro-choice, pro-voting rights, and pro-working families leaders truly matters.

I’ll always keep working for the people of Delaware, and with supporters like you, I know we can continue to make real progress.

Thank you so much,

Lisa Blunt Rochester ** ** | **Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. body:
I hope you'll read this to the end
| | |
---
Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47329064/353875298/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3676-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFiNTgyZi0zOWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RwShQT_mjh8wIBdgioRzRvmcD6pnFaaVDSGrhBHxBM=)

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Abortion resources in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Want to know how you can get involved in the wake of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade?
Here are abortion access resources in PA that you can use if you need access to abortion or you want to take action:

- The Women's Center - [https://www.thewomenscenters.com/take-action/]

- Abortion in PA Toolkit - [https://bit.ly/WeTakeCareofUsPA]

- Abortion Liberation Fund of PA - [https://abortionfundpa.org/]

It's been less than a week since half the nation lost the right to make decisions about our lives and bodies. Soon, half the states will have abortion bans, which disproportionately harm Black, Latino, and Indigenous people, young people, LGBTQ+ people, and those with low income due to systemic racism and discrimination.

This Red Alert Report from Planned Parenthood lays out some of what we can expect in the coming months, and it's devastating: https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/pressroom/red-alert-what-we-can-expect-if-the-u-s-supreme-court-overturns-roe-v-wade

And this fight is FAR from over. Terrifyingly, if Mastriano becomes our next governor, we'll be one of the states to ban abortion. The PA legislature passed a ban last year, and we were only saved by the governor's veto. And the anti-abortion movement has been working on a well-coordinated and funded effort that aims to pass a national ban to make abortion virtually inaccessible.
But there's hope. We can take action now. Let's make this a summer of action and protest, because we cannot just sit back and let them take away our freedoms and strip us of our human rights.

In solidarity,

Laura Nevitt
Executive Director
Keystone Progress

VISIT OUR SITE [https://www.kpef.info/]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info [http://www.kpef.info/] . Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

Starting July 1, Floridians will enjoy "Freedom Week" thanks to the leadership of America's Governor. Freedom Week will serve as a sales tax holiday to provide tax breaks on a wide range of recreational activities and outdoor gear, just in time for summer!

Florida's First Lady Casey DeSantis is on a mission to mobilize a million mamas committed to re-electing the most pro-family Governor in America: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.

The First Lady kicked off the Mamas for DeSantis campaign with a statewide listening tour meeting with mamas in the Panhandle, Jacksonville, Hillsborough County, Boca Raton, and Miami-Dade. body:
Running for office takes a lot of effort.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47329302/353876689/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBmNDk2MS0zZGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=83X32-LpSViiu7OTSrzH6kJBWO3np1Xhq19RfBpcZtQ=)

Hi friends,

I wanted to take a moment and express my gratitude for your support and generosity over the last major fundraising quarter.

Our campaign is heading into this general election season with an incredible team that is ready to win this ultra-competitive district, and I'm so glad you're a part of it.

I'll be honest: Running for office isn't easy. It takes up all of your time and energy, but I'm constantly revitalized and motivated to keep going because of the wonderful people that I'm meeting on the campaign trail.

I'm running for Congress _for them_ – not for the ultra-rich and well connected power brokers. Working families are the backbone of our country and our economy, and it's time that someone was looking out for them in Congress.

I'm ready to win, and with you on my team, I know we will. Thank you for being on this journey with me.

Wishing you the best,

Nikki | **A BRIEF NOTE FROM NIKKI'S TEAM:**

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in a competitive district – her campaign was recently added to the prestigious "Red-to-Blue" list.

**Our new fundraising quarter has already begun, and this one is going to be the most important one to date. Looking toward November, we need to raise money to turn out every voter possible.**

clean_body: Running for office takes a lot of effort. | = Hi friends, I wanted to take a moment and express my gratitude for your support and generosity over the last major fundraising quarter. Our campaign is heading into this general election season with an incredible team that is ready to win this ultra-competitive district, and I'm so glad you're a part of it. I'll be honest: Running for office isn't easy. It takes up all of your time and energy, but I'm constantly revitalized and motivated to keep going because of the wonderful people that I'm meeting on the campaign trail. I'm running for Congress for them – not for the ultra-rich and well connected power brokers. Working families are the backbone of our country and our economy, and it's time that someone was looking out for them in Congress. I'm ready to win, and with you on my team, I know we will. Thank you for being on this journey with me. Wishing you the best, Nikki | A BRIEF NOTE FROM NIKKI'S TEAM: Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in a competitive district – her campaign was recently added to the prestigious "Red-to-Blue" list. Our new fundraising quarter has already begun, and this one is going to be the most important one to date. Looking toward November, we need to raise money to turn out every voter possible. = | = | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country. Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. name: Team Beto
subject: Re: Lawrence O'Donnell’s polling analysis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto needs all of our support.
#
It's officially the third quarter of 2022, and we have just over four months until Election Day. Here’s where things stand:
**FIRST:** Recent polling shows Beto gaining on Greg Abbott! Since jumping in this race, Beto has cut Abbott’s lead by 10 points.
**THEN:** Lawrence O'Donnell discussed the state of this race on MSNBC, reporting that _"Greg Abbott's re-election numbers are collapsing."_
**NOW:** We need to capitalize on this momentum, and that means having the resources to spread Beto's positive, unifying vision across every part of Texas.
**[Will you donate $3 or more right now to help power Beto's campaign to be the next governor of Texas? Every dollar will go toward organizing on the ground to mobilize historic turnout in November.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220702-1.bMXUbV&refcode=ema20220702-196588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=196588%2E444211%2EIV5AnG)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220702-1.bMXUbV&refcode=ema20220702-196588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=196588%2E444211%2EIV5AnG)**
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our organizing power is unmatched. In the aftermath of the Supreme Court decision that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , our team was able to knock on over 30,279 doors in just one weekend. **But to defeat Greg Abbott in November, we'll have to compete with him not only on the ground but also on the airwaves.**
Abbott has announced nearly $20 million in ad buys over the past week including a major $8.8 million TV buy. This is on top of the $4 million that Abbott spent on TV ads before the primary election — an unprecedented amount attacking Beto.
**With so much on the line, we can't let Abbott drown out our momentum by spending millions of dollars on attack ads.** We need your help to meet this moment, counter Abbott's hateful attacks, and end his divisive, corrupt governorship.
Together, we can ensure that Beto is able to spread the word about Abbott's failed leadership far and wide. But Beto needs _all_ of our support to make it happen. **[Please, will you chip in $3 or more right now to help expand our momentum and prepare for the fights ahead?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220702-1.bMXUbV&refcode=ema20220702-196588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=196588%2E444211%2EIV5AnG)**

Beto for Texas

clean_body: Beto needs all of our support. It's officially the third quarter of 2022, and we have just over four months until Election Day. Here’s where things stand: FIRST: Recent polling shows Beto gaining on Greg Abbott! Since jumping in this race, Beto has cut Abbott’s lead by 10 points. THEN: Lawrence O'Donnell discussed the state of this race on MSNBC, reporting that "Greg Abbott's re-election numbers are collapsing." NOW: We need to capitalize on this momentum, and that means having the resources to spread Beto's positive, unifying vision across every part of Texas. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our organizing power is unmatched. In the aftermath of the Supreme Court decision that overturned Roe v. Wade , our team was able to knock on over 30,279 doors in just one weekend. But to defeat Greg Abbott in November, we'll have to compete with him not only on the ground but also on the airwaves. Abbott has announced nearly $20 million in ad buys over the past week including a major $8.8 million TV buy. This is on top of the $4 million that Abbott spent on TV ads before the primary election — an unprecedented amount attacking Beto. With so much on the line, we can't let Abbott drown out our momentum by spending millions of dollars on attack ads. We need your help to meet this moment, counter Abbott's hateful attacks, and end his divisive, corrupt governorship. Together, we can ensure that Beto is able to spread the word about Abbott's failed leadership far and wide. But Beto needs all of our support to make it happen. In solidarity, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

body:
By midnight, I'll have to make my fundraising numbers public
Peter – did you see my last message? I'm still **$18,764** behind on my critical goal, and my reporting deadline is at midnight tonight.
---
By midnight, I'll have to make my fundraising numbers public – and if the GOP sees that we are falling short of our fundraising goals, they will pour money into New Mexico to flip our state red.
**I'm only 4 points ahead of my far-right extremist opponent in a recent poll, so please:[Will you donate $5 or more right now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47329409/353877152/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1340-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2NlODUyZC00MGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_tzD9VPnqMd_YV-hLcvZCRAorLHQHSsKDEiHqAF5pro=)**

**I'm committed to taking bold action on climate change, safeguarding abortion access, and supporting working families – but I can't win reelection without your help. I'm just _4 points_ ahead in a poll, and I know I'll fall behind if I come up short tonight.**

body:
We don't have much time to respond:
| | | Team, we don't have much time to respond:

The Supreme Court has officially overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and Vice President Harris needs us to speak out NOW.

**Your help has gotten us this far – but with the GOP and the Treason Caucus’ relentless efforts to destroy our democracy – the hard work has only just begun.**

name: AOTL Breaking News
subject: Our right to fair elections is under attack as you read this…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

**“How the Supreme Court could radically reshape elections for president and Congress”**
\-- NPR

[**Our right to fair elections is under attack as you read this.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329767/353880619/2008317901?refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=)
---
[HELP US FIGHT BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329768/353880620/2008317901?refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=)
The Republican Party is pushing the nonsensical “independent state legislature theory,” which could give state legislatures complete control of congressional redistricting and federal elections. Under their theory, it is possible that neither governors, nor courts, nor independent commissions get any say in the process. And now, conservative justices on the U.S. Supreme Court have agreed to hear a North Carolina case that tests this new legal “theory.”

**Unsurprisingly, if the Court embraces this theory, it would benefit state legislatures controlled by Republicans, but also could hurt states with independent redistricting commissions.**

At All On The Line, we have worked tirelessly for the past years to encourage states to make their redistricting process fair and transparent. To support the use of independent commissions in the redistricting process. To include communities that have been excluded in the past and need a voice.

And now, Republicans are asking the Supreme Court to destroy all of this progress

**[This is an existential moment for redistricting. Either we continue our fight to ensure fairness, equality, and inclusion during this process or many fair map wins may be wiped out in a single Supreme Court decision. Now more than ever, we need you. Please help contribute or we risk losing so much of what we’ve worked for.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329769/353880621/2008317901?refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329774/353880653/2008317901?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329775/353880654/2008317901?refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=)
One can only imagine what the redistricting process will look like if we lose this fight. Shameless Republican state legislatures will create maps that exclude marginalized communities and pack them into districts to dilute their vote. They will make the process closed off and unavailable to the wider public, just like the chaotic and undemocratic process in Texas.

[**Now is not the time to sit back and watch. This is possibly the most dangerous attempt yet by the Republican Party to destroy our democracy by preventing free and fair elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329776/353880655/2008317901?refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=)

**[If there was ever a time to help us, that time is now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47329777/353880656/2008317901?refcode=20220702_AOTL_F_isl2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlYWFiODkwLTQxZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eseot4KEJ86p_rxeJx75yz0OrxlZra-vgjmxlSreqx4=)**

clean_body: | “How the Supreme Court could radically reshape elections for president and Congress” \-- NPR = = The Republican Party is pushing the nonsensical “independent state legislature theory,” which could give state legislatures complete control of congressional redistricting and federal elections. Under their theory, it is possible that neither governors, nor courts, nor independent commissions get any say in the process. And now, conservative justices on the U.S. Supreme Court have agreed to hear a North Carolina case that tests this new legal “theory.” Unsurprisingly, if the Court embraces this theory, it would benefit state legislatures controlled by Republicans, but also could hurt states with independent redistricting commissions. At All On The Line, we have worked tirelessly for the past years to encourage states to make their redistricting process fair and transparent. To support the use of independent commissions in the redistricting process. To include communities that have been excluded in the past and need a voice. And now, Republicans are asking the Supreme Court to destroy all of this progress = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = One can only imagine what the redistricting process will look like if we lose this fight. Shameless Republican state legislatures will create maps that exclude marginalized communities and pack them into districts to dilute their vote. They will make the process closed off and unavailable to the wider public, just like the chaotic and undemocratic process in Texas. = = – The AOTL Team All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: American Action News
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlnnmatppclkbar8dfrkgr51u4gjq8godcjf50uo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctie4o35cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf5dr0e8pratdjm5j7dcpgm5p7cctkmmo62d1leirjeo3jmepncttgmcoe2t36esrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1ddl61rm4phkciqrcdtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z999he8hmhpq5n2cf0eecekbm7agvjj2pjgv2cfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctie4o35cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkbfo0mmbf2mia8c40aa5qfmne54knqip6s4bero_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctie4o35cph2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6peg6bq3b7el5bvqt1uq4k6go6bvfffg2og1mt8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctie4o35cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Our founding document says that life is a human right given to us by our Creator.

I believe this statement and believe that every life is precious which is why I’m proudly pro-life. This is a position I’ve had since I was a child and I’ve not wavered on it.

We in Virginia know firsthand what it sounds like when our elected officials disregard the most innocent among us and talk about them as if they’re some sort of trash to be discarded.

**_We must not become so callous as a society to reward these kinds of views. As your representative in Congress, I will always stand on the side of the words in our Declaration of Independence and on the side of saving innocent life._ **

As a mother of two incredible kids, I will always support life. **[It’s critical that Republicans like you act now to keep fighting and protect our democracy, our values, and our freedoms.](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=b65c30cf54e44365bcaa5c8f7f214647&_e=n9_htvwIGJv6Z7V7iyB9JCJ48idRW2iS9f8tWjEF8VlW7dgw46Z4L4qHoP8_I4zqWTNYRB406Db-ASCq5jO0XL70-q2ynPHemvtkxg8ubgEwM-jOSEiWmUILGJPVOdh71BPAUhSRYI3E4A8GyBzBlWNxNBPMH7KGXwXpR52Q7LVAZiM95OiCJX7CTBA26Iyg5OvIsnU_ojN2EtZJ0RrniENu6z8CDLhU5k4mH1Aex4ysPITp_gv49g_tR0jF1VjpJam6r0xIUDXr4ID47KK4jUZnhcNpY2lOjqahmdXqUaGmZf_x_jp2dPPyYb-pTpSVzMgx9IctzZxD3kgiuyhbmKgeAVmrNquGuxeq2w5fijcrQN_qnlKjWn_RWDizEcedAHcTTELz_OOX4oF_AxDiq-KoGziGRmTJfIIoTvuIjwiXEBRecruHtWAR-20wR6sByHBEAUESOxrRxDtQ-RZjorOeD-TtBjxnWjeZ6DR4n3FcnjqoKiJpAaSpkghR4Qmd)**

clean_body: we aren't done yet | Friend, It’s official. Roe V. Wade has been OVERTURNED. This is a MAJOR VICTORY for the pro-life community across the country. | Our founding document says that life is a human right given to us by our Creator. I believe this statement and believe that every life is precious which is why I’m proudly pro-life. This is a position I’ve had since I was a child and I’ve not wavered on it. We in Virginia know firsthand what it sounds like when our elected officials disregard the most innocent among us and talk about them as if they’re some sort of trash to be discarded. We must not become so callous as a society to reward these kinds of views. As your representative in Congress, I will always stand on the side of the words in our Declaration of Independence and on the side of saving innocent life. As a mother of two incredible kids, I will always support life. Thank you for your continued support. God Bless, Yesli Vega Official Republican Nominee Virginia's 7th Congressional District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Leader Allison Russo
subject: The fight for choice in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
These races have never been more important.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47323336/353857924/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNmZWIxZi0yMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9x4ViroryZhNw37mXuKYefnY_LeizQfuwrRcSU0PiEA=)

Team,
While we have known this time was coming for the last few weeks, it cannot be overstated how harmful and shocking it is to see Roe v. Wade overturned in the United States.
The rights that we as modern Americans have come to expect and live by will now be decided by state governments. This means we must channel our anger and outrage **to electing Nan Whaley as the Governor of Ohio and breaking the GOP supermajorities in our state legislature in November. **
**[You can start today by making a donation that will be split between my campaign and Nan’s campaign right now. Donate $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us protect the future of women’s healthcare and bodily autonomy in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47323337/353857925/1138364823?refcode=nw_em_220702_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNmZWIxZi0yMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9x4ViroryZhNw37mXuKYefnY_LeizQfuwrRcSU0PiEA=)**
If Mike DeWine is re-elected or if the GOP is able to maintain lopsided majorities in Ohio's legislature, there is absolutely no doubt they will immediately seek to ban abortions outright in our state. At the Statehouse we are already seeing extreme total abortion ban legislation, even without exceptions for rape or incest, work its way through committee hearings. Ohio's extreme GOP supermajority seeks to criminalize women and doctors who seek necessary care, and Mike DeWine promises to sign off on these "trigger ban" bills.

**[That’s why I need you to stand with me and Nan today and make a donation to our campaigns now. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47323338/353857926/1138364823?refcode=nw_em_220702_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNmZWIxZi0yMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9x4ViroryZhNw37mXuKYefnY_LeizQfuwrRcSU0PiEA=)**
We must come together for the next five months and do all we can to protect women and their families from extreme Republicans and their outrageous attempts to ban abortion.
In Solidarity,
Leader Allison Russo

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47323339/353857927/1138364823?refcode=nw_em_220702_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNmZWIxZi0yMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9x4ViroryZhNw37mXuKYefnY_LeizQfuwrRcSU0PiEA=)****

* * *

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Please help these young conservatives
body:
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z06nq09qav047usq2b296b9tbqu77d2mr9n7fbvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe4dj5ctj34t76edqr6tj0epinacdke6qe1cb46hr64ob6e5ge6pblmtgm6t30cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666obbd9gethmcdj4mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clhmep76c3i61oh5u)
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv11ljk1vi37l4qoisl6qgnp8e72v2rm65tmvn7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctieco74c3h2bs) Fellow Conservative, I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training programs is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. **My staff just sent me an urgent email to let me know the demand to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zek14fm1bb6ij6ono6kqghses3v9jvr592nfckc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctieco74c3h2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6g3icg4cpk8omngadf2qqiujbtrm9itercov1p8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctieco74c3h2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

subject: two scenarios between now and Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
(only one ends with us defeating Gov. DeSantis) |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330149/353883635/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220702_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2NTE3My00NmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8VAFKVAH2QEKcYGHSvMajTl4OaZKEp1zCSg7NEgDUVg=)

Team,

Election Day will be here before we know it, and we see two scenarios for what could happen between now and then:
* **SCENARIO 1:** We take things easy this summer. When the fall rolls around, we don't have the resources we need to counter Gov. DeSantis and his far-right, billionaire donors. **We’re forced to cut back our ads, curtail our organizing program, and DeSantis cruises to a LANDSLIDE victory.[_(Don’t let this happen; please contribute ASAP.)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330150/353883636/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220702_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2NTE3My00NmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8VAFKVAH2QEKcYGHSvMajTl4OaZKEp1zCSg7NEgDUVg=)**

* **SCENARIO 2:** We spend the rest of the summer raising the money we need to take on DeSantis. When the fall rolls around, we have the resources to counter Gov. DeSantis and his far-right, billionaire donors. **We _expand_ our ad program, we _accelerate_ our outreach to Floridians, and Charlie Crist _defeats_ Gov. DeSantis on November 8th.**

[_Now, we won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against: Gov. DeSantis has more than _$100 MILLION_ on hand to try and buy this election. But you can’t buy voters, so we don’t need to outraise him. We just need to raise enough to reach Floridians in every corner of the state.

And that’s where _you_ come in, team. Will you make an immediate donation to fund our ads and our organizing program across Florida?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330151/353883637/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220702_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2NTE3My00NmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8VAFKVAH2QEKcYGHSvMajTl4OaZKEp1zCSg7NEgDUVg=)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Help elect these pro-choice candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’ve got big plans over the next few months to help Becca Balint, Kim Schrier, and Maxwell Frost win their primaries and general elections.
#
Peter,
**Three pro-choice congressional candidates that Pramila is supporting need our help to reach voters and win their elections.** So, we’re rolling up our sleeves and hitting the phones to help elect Becca Balint (VT-AL) and Maxwell Frost (FL-10), and re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier (WA-8).
It’s so critical that right now we elect leaders who will unequivocally stand up for abortion access in America. We need pro-choice champions who will vote to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law and urge immediate action to protect abortion access for millions of people. The right-wing GOP and Supreme Court will not stop trying to roll back our rights.
**So, can you join us and sign up for a virtual phone bank shift this week?** _Talking directly to voters in Vermont, Florida, and Washington on the phone is a great way to help elect pro-choice leaders!_
**Virtual Phone Bank for Becca Balint**
3-hour shifts available every day at 11am, 2pm & 5pm Eastern
[**More Info & Sign Up here**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14511?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=1&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
**[Make Calls for Becca »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14511?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=2&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)**
**Virtual Phone Bank for Maxwell Frost**
3-hour shifts available every day at 12:30pm, 3:30pm & 5pm Eastern
[**More Info & Sign Up here**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14512?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=3&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
**[Make Calls for Maxwell »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14512?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=4&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)**
**Virtual Phone Bank for Dr. Kim Schrier**
Thursdays 5:30 - 7:30pm Pacific
[**More Info & Sign Up here**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14513?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=5&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
**[Make Calls for Kim »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14513?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=6&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)**
Each campaign will provide training for anyone who signs up and you can make calls from home!
As the Senate Majority Leader in the Vermont General Assembly, **Becca Balint** worked closely with her colleagues to pass some of the strongest reproductive rights protections in the nation. [**Make calls for Becca »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14511?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=7&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
**Maxwell Frost** is the progressive, people-first, pro-choice Democrat we need to win an open congressional seat in Florida’s 10th District. He’s a young activist ready to fight alongside Pramila in Congress for Medicare for All, abortion rights, and justice for all. [**Make calls for Maxwell »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14512?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=8&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
**Rep. Kim Schrier** , Pramila’s colleague in the House, will continue to be a champion for reproductive rights in Congress. But Kim’s district, WA-8, is purple. In fact, Kim was the first Democrat ever elected to WA-8 in 2018. Republicans have listed Kim’s seat as a top target for conservatives to flip this year — when you volunteer for Kim, you’re supporting abortion rights & protecting our Democratic majority. [**Make calls for Kim »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14513?utm_source=em20220702-1394-jayapal&t=9&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
At a time when abortion rights are being stripped from folks in states across the country, it’s critical that we organize in support of pro-choice candidates. Thanks for doing your part.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220702-1394-footer&t=10&refcode2=1394_420207_NXpZ0e&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=11&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=1394%2E420207%2ENXpZ0e)

Friend, there's no doubt that liberals are after our guns. **The real question is, what are we going to do about it?** When Biden nominated an anti-gun advocate to lead the government's Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms, **Donald Trump Jr. was on the front lines exposing him for wanting to forcibly take guns away from law abiding American citizens. And thanks to Don, the nomination was sunk.** This important win made Don Jr. realize that there was an opportunity to **better organize pro-Second Amendment efforts** and dominate the modern, digital battlefield of ideas, and the 2A Task Force was born. Today, the group is laser-focused on engaging grassroots activists to defend their Constitutional rights. Like a special ops team of advocates, the group rapidly mobilizes when Biden nominates personnel who could infringe on the Second Amendment, and to oppose executive or legislative action that curbs the rights of gun owners and families.

Friend, a majority of voters support a woman’s right to choose.
This is a winning issue for Democrats across the country – especially in battleground NV-03.
**That’s why we have to keep Susie Lee’s critical message on the air across this district for as long as possible. **
Don’t forget – winning this toss-up race is not only crucial for abortion rights in Nevada, but for women nationwide.
Speaker Pelosi said it loud and clear: Republicans only need five House seats to take back the majority, and if they do, they’ll pass a federal ban on abortion.
This is a make-or-break moment for our chance to define this race, protect this seat, and save our House majority so Democrats can codify _Roe_.
**But if Susie’s ad goes dark, our strategy falls flat, friend.** We need as many voters as possible to see this ad and know that Susie Lee – a staunch fighter for reproductive rights in Congress – is up against a radical, anti-choice Republican this November.

Peter: Lieutenant Governor John Fetterman’s Senate campaign is a much-needed win for many reasons. And, with the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , we need a Senate that is unabashedly pro-choice. Fetterman is a sure vote to codify _Roe_ and, if elected, will do everything in his power to back the reinforcement of fundamental human rights.

NAME, one thing is abundantly clear: A 50-50 split in the Senate is not enough. We need a Democratic supermajority to defend reproductive rights. That means we must invest early in races like John Fetterman’s to push purple states blue. [_**So, can you pitch in $5, $10, or anything you can and help send John Fetterman to the Senate?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47326911/353865085/-1958588207?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220702-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwZGI0NWFkLTI5ZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AOuf3ApqXs7Gk-A22g5rxcAImYd2FSMS3W9ChzDwQv0=)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Fighting for our common good this Independence Day weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I was honored to defend those values when I served in the military, and I will be just as honored to defend them in Congress.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330707/353886842/-454070568?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.02_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWVlZTAzNi01MGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otlvBZlvKVzxlvIJzhPCO0m5KWuAGEu6bNv_u4a9sQo=) Hi Derek,

I wanted to reach out today to wish you and your family a Happy Independence Day and a safe and fun long weekend.

The Fourth of July marks the ratification of the Declaration of Independence and the beginning of our country’s great struggle for the universal rights of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

**I was honored to defend those values when I served in the military, and I will be just as honored to defend them in Congress.**

It’s been a long journey, and this weekend allows us time to reflect on just how far we’ve come – and how far we still have to go for our freedoms. But the fight for our common good lives on, and I’m ready to get to work to make sure our government fulfills its promises.

I also wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Folks like you stepped up this past week to help my campaign end June on a high note. Thanks to all of you, my team will be able to put together a strong fundraising report for the Federal Election Commission built on our people-powered team here in western Pennsylvania.

Thank you, and once again, Happy Fourth of July!

Chris Deluzio

P.S. If you weren’t able to donate before our quarterly fundraising deadline, no worries! You can **[chip in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330708/353886843/-454070568?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.02_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWVlZTAzNi01MGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otlvBZlvKVzxlvIJzhPCO0m5KWuAGEu6bNv_u4a9sQo=)** to help us get a head start on our next big goal. body:

| | Dear Friend, Everywhere we look, we see the bad effects of Biden’s radical agenda, and this years’ Independence Day cookout won’t be any different. Experts say that as we gather with family and friends we should expect to pay 17% more this year:
* Burgers are up 36%
* Pork is up 31%
* Potato salad is up 22%
* Gas is up nearly 50%

---
| |
---

* Rent is up 15%
* Average wages have gone down
* Energy prices have gone up 8%
* Illegal aliens are flooding across our border while fentanyl and cartel crime are putting our communities in danger

Now is the time for republicans to stand up – to link arms – to take the Speaker’s gavel and rubber stamp from Nancy Pelosi, hold Biden accountable for his disastrous lack of leadership, and to make sure we preserve our country for future generations. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: These numbers are everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, four
moderate Democratic Senate campaigns in 2020 spent $334,997,642 and still
managed to lose. And that doesn’t include what the DSCC and Super PACs
spent.

Some of these races, in Maine and North Carolina, were ones Democrats
should have flipped to increase the Democratic majority in the Senate.
Others, in South Carolina and Kentucky, were massive money dumps to
campaigns that were never going to win.

Imagine what we could do with $334 million. We very likely could have won
our primaries against the establishment, lifting Kina Collins and Jessica
Cisneros to huge upset victories against corporate Democrats. Summer Lee,
who beat $3 million in corporate Super PAC attack ads, would’ve won by an
even bigger margin.

But our fundraising has taken another downturn,
Peter. This trend cannot continue
if we want to protect our JD incumbents Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and
Rashida Tlaib in primaries against the same Democratic establishment that
wastes hundreds of millions of dollars.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110978?refcode=em20220702-24114&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J ]Peter,
that’s why we have to ask: can you chip
in $3 right now? If we raised just .058% of what these 4
losing Senate campaigns raised in 2020, we’d turn our fundraising around
at a critical time and be in a strong position to re-elect the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110978?refcode=em20220702-24114&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J ]Contribute

If the Democratic establishment ran more candidates who support Medicare
for All, a Green New Deal, and student debt cancellation, it could compete
in these winnable races against Republicans. Instead, corporate Democrats
stick with their fossil fuel, Wall Street, and Big Pharma funders, and use
corporate-backed talking points. It’s a losing strategy.

Our mission to transform the Democratic Party into a party that delivers
real, progressive, lasting change to the people continues right now as we
try to win our primaries and add more fighters to the Justice Democrats
bloc on Capitol Hill. Can you help us make this a reality?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110978?refcode=em20220702-24114&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J ]We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, and neither do our
candidates. That’s why we’re relying on you to help us raise what we need
to win this year, just a small fraction of what the Democratic
establishment raises. So,
Peter, can you chip in
$3 or anything at all today?

We appreciate anything you can give and all the ways you support our
movement. We know we can only do this together with you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220702-24114-footer&t=1025&refcode2=24114_1203867_wc_3_J&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=24114%2E1203867%2Ewc_3_J

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Peter,

Earlier this week, we faced our second FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. Thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots team, I'm proud to say we reached our June end-of-quarter fundraising goal!

It's been a difficult few weeks since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. I know it can be easy to get discouraged, but your unwavering support and your dedication to protecting reproductive rights inspires me and makes me hopeful for the future.

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House, I will do everything I can to ensure reproductive rights are protected for every woman, no matter where she lives. I know we still have a long and difficult fight ahead of us, but if we continue working together, we can fight back and defend this fundamental right.

Thank you for your support,

Kim
**To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08.
