clean_body: Earlier this week, we faced our second FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. Thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots team, I'm proud to say we reached our June end-of-quarter fundraising goal! Peter, Earlier this week, we faced our second FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. Thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots team, I'm proud to say we reached our June end-of-quarter fundraising goal! It's been a difficult few weeks since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. I know it can be easy to get discouraged, but your unwavering support and your dedication to protecting reproductive rights inspires me and makes me hopeful for the future. As the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House, I will do everything I can to ensure reproductive rights are protected for every woman, no matter where she lives. I know we still have a long and difficult fight ahead of us, but if we continue working together, we can fight back and defend this fundamental right. Thank you for your support, Kim To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: What is wrong with MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I need you to stand with me against these heinous attacks. |
---

Fellow American,

I'll just say it: MSNBC has a racism problem in their ranks.

Back in April, they ran an article by a man who had these fine things to say about me:

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."

"I make a hard distinction between black conservatives and these tokens (HERSCHEL WALKER AND TIM SCOTT), who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_
---

They're coming after me again, and this time one of their writers is accusing me of being... anti-Black. **Yep, you read that right.**

The author writes, _**"GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker's entire political career is rooted in anti-Blackness."**_

This is so absurd, it's hard to know where to begin.

I will always speak my mind, stand up for myself, and stand up for the people I love - no matter what color their skin is. Far-Left political pundits keep attacking me because I'm a Black conservative. _I don't fit into their worldview of how a Black person is supposed to think and act._

**It's time we sent them a message. You can help prove them wrong - and blow their minds - by helping this Black conservative get elected to the United States Senate. **

I'd like to show our critics exactly how much grassroots support my campaign has. **[Would you please stand with me and make a contribution today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95845228426e4c53bbd2b42b93379f23&_e=ycYQITDzuz7lty5ubwNhTqp4dCnlbNYffBpf0lhhWgvdaK_ftiu71nKxxajL1-Fs5_7jMswiku2PamxxbV6Yxx152eKTlfVDQCCkavRnNYrVm6MOgfgIvErXB6usIy5rr6my8YF7Q7kuXEUSW-PhmJpeJYc8Q0PEkgp0jaH6hZzSDUemZ4sZzA2a-0HKyqYvHjHyRDQDd0XPkLzjRe78AnU8LCr1cYBcK16uvxAa-2qbbJyMie9glwS9OJOgB-GUPmgLT4guKRLZIHQwuUzjeBrc60-yoE_KcROGiLg93j6VPljrVC0m6g2xL7D_E0lDYGkus9Cgo9wX_uorD7eaIO4hCKB5yI2vThIwmKmHoJ2fWs4WEFDXV19uwGlyWQu10Bjwr3VDO7VO-t-pmMfbrPb_BsFeuGjwt8EoJKjq_Hr9SxeD09nQR5LzDNIFaA8fV0VgttwPVf5aJz5JH-x-Wns2K8Jttm-Ki1cUmteHrXXCA6HAG-uqkp4Frm5Mu6gu)**

clean_body: I need you to stand with me against these heinous attacks. | Fellow American, I'll just say it: MSNBC has a racism problem in their ranks. Back in April, they ran an article by a man who had these fine things to say about me: | "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." "I make a hard distinction between black conservatives and these tokens (HERSCHEL WALKER AND TIM SCOTT), who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." They're coming after me again, and this time one of their writers is accusing me of being... anti-Black. Yep, you read that right. The author writes, "GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker's entire political career is rooted in anti-Blackness." This is so absurd, it's hard to know where to begin. I will always speak my mind, stand up for myself, and stand up for the people I love - no matter what color their skin is. Far-Left political pundits keep attacking me because I'm a Black conservative. I don't fit into their worldview of how a Black person is supposed to think and act. It's time we sent them a message. You can help prove them wrong - and blow their minds - by helping this Black conservative get elected to the United States Senate. I'd like to show our critics exactly how much grassroots support my campaign has. NEWSFLASH: I was born Black, and I've never been anything else. ADDITIONAL NEWSFLASH: Nobody tells me what to do or how to think. I look at the issues and make up my own mind based on my faith, core values, and life experiences. I want to win this race and get America back on the right track. I want to unite Americans - not divide them by race or class. And if the close-minded folks at MSNBC come to realize that it's ok to be a Black conservative, we'll just consider that an added bonus. I appreciate you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: Find out what Nikki has been up to this week... | | | | NIKKI HALEY STOPS IN WISCONSIN AND IOWA Nikki Haley criss-crossed Wisconsin and Iowa this week to campaign for great conservative candidates. First, she stopped in Wisconsin to support Rebecca Kleefisch and Sen. Ron Johnson. Then, she made her way to Iowa where she campaigned alongside Rep. Randy Feenstra, Gov. Kim Reynolds, Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks, and Zach Nunn. | | | | | | JEN KIGGANS (VA-02) – ENDORSED BY NIKKI HALEY Ambassador Nikki Haley officially endorsed U.S. Navy veteran, mother and nurse practitioner Jen Kiggans for Virginia's 2nd Congressional District. She’s facing one of the most competitive races in the country. She’s a problem solver – determined to stand up against the Left’s radical agenda and big-government policies. Virginians have a fighter in Jen Kiggans. | ZACH NUNN (IA-03) – ENDORSED BY NIKKI HALEY This week, Nikki Haley endorsed Zach Nunn for Congress in IA-03. Nunn is a proud combat veteran, father, husband, and conservative leader. We need him to flip IA-03 RED! He is ready to hit the ground running on day one, which is why I’m confident he will make a great leader. | | | APRIL BECKER LEADS DEM INCUMBENT IN NV-03 | | | April Becker is pulling ahead in Nevada, where she is challenging liberal incumbent Susie Lee in the 3rd Congressional District. name: Bianca Keaton, Campaign Manager
subject: $0.25 = 1 voter in Jefferson County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hey, Peter, it’s
Bianca — I’m the campaign manager for Team Booker.

I wanna let you in on some behind the scenes plans for our campaign and
let you know our strategy to mobilize a record number of voters in all 120
counties and transform Kentucky's future.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220702.M2AXBD&refcode=em20220702-2175&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=2175%2E346206%2ECIq3V8 ]When you’re done reading, I hope you’ll donate $5 so our
field team can start making the early investments we need to register and
contact a record number of voters leading up to the election.

Ever since Charles ran for U.S. Senate in 2020, his motto has been ‘From
the hood, to the holler.’

Meaning if we want to transform the future of Kentucky: We need to come
together — from all walks of life, different backgrounds, representing
communities across the Commonwealth — to create a winning movement.

For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky will forever be a red
state. But the truth is it’s a disenfranchised state. It’s a commonwealth
where a whole lot of people haven’t felt heard in a long time, and where
the number of people who don’t vote outnumber those who do. Mitch
McConnell and Rand Paul know this — so their plan is to continue dividing
us, distracting us from the common priorities we share, and discouraging
us from voting.

We plan on ending that cycle. That means we need to start investing ASAP
in:

* Building a grassroots network of organizers
* Hiring staff to protect voting rights at the ballot box
* Reaching out to the over 200,000 Kentuckians who recently had their
voting rights restored
* Purchasing voter outreach tools
* Printing voter registration informational materials
* Setting up a fund to pay for gas for our teams as they travel across
Kentucky
* And so much more

So here’s the part where we ask you for your help,
Peter. To fund our organizing
plan between now and the election, we set up a rough budget:

Peter, we’ve
randomly selected you as a potential sponsor of Jefferson County
in KY.

We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. At a cost of
roughly $0.25 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $158,195 to
cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County.

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Hey, Peter, it’s Bianca — I’m the campaign manager for Team Booker. I wanna let you in on some behind the scenes plans for our campaign and let you know our strategy to mobilize a record number of voters in all 120 counties and transform Kentucky's future. [ ]When you’re done reading, I hope you’ll donate $5 so our field team can start making the early investments we need to register and contact a record number of voters leading up to the election. Ever since Charles ran for U.S. Senate in 2020, his motto has been ‘From the hood, to the holler.’ Meaning if we want to transform the future of Kentucky: We need to come together — from all walks of life, different backgrounds, representing communities across the Commonwealth — to create a winning movement. For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky will forever be a red state. But the truth is it’s a disenfranchised state. It’s a commonwealth where a whole lot of people haven’t felt heard in a long time, and where the number of people who don’t vote outnumber those who do. Mitch McConnell and Rand Paul know this — so their plan is to continue dividing us, distracting us from the common priorities we share, and discouraging us from voting. We plan on ending that cycle. That means we need to start investing ASAP in: Building a grassroots network of organizers Hiring staff to protect voting rights at the ballot box Reaching out to the over 200,000 Kentuckians who recently had their voting rights restored Purchasing voter outreach tools Printing voter registration informational materials Setting up a fund to pay for gas for our teams as they travel across Kentucky * And so much more So here’s the part where we ask you for your help, Peter. To fund our organizing plan between now and the election, we set up a rough budget: Peter, we’ve randomly selected you as a potential sponsor of Jefferson County in KY. We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. At a cost of roughly $0.25 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $158,195 to cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County. name: Giffords
subject: Gabby is being awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When Gabby Giffords got the call from President Biden that she will be awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation’s highest civilian honor, her first words were “Team effort.”
#

Friends -
When Gabby Giffords got the call from President Biden that she will be awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation’s highest civilian honor, her first words were “Team effort.”
Amazing.
Here is the truth: Gabby has given everything in her work to make our communities safer from gun violence, and she’s done it all while pursuing her own personal recovery.
There are people alive today because of that work.
And with the passage of the bipartisan gun safety bill, the road ahead is brighter than the days behind us.
Gabby’s right though, it _has_ been a team effort.
But this week, we’re going to celebrate her role in that work. Join us:
[**Please sign our card congratulating Gabby on being awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom. We’ll share responses with her before she accepts the honor from President Biden. **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/medal_of_freedom/?source=em220702-1-15&refcode2=2202.3935704.HopOyU&t=2&akid=2202%2E3935704%2EHopOyU)** Thank you, The team at Giffords
Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2202%2E3935704%2EHopOyU) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

**No matter what you think of last week’s decision, we can’t manipulate the constitution just because we don’t like the outcome.**

name: Joy Thomas Moore
subject: Will you support my son ahead of his last deadline before the primary?
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47328572/353872764/366828926?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220702deadline8_jtm_120daex5k_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzhmYWU4Mi0zN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJd03QrGk_VxPsFDB2BVOtM2no74J_hXWq0T7apf4U=)
---
Hello there, this is Wes’ mom, Joy. As you know, my son is running for Governor of Maryland, and he has worked so incredibly hard to get to this point, changing lives for the better along the way. Growing up, Wes could be a handful at times but I always knew he had a big heart. We faced challenges as a family after losing my husband so suddenly when Wes was only three, but I always pressed him on the importance of a good education, and eventually sent him to military school to set him on a positive path in life. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47328573/353872765/366828926?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220702deadline8_jtm_120daex5k_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzhmYWU4Mi0zN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJd03QrGk_VxPsFDB2BVOtM2no74J_hXWq0T7apf4U=)
---
He’s gone on to make me proud over and over again, serving his country in Afghanistan as an Officer in the U.S. Army, becoming a Rhodes Scholar, starting his small business, and leading one of the country’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. Plus, he’s a loving husband and father, the two most important jobs he’s ever had.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47328574/353872766/366828926?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220702deadline8_jtm_120daex5k_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzhmYWU4Mi0zN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJd03QrGk_VxPsFDB2BVOtM2no74J_hXWq0T7apf4U=)
---
It brings a smile to my face and warmth to my heart knowing that my son is driven by his desire to help others, and I can think of no better person to lead our state forward.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47328575/353872767/366828926?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220702deadline8_jtm_120daex5k_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzhmYWU4Mi0zN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJd03QrGk_VxPsFDB2BVOtM2no74J_hXWq0T7apf4U=)
---
**[Wes’ team tells me he’s facing his last pre-primary filing deadline tomorrow at midnight, so I wanted to reach out personally and ask if you’ll support my son and his movement to create an even better Maryland by making a donation to his campaign today? Anything helps!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47328576/353872768/366828926?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220702deadline8_jtm_120daex5k_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzhmYWU4Mi0zN2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJd03QrGk_VxPsFDB2BVOtM2no74J_hXWq0T7apf4U=)**

clean_body: | = Hello there, this is Wes’ mom, Joy. As you know, my son is running for Governor of Maryland, and he has worked so incredibly hard to get to this point, changing lives for the better along the way. Growing up, Wes could be a handful at times but I always knew he had a big heart. We faced challenges as a family after losing my husband so suddenly when Wes was only three, but I always pressed him on the importance of a good education, and eventually sent him to military school to set him on a positive path in life. | = He’s gone on to make me proud over and over again, serving his country in Afghanistan as an Officer in the U.S. Army, becoming a Rhodes Scholar, starting his small business, and leading one of the country’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. Plus, he’s a loving husband and father, the two most important jobs he’s ever had. = It brings a smile to my face and warmth to my heart knowing that my son is driven by his desire to help others, and I can think of no better person to lead our state forward. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for anything you can do, big or small, to help elect my son the next Governor of Maryland. body:
Your signature is missing:
| | | ****ALERT: Lindsey Graham _CONFIRMS_ GOP plan to DECIMATE Social Security and Medicare

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8439?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&akid=5039%2E9716520%2E_aF8fM)
******Add your name:**
**[Sign our URGENT petition to show your UNEQUIVOCAL SUPPORT for Social Security and Medicare>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8439?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&akid=5039%2E9716520%2E_aF8fM)******

**** | | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/8439?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&akid=5039%2E9716520%2E_aF8fM)
---

Team -- Tens of millions of Americans depend on Social Security and Medicare to pay the bills and stay healthy. **But if Mitch McConnell and Lindsey Graham have their way, millions of Americans could LOSE those benefits.**

Graham recently confirmed that the GOP agenda includes HUGE cuts to these _vital_ programs. And with Republicans just a single seat away from retaking the Senate, Medicare and Social Security are in EXTREME peril if they win!

**To defend the Senate and STOP their right-wing takeover, we've launched an urgent petition to PROVE that Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to save Social Security and Medicare. We need 50,000 signatures TONIGHT to reach our goal, but right now we’re THOUSANDS of names short!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8439?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&akid=5039%2E9716520%2E_aF8fM)**[We can’t wait any longer: Sign on before midnight to show that you'll NEVER let Republicans take away our Social Security and Medicare>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8439?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&akid=5039%2E9716520%2E_aF8fM)**

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/8439?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-SenateAlert-GrahamSSMedicare-Pros-sl1&akid=5039%2E9716520%2E_aF8fM)
---

Thanks,

Team DSCC

Why do we support John? Lots of reasons — one of which is we’ve had enough with politicians pretending to care about working folks.
We need leaders who know the challenges working people face first-hand and act with urgency to fix our broken systems. John’s fighting to speed up Maryland’s timeline to reach a $15 minimum wage, cancel student debt, and invest in green union jobs because he’s been through the struggle himself.
But it’s going to take a diverse coalition of folks standing with us to make history and elect John as Maryland’s first Black governor and the third ever elected Black governor in U.S. history. And we need you, Peter, to be one of those folks.

clean_body: We are entering the final stretch before Primary Election Day on July 19th, which means that time is running out for you to make an impact in this race. | = | Hi Peter, we’ll get right to the point. We are entering the final stretch before Primary Election Day on July 19th, which means that time is running out for you to make an impact in this race. If you’ve been waiting to contribute, NOW is the time. A new poll just came out that shows John in the top 3 of this crowded race — and 23% of Maryland Democratic primary voters are still undecided! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Why do we support John? Lots of reasons — one of which is we’ve had enough with politicians pretending to care about working folks. We need leaders who know the challenges working people face first-hand and act with urgency to fix our broken systems. John’s fighting to speed up Maryland’s timeline to reach a $15 minimum wage, cancel student debt, and invest in green union jobs because he’s been through the struggle himself. But it’s going to take a diverse coalition of folks standing with us to make history and elect John as Maryland’s first Black governor and the third ever elected Black governor in U.S. history. And we need you, Peter, to be one of those folks. = = Thanks, Team King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . body:

**Today marks just one month until Arizona's Aug. 2 primary election****.** This means that the next few weeks are crucial for our campaign to flip Arizona blue, and we are counting on our grassroots supporters – people like you – to help solidify as strong a position as possible.
Friend, since launching our campaign, thousands of people have joined our grassroots team – and I am overwhelmed by this incredible support. **But Trump, extremist donors and corporate PACs are pouring MILLIONS into Arizona to stop our movement.**
I am fighting for a better life for ALL Arizonans, from protecting voting rights and reproductive health to funding education for all children – and more. Meanwhile, my opponent, Kari Lake (R), envisions a divided Arizona with fewer basic rights, less access to economic opportunities and less security for the future.
Now more than ever, we need your support so we can reach out to every voter in the weeks before election day. **[With just one month left until the primary election in August, will you chip in $5 to help fuel our campaign to flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47329176/353875783/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk762-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2ZiYjJlMi0zOWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDCAS6Qnbs1vxohefxKVqpLXCWNvMmpW4reg0J0_HPw=)**

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47331616/353891528/-1116320513?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220702tynondonors_dkj_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEzMDVjNC01ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qCTgHdLner43b3BY4mMNA_2n5Jcdlc0OZaNrL5JC1MQ=)
---
Friends, I know my team sent out a high volume of emails leading up to last night’s End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline, and I just wanted to send a quick note of appreciation for sticking with us. **Thanks to you, we not only reached our goal — but blew past it!** _We’re now over 8,000 grassroots-donors strong._ In a district that pundits had originally written off as unwinnable for Democrats, we have them reconsidering: we’ve shown the ability to turn out voters, to inspire swing voters, and to raise the money needed to get our message out. _**Friends, CA-03 is ready to flip blue.**_ Onward! — Dr. Kermit Jones P.S. I’m not taking any corporate contributions or donations from the fossil fuel and oil industries. Our campaign relies 100% on grassroots donors like you, not Big Money. This episode explores the role of powerful business lobbies and the establishment wing of the GOP in supporting and justifying illegal immigration. Plus, she discusses Paul Clement's departure from Kirkland and the opportunity for America First attorneys, and Sidney Powell's clash with the Texas Bar over her license. Peter,

I'll just say it: MSNBC has a racism problem in their ranks.

Back in April, they ran an article by a man who had these fine things to say about me:

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."

"I make a hard distinction between black conservatives and these tokens (HERSCHEL WALKER AND TIM SCOTT), who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_
---

They're coming after me again, and this time one of their writers is accusing me of being... anti-Black. **Yep, you read that right.**

The author writes, _**"GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker's entire political career is rooted in anti-Blackness."**_

This is so absurd, it's hard to know where to begin.

I will always speak my mind, stand up for myself, and stand up for the people I love - no matter what color their skin is. Far-Left political pundits keep attacking me because I'm a Black conservative. _I don't fit into their worldview of how a Black person is supposed to think and act._

You have always been one of my fiercest supporters, so I am counting on you to help me right now. It is critical that we take our beloved Country back from the RADICAL LEFT , and time is getting away from us. I have launched my , and it's imperative that I know where you stand on some key issues. My team and I have a very important strategy meeting in 1 HOUR , and we will review your response. Our Country is on the line, Friend. I know you won 't let me down. Do you believe Big-tech has a bias against Conservatives? Thank you, Donald J. _We’re thrilled:_ Today, President Biden COMMANDED Senate Democrats to do their job and change the filibuster rules to codify _Roe v. Wade._

[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220702_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=3564%2E878179%2E_ZlmfL)
Mitch McConnell and Trump’s Justices are panicking, and they’re sprinting to pressure Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to keep the filibuster in place...
That’s why we’re racing to get 15,000 Democratic signatures by midnight tonight. If we fall short, the GOP will totally drown out President Biden – _we can’t let that happen!_

[**Quick: add your name to our petition demanding the Senate abolish the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220702_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=3564%2E878179%2E_ZlmfL)

name: Poll Update
subject: re: your plan to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **URGENT: New poll shows 78 percent of Democrats are more likely to vote after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8456?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-PollUpdate-jtk2357-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-PollUpdate-jtk2357-ETG-sl1&akid=5071%2E9716520%2EyE1FeF)
**How likely are YOU to vote in November?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8456?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-PollUpdate-jtk2357-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-PollUpdate-jtk2357-ETG-sl1&akid=5071%2E9716520%2EyE1FeF)
Democrats showed up in RECORD numbers in the last election to defeat Trump and flip the Senate blue -- but if we want to **_keep_** the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands, we'll need record Democratic turnout AGAIN.

That’s why we’re re-evaluating our voter turnout model to determine whether a Democratic surge we need is likely to happen -- **but we have NO record of whether you plan to vote!**

**As a top Democrat in Pennsylvania, your input is _critical_ to our strategy. These results need to be tabulated as soon as possible, so please respond no later than MIDNIGHT tonight:**

**How likely are you to vote in November?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8456?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-PollUpdate-jtk2357-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-PollUpdate-jtk2357-ETG-sl1&akid=5071%2E9716520%2EyE1FeF)
Thanks,

Team DSCC

| |

name: Dave Chase, Campaign Manager
subject: believe me I get it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4439%2E3611125%2EFGklOY ][IMG]

Team,

Thanks to your support, we’re in a dead heat with far-right millionaire JD
Vance in the race that will decide Senate control in November.

We see where this race is. We are in a strong position to win, but we need
the resources to build out our team, keep Tim on the road, and invest in
voter communication RIGHT NOW.

We’re experiencing a summer fundraising slump—and believe me I get it.

The last thing we want to think about this weekend is the awful political
landscape Democrats have been dealt this cycle.

But, we can’t wait until the last minute, dump a ton of money into this
campaign, and pray it works. We’ve got to lay the groundwork now and play
the long game, that’s why I’m personally reaching out.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16071?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4439%2E3611125%2EFGklOY ]Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the
resources right now to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you chip in
$25 ASAP to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate
majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16071?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4439%2E3611125%2EFGklOY ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16071?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4439%2E3611125%2EFGklOY ]Donate $50

LFG!

Dave Chase

clean_body: we found our sweet disaster | Friends, Today, we find ourselves in a sweet disaster. We MISSED our FEC Quarter Deadline by over $9,000. This was a huge missed opportunity for our campaign and our Conservative movement. So let’s get to the sweet part: We think that’s pretty sweet, but only if you take advantage of it! We only have until close of business today to juice as much out of this generous opportunity as we can. And to stay on theme, we’ll keep this email short and sweet. Thanks so much! Sarah Team JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. subject: What is wrong with MSNBC?

body:
I need you to stand with me against these heinous attacks. |
---

Peter,

I'll just say it: MSNBC has a racism problem in their ranks.

Back in April, they ran an article by a man who had these fine things to say about me:

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."

"I make a hard distinction between black conservatives and these tokens (HERSCHEL WALKER AND TIM SCOTT), who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_
---

They're coming after me again, and this time one of their writers is accusing me of being... anti-Black. **Yep, you read that right.**

The author writes, _**"GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker's entire political career is rooted in anti-Blackness."**_

This is so absurd, it's hard to know where to begin.

I will always speak my mind, stand up for myself, and stand up for the people I love - no matter what color their skin is. Far-Left political pundits keep attacking me because I'm a Black conservative. _I don't fit into their worldview of how a Black person is supposed to think and act._

**It's time we sent them a message. You can help prove them wrong - and blow their minds - by helping this Black conservative get elected to the United States Senate. **

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek —

When we say we’re getting Stacey Abrams’ message out everywhere across
Georgia, we mean it.

Stacey is traveling to every corner of the state. We have ads running on
TV, online and over the radio. We have activated volunteers in every
region and are placing staff across the state. And this week we even
launched ads at the gas pump to show exactly how Stacey will work to
reduce taxes and keep costs low for Georgians.

Momentum is on our side right now,
Derek. But getting out our message
to every voter who needs to hear it takes real resources — and we can’t
afford to slow down now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220702_B2_Ads_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=840%2E1862389%2EZ8ICF0 ]Please, can you make your
first donation to keep
Stacey’s message up all across Georgia? Anything you can give today will
make a real difference.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220702_B2_Ads_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=840%2E1862389%2EZ8ICF0 ]DONATE $5

Derek, there
are so many things we need Georgians to know before they cast their votes.

We need folks to know about Stacey’s vision for One Georgia, where
everyone can thrive regardless of background or zip code — and her plans
to make it a reality.

We need Georgians to know all the ways Brian Kemp has left them behind —
from high gas prices, to a six-week abortion ban that will soon come into
effect, to making it easier for people to carry concealed weapons who
would have previously been found too dangerous to do so.

And we need them to know that their votes will make a difference in our
state — and that we have their backs as they work to overcome Republican
voter suppression.

Thanks to grassroots
supporters like you,
we are getting our message out all across the state. But there are still
millions of Georgians we need to reach, and we are counting on our
supporters to chip
in now to keep spreading Stacey’s message.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220702_B2_Ads_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=840%2E1862389%2EZ8ICF0 ]Derek, make
your first donation
right now. Anything you can give today will make a real difference.

Thank you,

Team Abrams

Hi, friend – I’m going over the results of our official July Focus Group Survey with Marco tomorrow morning, **but the research folks tell me that we're still missing your response.**

This is only a short 60-second survey, and your feedback will be absolutely invaluable in helping us strategize for our race. **[Will you complete the survey to make sure Marco hears from you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330698/353886640/-589108657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk757-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViNzhkNy00ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNyfV6HJ5b1q_Vj_GdVdnhZsJNUUcB_XzaHoYSxgA6I=&emci=1fc646e0-60f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=c45b78d7-4efa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**
**We are officially one month away from the Arizona primary on Aug. 2.** Marco is ready to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy – and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms we can win! But to do that, we need to hear from you. **Friend, will you do me a HUGE favor and complete our official July Focus Group Survey now?**

**Here's the best link:** **[http://surveys.signforgood.com/Lopez-July-Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330699/353886641/-589108657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk757-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViNzhkNy00ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNyfV6HJ5b1q_Vj_GdVdnhZsJNUUcB_XzaHoYSxgA6I=&emci=1fc646e0-60f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=c45b78d7-4efa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**
Thanks for all your help.

– Phil
Campaign Manager

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330700/353886642/-589108657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk757-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViNzhkNy00ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNyfV6HJ5b1q_Vj_GdVdnhZsJNUUcB_XzaHoYSxgA6I=&emci=1fc646e0-60f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=c45b78d7-4efa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)

Friend – Republicans are making Arizona ground zero for their extremism, which means it's on us to fight back, flip our state blue and defend our rights.
The Washington Post confirms that electing Democratic governors is the best way to win the fight for our democracy – so we have to craft an airtight strategy to win this race and defeat our extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R).

**With just one month until the critical primary, I asked my team to gather a list of our strongest supporters to participate in our official July Strategy Survey – and you're at the top of the list, friend.**
**[So please, friend, will you take just 60 seconds now to complete our urgent strategy survey? I need your feedback as we head into this crucial next stage of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330701/353886643/-589108657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk757-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViNzhkNy00ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNyfV6HJ5b1q_Vj_GdVdnhZsJNUUcB_XzaHoYSxgA6I=&emci=1fc646e0-60f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=c45b78d7-4efa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**

* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47330703/353886645/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk757-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViNzhkNy00ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNyfV6HJ5b1q_Vj_GdVdnhZsJNUUcB_XzaHoYSxgA6I=) Thank you so much.

name: Herschel Walker

body:
I need you to stand with me against these heinous attacks. |
---

Peter,

I'll just say it: MSNBC has a racism problem in their ranks.

Back in April, they ran an article by a man who had these fine things to say about me:

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."

"I make a hard distinction between black conservatives and these tokens (HERSCHEL WALKER AND TIM SCOTT), who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_
---

They're coming after me again, and this time one of their writers is accusing me of being... anti-Black. **Yep, you read that right.**

The author writes, _**"GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker's entire political career is rooted in anti-Blackness."**_

This is so absurd, it's hard to know where to begin.

I will always speak my mind, stand up for myself, and stand up for the people I love - no matter what color their skin is. Far-Left political pundits keep attacking me because I'm a Black conservative. _I don't fit into their worldview of how a Black person is supposed to think and act._

**It's time we sent them a message. You can help prove them wrong - and blow their minds - by helping this Black conservative get elected to the United States Senate. **

subject: Read Here! My op-ed: Why I'm the best choice for Secretary of State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle for Secretary of State
body:
We need a candidate who can take back the Office of Secretary of State from the Democrats. I am ready! | | | |
---
| | **Friends,

I would like to take this opportunity to share with you an op-ed I wrote, recently published in the Daily Independent, highlighting why I am the best candidate for the Office of Secretary of State. It briefly outlines why I am running and what my plans are to improve both the office and the integrity of our elections.

There is much work to be done to ensure voters will have confidence in the outcome of our elections and I am the most qualified candidate to accomplish that goal. Thank you for taking the time to read this and I would appreciate your vote on Tuesday, August 2, 2022.**

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: Roe v. Wade overruled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Senator Schumer.

I urgently need you to sign our petition to show your support for reproductive rights.

The MAGA Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and now the right to choose is under attack by Republicans across the country -- so we have to take a stand now. Please add your name to protect reproductive rights: **[www.dscc.org/ProtectReproductiveRights](https://go.dscc.org/go/8455?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220702-ChuckSchumer-ShortRoevWadeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220702-ChuckSchumer-ShortRoevWadeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5072%2E9716520%2EXAo4xV)**

body:
All the experts agree: Florida’s Senate race could decide Senate control!
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa)._
---
| Look, there’s 3 quick things you need to know about Val Demings’ make-or-break Senate race:

**ONE:** Former Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings is surging in the polls against Trump’s favorite Senator, Marco Rubio!

**TWO:** Marco Rubio is panicking, so his billionaire buddies are about to flood Florida with boatloads of dark money to _ruin_ Val’s people-powered campaign.

**THREE:** That’s why we’re laser-focused on hitting our $35,000 fundraising goal to SAVE Democrats like Val Demings – _and defend the Senate._
[**Please: Rush $5 right away to help us elect incredible Democrats like Val Demings, defeat far-right goons like Marco Rubio, and save our Senate majority from total collapse.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16371?t=7&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa) | [**$35,000 GOAL: Rush $5 ASAP to save the Senate »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16371?t=8&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa)
---
Listen, all the experts agree: Florida’s Senate race could decide Senate control.

**And right now, Democrat Val Demings is catching up to Marco Rubio:**
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16371?t=9&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa)
We need to keep up Val’s _incredible_ momentum to help Democrats like her DEFEAT her Trump-loving Republican opponents.

But we need a _surge_ of 3,500 donations before our strict deadline. **Falling even one donation short would _ruin_ our chances at keeping the Senate!**
[**So, we need you to step up. Chip in $5 — _or anything you can afford!_ — to elect Democrats like Val Demings and defend our razor-thin Senate majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16371?t=10&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=3557%2E878179%2EVO-LYa).**
